Genesis1:1 Take cunan kalltäwipanjja Diosajj alajjpacha
Genesis1:2 Aca orakesti jan cunani ch'usaquïnwa
Genesis1:3 Diosasti sänwa: “Khanajj utjpan” sasa. Ucatsti khanajj ucspachaw utj-jjaraquïna.
Genesis1:4 Diosasti khanan sumätap uñjasinjja
Genesis1:5 Diosasti khanarojj sutichänwa uru sasa
Genesis1:6 Ucjjarojj Diosajj saraquïnwa: “Utjpan umar jaljtayirejja
Genesis1:7 Ucatsti uqhampunïnwa. Diosasti mä uma jaljtayirwa luräna
Genesis1:8 Diosasti uca jaljtayatarojj alajjpacha sasaw sutichäna. Uqhamaw payïri urojj phokhasïna.
Genesis1:9 Ucatsti Diosajj sänwa: “Alajjpachat aynachancqui uca umanacajj
Genesis1:10 Diosasti wañarojj orake sasaw sutichäna
Genesis1:11 sänwa: “Orakejj take casta achunac achpan
Genesis1:12 Orakenjja cunayman casta alinacaw achüna. Jathanac churir ch'ojjñanaca
Genesis1:13 Uqhamaw quimsïri urojj phokhasïna.
Genesis1:14 Diosasti saraquïnwa: “Alajjpachanjja khananacajj utjpan
Genesis1:15

Genesis1:17 Diosasti uca khananacjja alajjpacharuw uscüna
Genesis1:18 urusa
Genesis1:19 Uqhamaw pusïri urojj phokhasïna.
Genesis1:20 Ucjjarojj Diosajj saraquïnwa: “Umanjja take casta animalanac utjpan
Genesis1:21 Ucatsti uqhampunïnwa. Diosasti kotan jaquir jach'a animalanacwa uscuraquïna
Genesis1:22 Take uca animalanac usccatayna ucanacarusti aca arunacampiw bendiciraquïna: “Mirantapjjam kotanacar phokhantañcama
Genesis1:23 Uqhamaw pheskëri urojj phokhasïna.
Genesis1:24 Diosasti saraquïnwa: “Aca orakenjja take casta animalanac utjpan: uywañ animalanaca
Genesis1:25 Diosasti take aca animalanacwa uscüna
Genesis1:26 Ucatsti saraquïnwa: “Jichhajj jake luraraquiñäni. Uca jakesti jiwäsar uñtasitäniwa
Genesis1:27 Cunapachatejj Diosajj jake usccäna ucapachajj jupar uñtasitwa uscüna; chacha
Genesis1:28 ucjjarusti bendiciraquïnwa: “Jichhajj wali mirantapjjam
Genesis1:29 Ucjjarusti saraquïnwa: “Jichhajj jumanacaruw churapjjsma take casta jathachiri alinaca
Genesis1:30 Ucampisa pampanquir animalanacaru
Genesis1:31 Diosasti take cuntejj lurcän ucanacan sumätapwa uñjäna. Uqhamatwa sojjtïri urojj phokhasïna.

Genesis3:3 chica taypincqui uca kokan achunacapacwa janejj mank'apquiristtejja. Diosasti sapjjaraquituwa: “Janiw uca kokan achupjja mank'apjjätati ni llamct'apjjätasa. Mank'apjjäta uqhasti jiwapjjataw” sasa.

Exodus16:4 Ucat Tatitojj Moisesarojj sänwa: —Nayasti alajjpachatjja t'ant'a jalluyanëjja. Ucampis jakenacajj sapüruw apthapisipjjani kawkhatejj uca uru mank'añatac munasqui uqhamarjama. Uqhamatwa nayajj yant'äjja qhititejj camachi arunacajjar iyawscani

Exodus16:10 Ucampis Aaronajj take israelitanacar parlcäna ucapachasti takeniwa uñjapjjäna wasar toketa Tatitun jach'a cancañapajj kenay taypit uñstaniri.
Exodus16:11 Ucatsti Tatitojj Moisesaruw aqham sas parläna:
Exodus16:12 —Nayajj ist'twa israelitanacan jan wali parlapjjatanacapjja. Ucampis jumajj parlam aqham sasa: “Acat jayp'urusti jumanacajj aychwa mank'apjjäta
Exodus16:13 Uca jayp'pachaw qhullunacajja phokhantäna carpanacap sayt'ayasis utjantäpcän uca campamentorojja
Exodus16:14 Cunapachatejj sullajj wañsjjäna ucqhasti

Exodus16:16 Tatitusti aqham saraquiwa: “Jumanacasti apthapisipjjätawa kawkhtejj mank'añataqui munapcta
Exodus16:17 Ucatsti israelitanacajj uqhamarjamaw lurapjjäna. Mayninacasti apthapisipjjänwa walja
Exodus16:18 Ucampis tupu churatarjam apthapisipjjatapatsti
Exodus16:19 Ucat Moisesasti sascaquïnwa: —Janiwa qhitisa khepärmanthitaquejj cunsa jilt'ayañapäquiti —sasa.
Exodus16:20 Ucampis yakhepanacajj janiw Moisesarojj ist'apcänti
Exodus16:21 Alwanacasti sapa mayniw apthapisïna kawkhatejj mank'añataqui waquisqui uqhamarjama. Ucampis intin lupipajj junt'utatayasajja chullutatayjjänwa.

Exodus24:13 Moisesajj Diosan kolluparojj maqhatänwa Josué yanapiripampi chica.

Exodus24:15 Uqham sawayasinsti Moisesajj kolluruw maqhatawayäna. Ucatsti kollurojj kenayawa wali urpjjatäna.
Exodus24:16 Tatitun jach'a cancañapawa Sinaí kolljjarojj jutäna
Exodus24:17 Tatitun jach'a cancañapasti israelitanacarojj uñstänwa mä naqhantir ninjama
Exodus24:18 Moisesasti kenay taypinjamwa kollurojj maqhatäna
Exodus25:1 Tatitusti Moisesarojj sänwa:
Exodus25:2 “Israelitanacarojja nayataqui ofrenda apthapipjjañapataqui yatiyam. Jumanacasti
Exodus25:3 Aqham ofrendanacwa apthapipjjäta: kori
Exodus25:4 morado tela
Exodus25:5 oveja lip'ichinaca wilaru tiñsuta
Exodus25:6 aceite lamparanac khanayañataqui
Exodus25:7 ónice sat suma kalanaca
Exodus25:8 Nayataquisti mä kollana utjäwi lurarapipjjetäta
Exodus25:9 Ucampis uca utjäwjja
Exodus25:10 “Acacia sat maderatjja mä arca lurapjjäta
Exodus25:11 Mankhatsa
Exodus25:12 Ucjjarusti pusi argollanacwa korita luraraquïta
Exodus25:13 Ucjjarusti lawanacwa waquicharaquïta acacia sat maderata
Exodus25:14 Uca lawanacjja arca cayunacana uchatäqui uca argollanacaruw sut'untayäta
Exodus25:15 Uca lawanacjja arca cayuncqui uca argollanacatjja janipuniw aysütati
Exodus25:16 Uca arcarojj ucharaquïtawa cawquïr amtäwinactejj lurctan uca leyinaca.
Exodus25:17 “Ucjjarusti uca arcataquejj mä tapa luraraquïta
Exodus25:18 Ucatsti pani querubines sat angelanac koritcamaqui luraraquïta martillompi lek'suta
Exodus25:19 Arca tapamp
Exodus25:20 Aca querubines sat angelanacsti purap uñthapisitwa uchäta
Exodus25:21 Ucampis uca arca patjjarojj juchanacat pampachatäñataqui ofrenda loktañäquis uca
Exodus25:22 Ucanwa jumampejj jiquisiñäni. Nayajja suma arust'äwi arca patjjancqui uca pä querubines sat angelanac taypitwa israelitanacataquejj arunacajja churanïma.
Exodus25:23 “Mä mesa acacia sat maderat luram
Exodus25:24 Ucarojj korimpiw patat lip'suyäta
Exodus25:25 Uca mesan thiyapsti anchorojj pakallko centimetroni luraraquïta
Exodus25:26 Ucjjarusti koritjja pusi argollanacwa luraraquïta
Exodus25:27 Ucampis aca argollanacajj mesa thiya mankhancañapawa
Exodus25:28 Uca mesa callañataquisti acacia sat lawata lurasinsti patatjja korimpiraquiw lip'suyaraquïta.
Exodus25:29 Ucjjarusti koritcamaqui platonaca
Exodus25:30 Uca mesarojj sapa cutipuniw t'ant'jja uchäta nayan nayrakatajjanjja.
Exodus25:31 “Ucjjarusti koritcamaqui mä candelero martillompi lek'susa luraraquïta. Ucampis uca candeleron cayupasa
Exodus25:32 Uca candeleronsti sojjta amparanacaw ladonacat mistsuñapa
Exodus25:33 Candelerota sarakqui uca sojjta amparanacajja
Exodus25:34 Ucampis candeleron sayiripasti pusi copanacanïñapawa almendro sat pankararu uñtata
Exodus25:35 Candelerona amparanacapajj sarakqui ucat aynachanjja quimsa mokonacaw utjañapa
Exodus25:36 Candeleron
Exodus25:37 Uqhamarac luraraquïtawa pakallko lamparanaca
Exodus25:38 Uqhamaraqui tenazanacsa
Exodus25:39 Candelero
Exodus25:40 Jichhasti suma amuyumpi luram cunjämtejj kollunjja uñacht'aycsma uca quipcaqui.
Exodus26:1 “Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpsti tunca cortinani luräta
Exodus26:2 Sapa maya cortinasti aqham tupunïñapawa: largorojja tunca payan metro chicatani
Exodus26:3 Pheska cortinanacjja mayaqui ch'ucthapïta
Exodus26:4 Cortinanacarusti ojalanacwa uchäta morado ch'anqhanacampi
Exodus26:5 Nayrïri pheska cortinanacaru
Exodus26:6 Ucjjarusti pheska tunca ganchonaca koritcamaqui luraraquim
Exodus26:7 “Ucjjarusti tunca mayan cortinanaca luraraquim cabrito t'awranacata Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpa patjjaru uchañataqui.
Exodus26:8 Sapa maya cortinasti aqham tupunïñapawa: largorojja quimsa metro chicatani
Exodus26:9 Ucatsti pheska cortinanacjja yakhacwa ch'ucthapïta
Exodus26:10 Ucatsti pheska tunca ojalanaca nayrïr pheska cortinanaca ch'ucthapcta uca thiyanacaru luraraquïta
Exodus26:11 Ucjjarusti pheska tunca ganchonaca broncetcamaqui luraraquim
Exodus26:12 Mankhat jilt'qui uca cortinanacjja chicatpacha uca carpa khepäjjaruw warcoktayapjjäta.
Exodus26:13 Uqhamata Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpajj imantatäñapataqui
Exodus26:14 “Uca carpa patjjataquisti luraraquïtawa ovej lip'ichinacata wilaru tiñita
Exodus26:15 “Uqhamarac Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpataquejj suma tablanaca acacia sat lawata luraraquïta
Exodus26:16 Sapa maya tablasti aqhamäñapawa: largorojja pusi metro chicatani
Exodus26:17 Sapa maya tablasti pä p'iyanïñapawa
Exodus26:18 Uca carpa tablanac lurañ tucuyasinsti
Exodus26:19 Uca tablanac cayuru uchañataquisti kollketwa luräta pusi tunca planchanaca. Sapa maya tabla cayurusti pä planchanacwa uchäta
Exodus26:20 “Uqhamarac amsta tokerusti pä tunca tablanacaracwa ucharaquïta.
Exodus26:21 Ucampis pusi tunca kollket lurat planchanacatjja
Exodus26:22 Uca quipcaraqui inti jalanta tokerusti carpa khepäjjarojja sojjta tablanacwa ucharaquïta.
Exodus26:23 Uqhamarac pä tablanacwa luraraquïta khepäjja paya esquinanacataqui.
Exodus26:24 Sapa maya tablanacajja suma juntthapitäñapawa aynachat amsta nayrïr anillcama. Uca quipca lurataraquïñapawa esquinanacataquejja paypach tablajja.
Exodus26:25 Uqhamasti quimsakallko tablanacäniwa
Exodus26:26 “Ucjjarusti pheska morok'o acacia sat lawata waquicharaquïta maysa thiya carpa tablanacataqui.
Exodus26:27 Uqhamarac maysa thiya tablanacataquisti pheska morok'o lawanacaraqui
Exodus26:28 Ucampis chicachicanccani uca morok'o lawasti tablanaca chicachica taypwa pasañapa maysa thiyata kalltasa maysa thiyacama.
Exodus26:29 Ucjjarusti tablanacarojj korimpiw patatjja lip'suyäta
Exodus26:30 Uqhamasti uca Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpjja cunjämtejj kollunjja uñacht'aycsma ucar uñtatwa luräta.
Exodus26:31 “Ucjjarusti luraraquïtawa mä velo azul telata
Exodus26:32 Ucatsti acacia sat lawat lurat pusi postenacaru warct'am
Exodus26:33 Uqhamasti uca veljja ganchonacampiw warct'äta
Exodus26:34 Arcjja kollanansa kollanapa sat chekaruw uchäta tapampi khopjjatasina.
Exodus26:35 Ucampis mesjja velota ankäjjaruw uchäta
Exodus26:36 “Uqhamarac Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpa puncu jist'antañataquisti mä cortina luraraquïta
Exodus26:37 Ucjjarusti cortinataquejj luraraquim pheska postenaca acacia sat lawata
Exodus27:1 “Mä altara acacia sat maderat luraraquim
Exodus27:2 Uca altaran esquinanacapataquisti pusi wajjranaca luraraquïta
Exodus27:3 Uca altarataquisti yänacjja broncetcamacwa luraraquïta
Exodus27:4 Ucjjarusti mä rejilla bronceta luraraquïta
Exodus27:5 Ucatsti uca rejilljja uchätawa altar thiya aynacharu
Exodus27:6 Ucjjarusti luraraquïtawa pä morok'o lawanaca ucampi callañataqui acacia sat lawata
Exodus27:7 Ucatsti uca morok'o lawanacsti argollanaca taypi pasayapjjäta
Exodus27:8 Uqhamasti uca altarjja p'iywa luräta lawata
Exodus27:9 “Ucjjarusti Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpataquejj mä patio luraraquïta. Uca patio aynach tokerusti lino c'anthitata lurat cortinanïñapawa
Exodus27:10 Ucampis pä tunca postenacasa
Exodus27:11 Uca quipcaraqui amsta tokerusti cortinanïñaparaquiwa largorojj pusi tunca pheskan metro
Exodus27:12 Inti jalanta tokerusti cortinanïñaparaquiwa
Exodus27:13 Uqhamarac inti jalsu tokerusti patiopajj cortinanïñaparaquiwa anchorusti pä tunca payan metro chicatani.
Exodus27:14 Mantañ maysa thiya tokerusti pakallko metro cortinanïñapawa
Exodus27:15 Uca quipcaraqui maysa thiyasti pakallko metro cortinanïñaparaquiwa quimsa posteni
Exodus27:16 Uqhamarac patioru mantañäqui ucqhasti llätunca metro cortinanïñaparaquiwa lino sat hilo c'anthitat lurat azul telata
Exodus27:17 Ucampis patio ladonacancqui uca postenacasti kollket lurata anillonacanïñapawa
Exodus27:18 Patiojja largorojj pusi tunca pheskan metronïñapawa
Exodus27:19 Ucampis uca carpanjja cuna yänacatejj munasqui apnakañataqui ucanacajja broncet luratäñapawa
Exodus27:20 “Ucjjarusti jumajj saraquim israelitanacarojja jupanacajj aceite oliva apanipjjañapataqui sapüru nina naqhayañataqui.
Exodus27:21 Ucampis Aaronampi
Exodus28:1 “Israelitanac taypitsti
Exodus28:2 Aarón jilamataquejja suma isinaca lurayaraquim
Exodus28:3 Jumasti parlam yatiñani ch'iqhi
Exodus28:4 Aqham isinacwa lurapjjañapajja: Pectoral sata nayräjja pechotaqui lurata
Exodus28:5 Uqhamasti isi luririnacajja lurapjjañapawa korita
Exodus28:6 “Efod sat jan mangasan jach'a camisasti luratäñapawa korita
Exodus28:7 Aca isisti purap thiyaru catuñanïñapawa suma ch'ucthapita.
Exodus28:8 Efod sat isi patjjanccani uca cinturonasti korimpi suma bordatäñapawa
Exodus28:9 “Uqhamarac ónice sat pä suma wila kalanac catum
Exodus28:10 uca sutinacapsti uchätawa cunjämarjamatejj nacipqui uqhamarjama. Nayrïr sojjta sutsti mä kalaru
Exodus28:11 Mä joyeruwa uca kalanacarojja sutinacjja lurañapajja
Exodus28:12 Ucatsti uca kalanacjja uchätawa efod sat jach'a camisa callachi pataru
Exodus28:13 Uca kalanac apañsti koritcamaqui luräta.
Exodus28:14 Ucjjarusti luraraquïtawa mä cadena
Exodus28:15 “Luraraquïtawa pectoral sat isi asqui uñjañ yänacani cunjämtejj efod sat isi lurctajja uqhama
Exodus28:16 Ucasti doblëñapawa
Exodus28:17 Ucatsti suma kalanacampiw patatjja ucharaquïta uca kalanacsti pusi filanacwa uchäta. Nayrïr filasti aqham kalanacanïñapawa: crisólito
Exodus28:18 payïri filansti granate
Exodus28:19 Quimsïri filasti aqham kalanacaniraquïñapawa: jacinto
Exodus28:20 pusïri filansti topacio
Exodus28:21 Aca kalanacasti tunca payanïñapawa
Exodus28:22 “Ucjjarusti luraraquïtawa pectoral sat isitaquejja korit lurat cadenanaca
Exodus28:23 Uqhamarac luraraquïtawa korita pä argollanaca
Exodus28:24 Korit lurat cadenanacampiwa uca pectoral sat isi thiyancqui uca argollanacatjja chinuntäta.
Exodus28:25 Paypacha cordonan paya puntanacapsti uchätawa efod sat isina nayräjja purap callachi patjjaru
Exodus28:26 Ucjjarusti pä argollanacaraqui korita luraraquim
Exodus28:27 Uqhamarac korita pä argollanaca luraraquim
Exodus28:28 Ucatsti pectoral sat isin argollapsti efod sat isin argollapampjja mä azul cordonampiw chhitthapïta
Exodus28:29 Uqhamatwa Aaronajj cunapachatejj kollana sat chekaru mantcani pectoral sat isis ucht'ata asqui uñjañ yänaca apt'ata ucqhajja pechoparu Israelan wawanacapana sutinacapa apañapataqui Tatitun nayrakatapanjja
Exodus28:30 Ucatsti pectoral sat isi patjjarusti ucharaquïtawa Urim
Exodus28:31 “Luraraquïtawa azul telatjja mä jach'a capa efod sat isitaqui
Exodus28:32 ucasti chicachicarojj p'iyjatäñapawa p'eke waysuñataqui. Uca p'iya thiyanacasti suma doblantatäñapawa
Exodus28:33 Uca capa thiyanacarusti suma c'achachata mä granadar uñtata azul telampi
Exodus28:34 Mä korit lurat campanilla uchäta ucjjarusti mä granada
Exodus28:35 Uqhamasti Aaronajj sacerdoten lurañanacapa lurañataquejja uca capjja ucht'asiwayañapapuniwa
Exodus28:36 “Ucjjarusti korit mä placa luraraquim
Exodus28:37 Uca placjja ucham turbante sat p'ekeru uchasiñatac luratäqui uca nayräjjaru
Exodus28:38 Uqhamata uca placajja Aaronan nayräjja parapancañapataqui. Ucampis Aaronajj cunapachatejj ofrenda loktcani ucqhajja apaniwa israelitanacajja asqui lurañanacana jucha lurapjjatanacapata
Exodus28:39 “Ucjjarusti luraraquim túnica sat mä jach'a isi lino sat hilota suma bordata
Exodus28:40 Uqhamarac Aaronan wawanacapataquisti luraraquïtawa túnica sat isinaca
Exodus28:41 “Uca isinacampiw isintayäta Aarón jilamaru
Exodus28:42 Ucjjarusti lurarapiraquïtawa calzoncillonaca lino sat hilota
Exodus28:43 Uca calzoncillo ucht'ataw Aaronampi
Exodus29:1 “Jupanacajj nayan sacerdotenacajjäpjjañapataqui loktañataquisti aqhama lurañamawa: Mä vaca kallu apäta
Exodus29:2 Ucjjarusti luraraquim suma trigo jac'uta jan levaduran t'ant'a
Exodus29:3 Ucat uca t'ant'anacjja mä canastaruw uchawayäta
Exodus29:4 Uqhamarac Aaronampiru
Exodus29:5 Sacerdote isinacampiw Aaronarojj isthapiyäta
Exodus29:6 Ucjjarusti p'ekerojj turbante sata ucharaquïta
Exodus29:7 Loktañ aceite aptasinjja
Exodus29:8 Uqhamarac wawanacaparu irpcatasinjja túnica sat isinacampiraquiw isthapiyaraquïta.
Exodus29:9 Aaronampiru
Exodus29:10 “Ucjjarusti vaca kallu aparaquim Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpa nayrakataru

Exodus29:14 Ucampis vaca kallun aychapsa

Exodus29:17 Ucjjarusti jisc'a jisc'a qharinokasinjja altar patjjaruw apjjatäta
Exodus29:18 Ucatsti uca ovej-jja altar patjjaru naqhantayasinwa Tatitur jach'añchasa loktäta
Exodus29:19 “Ucjjarusti maynïri ovejraqui caturaquïta

Exodus29:22 “Ucjjarusti apsuraquim ovejan liq'inacapa
Exodus29:23 Ucjjarusti Tatitun nayrakatapancqui uca jan levaduran t'ant'anacata mä muyu t'ant'a
Exodus29:24 ucanacasti Aaronana
Exodus29:25 Ucatsti amparanacapata apakasinsti altararu naqhantayam
Exodus29:26 “Ucjjarusti Aaronar loktañataquisti ovejana pechopa apakawayasinjja Tatitur loktiri saram. Ucatsti uca chekajja jumataquïniwa.

Exodus29:28 Ucasti Aaronataqui
Exodus29:29 “Aaronana Tatitur loktat isinacapasti
Exodus29:30 Aarón khepatsti cawquïr wawanacapan wawanacapay sacerdotëchini ucajja kollan chekaru sacrificio loktir mantañataquejja pakallko uruwa uca sacerdote isjja uchasiñapajja.
Exodus29:31 “Ucjjarusti loktañataquïqui uca orko ovejan aychanacapsti kollan chekanwa phayäta.
Exodus29:32 Aaronampi
Exodus29:33 Jupanacasti ucanacjja mank'apjjañapawa jupanacan juchanacapajj perdonatäñapataqui loktatätap laycu
Exodus29:34 Khepärmanthisti jilt'qui uca ovejan aychapasa
Exodus29:35 “Uqhamasti cunjämtejj nayajj take siscsma uqhamarjama Aaronampi
Exodus29:36 Ucjjarusti sapüruraquiw mä vaca kallu sacrificio loktaraquïta juchanacat perdonatäñapataqui. Uqhamarac altarsa k'omacharaquim juchanacata sacrificio loktasina
Exodus29:37 Juchanacatsti pakallko uruwa altaranjja sacrificio loktäta
Exodus29:38 “Sapüruwa jan armt'asisa altaranjja mä marani pä orko ovejanaca loktäta.
Exodus29:39 Maya ovejsti alwanacaw loktäta
Exodus29:40 Nayrïr ovejampi chicsti loktätawa
Exodus29:41 Uca quipcaraquiqui jayp'u horasarojja maynïr ovej-jja loktaraquiquïta jac'u
Exodus29:42 Aqhama ofrendanaca nayaru jach'añchasa naqhayañataquejja awquita
Exodus29:43 Uqhamarac uca chekanwa nayajj israelitanacampi jiquisëjja
Exodus29:44 Ucampis nayajja k'omachäwa Jiquisiñ Carparojja

Exodus29:46 Uqhamatwa jupanacajj yatipjjani naya Tatitu Diosajj jupanacana Diosapätajja
Exodus30:1 “Luraraquim mä altara acacia sat maderata incienso nact'ayasin loktañataqui.
Exodus30:2 Uca altarasti cajonäñapawa largorojja pusi tunca pheskan centimetroni
Exodus30:3 Uca altar amsta patarusa
Exodus30:4 Ucjjarusti ucharaquïtawa argollanaca sapa thiyanaca mankheru
Exodus30:5 Uca altar callañataquisti acacia sat lawanacataraqui waquicharaquim jach'anaca
Exodus30:6 Uca altarjja uchätawa sumar mantäwi arca imt'qui uca velo nayräjjaru
Exodus30:7 Aaronasti sapärmanthi alwata mantcani mechanac waquichiri ucqhajja
Exodus30:8 Uqhamarac jayp'u horasarusti cunapachatejj mechanaca nactayir sarcani ucqhajja inciensjja nact'ayañaparaquiquiwa. Ucsti lurapjjañanacamawa Tatitun nayrakatapanjja wiñayan wiñayapa.
Exodus30:9 Uca altar patjjarusti janipuniw yakha casta incienso
Exodus30:10 Aca altarasti Tatitur loktatäniwa
Exodus30:11 Tatitusti Moisesaruw parläna:
Exodus30:12 “Cunapachatejj israelitanacar jact'cäta ucqhajja
Exodus30:13 Take qhitinacatejj jact'atäcani ucanacawa Tatiturojj churapjjañapajja pheska gramo kollke
Exodus30:14 Qhitinacatejj pä tunca maranit amstaru jact'atäpcani ucanacajja takeniw Tatiturojj cunatejj jacañapat churañäqui uca churapjjañapajja.
Exodus30:15 Cunapachatejj sapa mayni jakejj Tatituru jacañapat churapcani ucqhajja
Exodus30:16 Jumasti israelitanacatjja sapa mayni jakejj jacañapat kollkenaca apanipcani uca apthapisasti
Exodus30:17 Diosasti
Exodus30:18 “Mä tinaja bronceta jarisiñataqui luram; ucatsti uca tinaj-jja umampi phokt'asawa uchäta tantachasiñäquis ucata
Exodus30:19 Ucatwa Aaronampi
Exodus30:20 Jupanacasti jarisipjjañapawa Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carparu mantañataquejja
Exodus30:21 Uqhamasti jan jiwañapataquejja jarisiñapawa amparanacsa
Exodus30:22 Tatitusti Moisesar parlasinjja sänwa:
Exodus30:23 “Jumasti ajllim suma k'apquir kokanaca
Exodus30:24 Mä sojjta kilo casia sat koka
Exodus30:25 Take ucanacatwa aceitjja luräta loktañataqui
Exodus30:26 Ucatsti uca aceitempiwa loktäta Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpjja
Exodus30:27 Uqhamaraqui cuna mesatejj utjqui ucsa take yänacapampi
Exodus30:28 sacrificio naqhayañ altarsa take yänacampi
Exodus30:29 Take ucanacwa uca aceitempi warjjatt'asina Tatitur loktäta
Exodus30:30 “Uqhamaraquiw uca aceitempejj warjjataraquïta Aaronaru
Exodus30:31 Ucatsti israelitanacarojj aqham sätawa: ‘Wiñayaw aca aceitejj kollanäni loktañataqui.
Exodus30:32 Janipuniw jumanacajj aca aceitempejj qhiti jakerus warjjatapjjaquïtati
Exodus30:33 Ucampis qhititejj aca aceite quipcaqui lurcani yakha aceite
Exodus30:34 Tatitusti Moisesarojj sänwa: “Jumasti apthapim ucqhapura acanacata: kokanacat ch'akqui uca resina
Exodus30:35 take ucanacata waquicht'am suma kollan incienso jayun cuna. Ucanacsti suma pitthapïta cunjämtejj mä perfume lurirejj lurqui uqhama.
Exodus30:36 Mä chicatsti suma ñut'u q'iyjasinjja arca nayrakataruw uchäta Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpa mankhana
Exodus30:37 Cawquïr incienstejj waquichäta uca quipca inciensjja janiw yakha qhitis waquichañapäquiti. Aca inciensojj Tatitunquiwa
Exodus30:38 Ucampis qhititejj yakha incienso waquichcani k'aphichasiñataqui ucajja jumanac taypinjja jiwayatäñapawa.”
Exodus31:1 Tatitusti Moisesarojj aqham sänwa:
Exodus31:2 “Nayasti Judá tributjja ajlltwa Bazaleel sat
Exodus31:3 Ucatsti nayajj juparojj Diosan Ajayupampiw phokt'ta
Exodus31:4 suma amuyt'asa cunayman yänaca korita
Exodus31:5 uqhamarac suma kalanac lurasajja
Exodus31:6 Nayasti juparojj uchtwa Ahisamac sat chachan Aholiab sat yokapan yanapiripata
Exodus31:7 Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpa tantachasiñataqui
Exodus31:8 uqhamarac lurañapataqui mesjja yänacapampi
Exodus31:9 sacrificio nact'ayas loktañ altara yänacapampi
Exodus31:10 uca quipcaraqui Aaronataquisa suma sacerdote isinacaracwa lurapjjañaparaqui
Exodus31:11 Ucatsti loktañataqui aceite
Exodus31:12 Tatitusti Moisesaru parlasinjja sänwa:
Exodus31:13 “Jumasti israelitanacarojj aqham sasa yatiyam: ‘Jumanacasti nayan samarañ urunacajj-jja imapjjätawa
Exodus31:14 Samarañ urusti jumanacataquejj wali kollanawa

Exodus38:9 Ucjjarusti Bezaleel chachajj luraraquïnwa Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpan patiopa. Patio aynach toke cortinasti pusi tunca pheskan metronïnwa lino sat hilo c'anthitat lurata.
Exodus38:10 Uca quipcaraqui pä tunca poste lawanaca luraraquïna
Exodus38:11 Amsta tokerusti cortinaniraquïnwa pusi tunca pheskan metroni
Exodus38:12 Ucjjarojj inti jalanta toketaquejj cortinjja luraraquïnwa pä tunca payani metro chicatani
Exodus38:13 Inti jalsu toketaquisti cortinjja lurapjjaraquïnwa pä tunca payan metro chicatani.
Exodus38:14 Puncut maysa thiyataquisti cortinajj pakallko metronïnwa quimsa poste lawanacani
Exodus38:15 Uqhamarac patior mantañ puncut maysa thiyataquisti cortinjja lurapjjaraquïnwa pakallko metroni quimsa poste lawanacampi
Exodus38:16 Ucampis patio thiyanacaru muyuntayatäqui uca cortinanacajja lino sat hilonaca c'anthitat luratänwa.
Exodus38:17 Poste lawanacan tacnokañanacapasti broncet luratänwa
Exodus38:18 Patio puncutaquisti cortinjja lurapjjänwa suma bordata azul telata
Exodus38:19 Uca puncutaquisti lurapjjaraquïnwa pusi poste lawanaca
Exodus38:20 Uqhamaraqui uca Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpan ch'acurunacapasa
Exodus38:21 Moisesana aruparusti
Exodus38:22 Ucampis Uri satan yokapa
Exodus38:23 Jupan yanapiripasti Ahisamac sat chachan Aholiab yokapänwa Dan sat tributa
Exodus38:24 Uca carpataqui cunanacatejj munasqui ucanac lurañataquisti korejja Tatiturojj churatänwa llätunca pataca sojjta tunca pheskan kilo quimsa tunca gramoni
Exodus38:25 Uqhamarac kollkesti jact'ata jakenacat apthapitajj quimsa waranka quimsa patac tunca llätuncani kilo pheska pataca pä tunca pheskani gramonïnwa
Exodus38:26 Pä tunca maranit amstaru take jaqhuta jakenacasti sojjta pataca quimsan waranca pheska pataca pheska tuncanïnwa
Exodus38:27 Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpa postenaca tacnokañanacapataquisti
Exodus38:28 Uqhamarac cuna kollktejj israelitanacajj apthapipcäna ucanacatsti Bezaleel chachajj posten ganchonacapwa luräna
Exodus38:29 Tatitutaqui carpa lurañataqui apanipcäna uca broncejja pä waranka quimsa pataca quimsa tunca sojjtani kilo
Exodus38:30 Uca apthapit broncetwa lurapjjäna utt'ayañanaca Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpan puncupataqui
Exodus38:31 uca quipcaraqui patiotaqui utt'ayañanacasa
Exodus39:1 Sacerdotena Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpana lurañanacapa phokhañapataquisti isjja lurapjjänwa azul telata
Exodus39:2 Efod sat isisti korita
Exodus39:3 Ucjjarusti placanacaracwa korita martillonacampi lek'suta lurapjjaraquïna
Exodus39:4 Efod sat isisti
Exodus39:5 Ucjjarusti luraraquïnwa mä cinturona efod sat isi chinthapiñataqui
Exodus39:6 Uqhamarac ónice sat kalanac lurasinsti kori patjjaruw catjjaruyäna
Exodus39:7 Ucjjarusti Bezaleel chachajj efod sat isin callachipa patjjaruw ucharaquïna
Exodus39:8 Ucjjarusti pectoral sataracwa lurapjjaraquïna suma bordata efod sat isjama korita
Exodus39:9 Aca pectoralasti paya ekthapitänwa
Exodus39:10 Uca patjjarusti uchapjjaraquïnwa pusi seke suma kalanacampi. Nayrïr sekensti aca kalanacänwa: mä crisólito
Exodus39:11 payïr sekensti: mä granate
Exodus39:12 Quimsïr sekensti: mä jacinto
Exodus39:13 Pusïr sekensti: mä topacio
Exodus39:14 Kalanacasti tunca payanïnwa
Exodus39:15 Ucjjarusti pectoral sat isi patjjarojja kori cadenanacampiw catjjaruyapjjaraquïna t'ullct'ata cordonäcaspas uqhama.
Exodus39:16 Uqhamarac lurapjjaraquïnwa korita pä catjjaruyañanaca
Exodus39:17 Ucjjarusti paypach argollanacatwa korit lurat cadenanacjja catjjaruyapjjaraquïna;
Exodus39:18 paypacha cadenanacan tucuyanacapsti catjjaruyapjjaraquïnwa
Exodus39:19 Ucjjarusti lurapjjaraquïnwa yakha pä argollanaca korita
Exodus39:20 Ucampis pä argollanacampwa korit lurapjjäna ucsti uchapjjänwa efod sat isin nayräjja catjjaruyañaparu
Exodus39:21 Ucatsti pectoral satan argollapampita uqhamarac efod satan argollapampitjja mä morado cordonampiw chinthapipjjäna
Exodus39:22 Efod sat jach'a capa issti lurapjjaraquïnwa morado hilot sawuta telata.
Exodus39:23 Uca capan cuello thiyanacapasti suma q'illpt'asa ch'ucuratänwa suelat lurat chalecjama
Exodus39:24 Uca capa isi thiyanacarusti bordaquipapjjänwa granadjama morok'onaca azul telanacampi
Exodus39:25 Ucjjarusti lurapjjaraquïnwa campanillanaca koritcamaqui. Ucsti uchapjjänwa granadjama morok'onac luratanacampi mayquipa takpacha capa isi thiyanacaru
Exodus39:26 Ucanacsti aqhamwa uchapjjäna: mä campanilla
Exodus39:27 Ucjjarusti lurapjjaraquïnwa túnica sat isinaca lino sat suma hilonacata Aaronataqui uqhamarac wawanacapataquisa mä suma p'itirin p'itata.
Exodus39:28 Uca quipcaraqui turbante
Exodus39:29 Uqhamarac cinturonsa lino sat hilo c'anthita azul telata
Exodus39:30 Ucjjarusti lurapjjaraquïnwa mä placa koritcamaqui
Exodus39:31 Ucjjarusti mä morado cordonwa uchapjjäna uca placa catuyañataqui
Exodus39:32 Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpa lurañasti tucuyatäjjänwa. Israelitanacasti take cunanacsa suma phokhata lurapjjäna cunjämtejj Tatitojj Moisesar siscäna uqhamarjama.
Exodus39:33 Jupanacasti tucuyasinjja Moisesaruw catuyjjapjjäna Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpjja take yänacapampi
Exodus39:34 uqhamarac utachañataquisti oveja lip'ichinacjja wilaruw teñipjjäna
Exodus39:35 arcsa
Exodus39:36 Mesjja take yänacapampi
Exodus39:37 Candeleronacsti koritcamaqui lurapjjäna
Exodus39:38 Ucjjarusti lurapjjaraquïnwa altarjja koritcamaqui aceite loktañataqui
Exodus39:39 Uqhamarac lurapjjaraquïnwa mä altara bronceta rejillanacapsa broncetaraqui
Exodus39:40 Lurapjjaraquïnwa patiotaqui cortinanaca
Exodus39:41 Carpan lurañanaca phokhañataquisti isjja lurapjjänwa
Exodus39:42 Israelitanacasti take cunanacsa lurapjjänwa cunjämtejj Tatitojj Moisesar luram siscäna uqhamarjama.
Exodus39:43 Ucampis cunjämtejj Tatitojj siscäna uqhamarjama lurapjjatanacapa uñjasinsti Moisesajj jupanacarojj bendicïnwa.
Exodus40:1 Tatitusti aqham sasaw Moisesarojj parläna:
Exodus40:2 “Nayrïri phajjsi kallta urunjja sayt'ayätawa nayampi Jiquisiñ Carpa
Exodus40:3 Uca mankherusti uchätawa arca
Exodus40:4 Mankhëjjarojj ucharaquïtawa mesa suma asquicht'asa cunanacatejj mesaru uchañajj waquisqui ucanacsa
Exodus40:5 Uqhamarac korita lurat altarsa ucharaquïtawa inciensotaqui arca uchatäqui uca nayrakataru
Exodus40:6 Ucjjarusti ucharaquim sacrificionac nact'ayas loktaña altarjja
Exodus40:7 Ucatsti ucharaquim jarisiñatac mä tinaja ucsti uchätawa Diosampi jiquisiña chekata sacrificio loktañ altarampi chicachica taypiru
Exodus40:8 Ucjjarusti patiorojj cortinampiw muyuquipayaraquïta
Exodus40:9 “Ucjjarojj loktaña aceitempiw uca carpar ch'allsüta
Exodus40:10 Uqhamarac loktaña aceitempejja ch'allsuraquïtawa sacrificio nact'ayas loktaña altararu take yänacapamppacharu
Exodus40:11 Uca quipcaraqui uma uchaña tinajarusa
Exodus40:12 “Ucjjarusti irparaquïtawa Aaronaru
Exodus40:13 Ucatsti Aaronarojj sacerdote isimpiw isintayäta
Exodus40:14 Ucjjarusti wawanacaparuraquiw jawsäta
Exodus40:15 Ucatsti aceitempiw jupanacar warjjataraquïta cunjämtejj Aarón awquipar lurctajj uqhama
Exodus40:16 Moisesajj take cunwa cunjämtejj Tatitojj jupar siscäna uqhamarjama luräna.
Exodus40:17 Uqhamasti Egiptota mistunjjatatsti
Exodus40:18 Moisesajj uca carpa sayt'ayañwa kalltäna nayrakatajj uchänwa poste tacnokañanaca
Exodus40:19 Ucatjja carparojj yapjjataraquïnwa Tatitumpi jiquisiñataquïqui
Exodus40:20 Ucampis Moisesajj Diosan tunca camachi arunacapanïqui uca tablanacsti arca mankheruw apantäna. Ucjjarusti arcarojj morok'o lawanacwa ucharaquïna callañataqui
Exodus40:21 Ucatsti uca carpa mankheruw arcjja uchäna
Exodus40:22 Ucjjarusti mesjja ucharaquïnwa Tatitumpi Jiquisiña Carpa mankheru
Exodus40:23 Mesa patjjarojja t'ant'anac sum uchäna Tatitun nayrakataparu
Exodus40:24 Ucjjarusti ucharaquïnwa candelero Tatitumpi Jiquisiña Carpa mankheru
Exodus40:25 Ucatsti lamparanacarojja ninjja naqharayänwa Tatitun nayrakatapanjja cunjämtejj Tatitojj Moisesar siscäna uqhamarjama.
Exodus40:26 Uqhamarac ucharaquïnwa korit lurat altara Tatitumpi Jiquisiña Carpa mankheru
Exodus40:27 Uca altarjjarusti suma k'apquir incienso nact'ayäna cunjämtejj Tatitojj siscäna uqhamarjama.
Exodus40:28 Ucjjarusti Moisesajj warccataraquïnwa cortinjja carpa puncu mantañaru.
Exodus40:29 Ucjjarusti sacrificio nact'ayas loktaña altarwa ucharaquïna Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpa mantaña puncu nayrakataru
Exodus40:30 Ucjjarusti ucharaquïnwa mä tinaja uma uchañataqui
Exodus40:31 Ucatwa Moisesampi
Exodus40:32 Jupanacasti uqhamjja jarisipjjänwa Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carparu mantañataqui
Exodus40:33 Ucjjarusti Moisesajj patio sayt'ayaraquïna kollan chekaru
Exodus40:34 Mä kenayaw Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpa patjjarojj urpjjatäna
Exodus40:35 Ucampis Moisesajj tantachasiña chekarojj janiw mantaña puedcänti
Exodus40:36 Ucampis sapa cuti uca kenayajj uca carpa patjjata chhaktjjäna ucqhasti israelitanacajja carpa utanacapa apthapisiwayasinjja sarantasipcaquïnwa saräwinacapjja.
Exodus40:37 Ucampis janitejj kenayajj uca carpa patjjata chhaktcäna ucqhajja
Exodus40:38 Israelitanacana take saräwinacapansti
Leviticus1:1 Tatitojj Moisesaruw jawsäna Diosamp Jiquisiñ Carpatpacha
Leviticus1:2 “Israelitanacampi parlam
Leviticus1:3 “Naqhantayañatac loktat uywatejj orko vacänejja ucasti suma c'umaräñapawa. Catokatäñataquejja
Leviticus1:4 Amparampi uca uywan p'ekepjjaru lokjjatasa
Leviticus1:5 Orko vacsti Tatitun nayrakatapana qharinucuni; ucjjarusti Aaronan yokanacapa sacerdotenacaw wiljja loktapjjani
Leviticus1:6 Ucatsti uca uywatjja lip'ichi qharsusajja aychapjja qharinucjjaraquiniwa
Leviticus1:7 sacerdotenacasti altarjjaru nina aktayasajj
Leviticus1:8 ucjjaru uca qharinokat aychsa
Leviticus1:9 Qhititejj loktcani ucasti uca uywan jiphillanacapsa
Leviticus1:10 “Naqhantañatac loktat uywatejj mä ovej tamata jan ucajj cabra tamata churatäcani ucajj suma c'umara orköñapawa
Leviticus1:11 ucasti qharinucutäñaparaquiwa altarat amstäjjana
Leviticus1:12 ucatsti uywan aychapjja qharinokapjjaraquiniwa
Leviticus1:13 Ucatsti qhititejj loktqui ucajj uca uywan jiphillanacapsa
Leviticus1:14 “Naqhantayañatac Tatitur loktäwitejj mä jamach'ïnejja
Leviticus1:15 Sacerdotew loktani uca palomjja altarana
Leviticus1:16 Ucatsti cutupjja phusnumppacha liwtjjaniwa altarat inti jalsu tokeru
Leviticus1:17 Ucjjarusti uca palomjja payaru ch'iyjañapawa chhekhanacat catt'asa
Leviticus2:1 “Cunapachatejj maynejj Tatituru granonacat waquichata mä ofrenda loktäwi apanini ucqhajj
Leviticus2:2 Ucsti Aaronan sacerdote yokanacaparuw aparaquini
Leviticus2:3 Uca ofrenda jilt'asti Aaronampitaqui
Leviticus2:4 “Cunapachatejj grano achunacat mä ofrenda hornon khatita churäta ucqhajj suma jac'uta aceitempi cuna chaptata jan levaduran tortanaca churäta
Leviticus2:5 “Ofrendamatejj grano achunacat sartenaru khatiyatächejja
Leviticus2:6 jisc'a jisc'a pachinokasajj aceitempiraquiw waraquipäta grano achunacat ofrendätap laycu.
Leviticus2:7 “Ofrendamatejj grano achunacat tapa phuqhur khatiyatänejja suma jac'ut aceitempi luratäñapawa.
Leviticus2:8 Ucanacampi ofrenda waquicht'jjasasti
Leviticus2:9 Ucanwa sacerdotejj ofrendat mä juc'a aptasajj altarjjana nact'ayjjani
Leviticus2:10 Uca ofrenda jilt'asti Aaronampitaqui
Leviticus2:11 “Janipun jumanacajj levadurjja uchapjjamti Tatitur loktañatac grano achunacat waquichat ofrendarojja. Janipuni cuna casta levaduranacsa uscupjjamti
Leviticus2:12 Nayrakat achunactejj Tatitur ofrenda churañäquis uqhamjja
Leviticus2:13 “Take granonacat waquichat ofrendamarojj jayuñchapunïtawa
Leviticus2:14 “Tatiturutejj nayrakat grano achunacat waquichata mä ofrenda loktätajja
Leviticus2:15 Ucjjarusti aceitempi
Leviticus2:16 Ucatsti sacerdotew naqhantayanejja mä juc'a grano ch'ajjert'atjja
Leviticus3:1 “Qhititejj uywanacapata mä kachu vaca jan ucajj mä orko vacsa Tatituru sumancthapiñatac loktcani ucasti suma c'umara uywäñapawa.
Leviticus3:2 Qhititejj ofrenda loktcani ucajj
Leviticus3:3 “Qhititejj sumancthapiñatac uywa loktcani ucajj Tatitur loktañapawa
Leviticus3:4 maymurunacsti liq'imppacha
Leviticus3:5 Sacerdotenacasti uca liq'inacjja altarjjaruw naqhantayjjani
Leviticus3:6 “Qhititejj sumancthapiyañatac mä oveja loktani ucasti
Leviticus3:7 Uca loktäwitejj mä ovejänejja
Leviticus3:8 ucatsti amparapjja uca uywan p'ekepjjaruw lokjjatani
Leviticus3:9 “Qhititejj sumancthapiñatac mä oveja Tatitur loktcani ucasti naqhantat ofrendjama loktañapawa
Leviticus3:10 maymurunacsti liq'imppacha
Leviticus3:11 Ucatsti
Leviticus3:12 “Uca loktäwitejj mä cabränejja Tatitur loktañapawa
Leviticus3:13 ucatsti amparapjja uca uywan p'ekepjjaruw lokjjatani
Leviticus3:14 “Qhititejj uywa loktcani ucajj naqhantat ofrendata Tatitur loktañapawa
Leviticus3:15 maymurunacsti liq'inacapamppacha
Leviticus3:16 Ucatsti
Leviticus3:17 “Aca leyisti wiñayataquiwa
Leviticus4:1 Tatitojj Moisesaruw parläna aqham sasa:
Leviticus4:2 “Israelitanacarusti saraquim: Maynitejj jan amuyasisina Tatitun arunacap contra juch lurani cunatejj jan waquisqui ucanac lurasa
Leviticus4:3 “Jucha lurirïqui ucatejj jilïr sacerdotënejja
Leviticus4:4 Tatitun nayrakataparuw apani Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpar mantañäquis ucqharu; ucanwa amparapa uywan p'ekepjjaru lokjjatani
Leviticus4:5 Ucatsti jupa quipcaw vaca kallun mä juc'a wilap catusina Tatitump Jiquisiñ Carpar aparaquini
Leviticus4:6 ucanwa luc'anapa wilaru juricht'asajja
Leviticus4:7 Sacerdotesti mä juc'a wila aptasin k'apquiri incienso uchañäquis uca altaran esquina wajjranacaparuw jawirt'araquini
Leviticus4:8 Ucatsti juchat loktatäquis uca vaca kallutjja takpach liq'inacapa apsuñaparaquiwa
Leviticus4:9 maymurunacsti liq'imppacha
Leviticus4:10 cunjämatejj sumancthapiñ ofrendat loktat orko vacatjja apsutäquejj uqhamaraqui. Ucatsti
Leviticus4:11 Vaca kallun lip'ichipjja
Leviticus4:12 jan ucajj maypach orko vaca
Leviticus4:13 “Take israelit jakenacatejj jan amuyascasina cuna jan walsa lurapjjanejja
Leviticus4:14 cunapachatejj uca jucha luratajj yatisjjani ucapachaw takeni juchapata mä orko vaca sacrificiot loktapjjani. Tatitump Jiquisiñ Carpa nayrakataruw apapjjani
Leviticus4:15 cawqhantejj take jilïri jakenacajj uca orko vacan p'ekepjjaru amparanacap lokjjatapjjani Tatitun nayrakatapana
Leviticus4:16 Ucjjarusti jilïri sacerdoteraquiw uca orko vacan mä juc'a wilapa Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carparu aparaquini
Leviticus4:17 luc'anapa wilaru juricht'asajja
Leviticus4:18 Ucanwa mä juc'a wilampi Tatitun nayrakatapancqui uca altaran esquina wajjranacaparu jawt'araquini Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpana. Ucat takpach wila jilt'sti Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpar mantañäquis ucqhancqui uca ofrenda loktaña altaran cayuparuw wartanjjaraquini.
Leviticus4:19 Uqhamaraquiw uca orko vacatjja takpach liq'inaca apsjjaraquini
Leviticus4:20 jan ucajj uca orko vacampejj cunjämatejj juchat sacrificio mä yakha orko vaca loktapcänjja uca quipcaraquiw loktañapa
Leviticus4:21 Ucatsti uca orko vacajj
Leviticus4:22 “Mä jilïritejj jan amuyascasina Tatitu Diosan arunacap contra jucha luranejja
Leviticus4:23 Cunapachatejj uca jucha luratapa amuyasjjani ucapachasti mä c'umara orko cabrito ofrendat apjjaraquini.
Leviticus4:24 Uca cabriton p'ekepjjaru amparap lokjjatasaw qharinucjjaraquini Tatitun nayrakatapana
Leviticus4:25 Ucjjarusti sacerdotejj juchat sacrificio loktat cabriton mä juc'a wilamp luc'anaparu juricht'asajj
Leviticus4:26 Liq'sti takpachwa altarjjaru naqhantayjjaraquini
Leviticus4:27 “Mä pobre jaketejj jan amuyascasina Tatitu Diosan arunacap contra jucha luranejja
Leviticus4:28 cunapachatejj jucha luratätapa amuyasjjani ucapachasti mä c'umara kachu cabra ofrendat apjjaraquini.
Leviticus4:29 Uca kachu cabran p'ekepjjaru amparapa lokjjatasawa qharinucjjani
Leviticus4:30 ucatsti sacerdotejj mä juc'a wilamp luc'anap juricht'asajj naqhantatäñatac loktaña altaran esquina wajjranacaparuw jawt'araquini
Leviticus4:31 Uqhamaraquiw takpach liq'jja apsuraquini
Leviticus4:32 “Uca jaketejj mä oveja apaninejja juchapat loktañataqui
Leviticus4:33 amparapjja ovejan p'ekepjjaruw lokjjatani
Leviticus4:34 Ucatsti sacerdotejj loktatäqui uca uywan mä juc'a wilapampi luc'anap juricht'asajj naqhantatäñatac loktaña altaran esquina wajjranacapa jawt'araquini
Leviticus4:35 Ucatsti liq'ejj apakatäñapawa takpacha
Leviticus5:1 “Maynitejj jawsatäni cuntejj uñjqui
Leviticus5:2 “Maynitejj cuna k'añsa llamct'ani
Leviticus5:3 “Maynitejj jaken cuna k'añupsa llamct'anejja
Leviticus5:4 “Maynitejj jan suma amuyt'ascasina juramento luranejja chekäpasa
Leviticus5:5 “Qhititejj aca luräwinacat cawquïritsa juchañchat uñjasinejja
Leviticus5:6 ucatsti jucha luratapatjja mä kachu oveja Tatitur loktani
Leviticus5:7 “Janitejj kollkejj ucacama utjarapcani mä jisc'a oveja alañataquejja
Leviticus5:8 Sacerdoteruw catuyani
Leviticus5:9 Ucat mä juc'a wila ch'allt'araquini cawquïritejj juchat loktatäqui ucata
Leviticus5:10 Payïrimpisti naqhantayatäñatac ofrenda loktjjaraquini
Leviticus5:11 “Ucat janipunitejj kollkejj utjarapcani pä palom
Leviticus5:12 Uca jac'usti sacerdoten ucaruw apataraquïni
Leviticus5:13 uqhamat sacerdotejj cuna casta jucha luratanacatsa uca jaketaquejj pampachasïwi jicjjatañapataqui
Leviticus5:14 Tatitusti Moisesaruw parläna; aqham saraquïnwa:
Leviticus5:15 “Mayni jaketejj jan muncasina jucha luranejja
Leviticus5:16 Uca jakesti cunatejj Tatitur churatäqui ucanaca jan phokcchïna ucapachasti
Leviticus5:17 “Maynitejj Diosan arunacapa contra jucha luranejja
Leviticus5:18 Uqhamasti oveja tamanacapatjja mä c'umara jan camacht'ata orko oveja apaniraquini
Leviticus5:19 Uca loktäwisti yatcasina pantjasïwi jucha luratanacat loktatawa
Leviticus6:1 Tatitojj Moisesaruw parläna; aqham saraquïnwa:
Leviticus6:2 “Cunapachatejj maynejj jucha lurani jan ucajj juchanis uñjasini Tatitun nayrakatapana
Leviticus6:3 jan ucajj mä cuna jicjjatasasa jan arsutapata jan ucasti c'arisitapata
Leviticus6:4 uca jucha luratapatjja juchañchatäniwa; uqhamasti cuntejj lunthatcatayna jan ucajj ch'amampiquis apakcatayna ucanacjja cuttayjjañapawa
Leviticus6:5 jan ucajj mä cunatsa c'ari juramento luratapatsa. Take ucanacjja dueñaparuw cuttayjjañapa
Leviticus6:6 Tatitur loktäwipasti mä c'umara
Leviticus6:7 Ucatsti sacerdotejj take uca juchanaca
Leviticus6:8 Tatitojj Moisesaruw parläna; aqham saraquïnwa:
Leviticus6:9 “Aaronampiru
Leviticus6:10 Sacerdotesti suma lino isinacampiw isthapisini
Leviticus6:11 Ucjjarusti isinacapjja trocsusjjaraquiniwa
Leviticus6:12 “Altaran nacqui uca ninasti janipuniw jiwarañapäquiti. Sacerdotew sapärmanthi alwa lawanacjja uca altarjjaru apjjataraquini
Leviticus6:13 Altaranquir ninasti janipuniw jiwañapäquiti jan ucasti wiñayataquiw akaraquini.
Leviticus6:14 “Aca yatichäwinacasti granonacat ofrenda loktäwinacjjata yatichäwinacaraquiwa: Sacerdotenacasti altar nayräjjanwa loktapjjaraquini.
Leviticus6:15 Jupanacat mayniw uca loktat jac'utjja
Leviticus6:16 Uca ofrendata jilt'irsti Aaronampi
Leviticus6:17 Janiw levadurani phayapjjañapäquiti. Jupanacaruw churjjaracta cuna ofrendanacatejj nact'ayasina nayar loktatäqui ucanacata
Leviticus6:18 Acat kheparusti
Leviticus6:19 Tatitojj Moisesaruw parläna; aqham saraquïnwa:
Leviticus6:20 “Aaronampi sacerdote wawanacapampejja
Leviticus6:21 Uca ofrendsti mä sartenatwa waquicht'anipjjani
Leviticus6:22 Aaronan wawanacapat jutiri
Leviticus6:23 Sacerdotenacan take ofrendanacapasti k'ala naqhantayatapuniraquïniwa
Leviticus6:24 Tatitojj Moisesaruw parläna; aqham saraquïnwa:
Leviticus6:25 “Aaronampiru uqhamaraqui sacerdote wawanacapampirojj
Leviticus6:26 Sacerdotesti jucha luratapata uca sacrificio loktasinsti ucatjja mank'añaparaquiwa
Leviticus6:27 Mä cunasa uca uywan aychapa llamct'anejja
Leviticus6:28 Loktäwinaca churaña aychajj ñek'e phuqhur khatiyatänejja ucasti p'acjatäjjañapawa
Leviticus6:29 “Aca loktäwisti sinti kollanapuniwa. Uca loktäwitsti Aaronan sacerdote wawanacapaquiw mank'ani.
Leviticus6:30 Ucampisa janipuniw mank'atäcaraquiniti
Leviticus7:1 “Yatcasin pantjasïwi jucha luräwinacat loktäwisti sinti kollanawa
Leviticus7:2 Yatcasina pantjasïwi jucha luratanacat loktat uywasti
Leviticus7:3 Uca uywan take liq'inacapasti: cuna liq'itejj wich'inqhan utjqui
Leviticus7:4 paypacha maymuruna
Leviticus7:5 Ucatsti sacerdotejj take ucanacjja altarjjaruw nact'ayjjaraquini
Leviticus7:6 Ucatsti cawquïrinacatejj sacerdotenacan wawanacapäqui uca sacerdotenacaquiw ucatjja mank'apjjaraquini
Leviticus7:7 “Yatcasina pantjasïwi juchat loktäwisti
Leviticus7:8 Uca quipcaraquiwa maynitejj mä uywa loktatäñataqui churani
Leviticus7:9 Uqhamaraquiw granonacata loktäwinacatsti cawquïrinacatejj hornona jan ucajja tapa phoqhuna
Leviticus7:10 Uca quipcaraqui take granonacata ofrenda loktäwisti
Leviticus7:11 “Aca yatichäwinacaw utjaraqui sumancthapiñataqui loktäwinaca churaña toketjja
Leviticus7:12 Uca loktäwitejj yuspagarañataquïchinejja
Leviticus7:13 Uca yuspagaräwita loktäwimpi chicsti
Leviticus7:14 Take uca loktäwinacatsti mä kawkha apakt'apjjaraquïta
Leviticus7:15 “Cawquïri uywanacatejj yuspagarañataqui
Leviticus7:16 Mä uywatejj mä arsüwi phokhañataqui
Leviticus7:17 ucampisa uca uywan aychapatejj quimsürurus utjascaquini ucasti takpacha naqhantayatäjjañaparaquiwa.
Leviticus7:18 Ucampisa maynitejj uca sumancthapiñataqui loktatäqui uca uywan aychapjja quimsa ururus mank'ascaquinejja
Leviticus7:19 “Cawquïri aychatejj mä cuna k'añu yänacampisa jac'achasiyatänejja
Leviticus7:20 “Cawquïri jaketejj jan k'omachatäcasina uca sumancthapiñataqui loktata aycha mank'ani ucasti jakenac taypitjja apanucutäjjañapawa
Leviticus7:21 “Cawquïri jaketejj mä cuna k'añunacsa llamct'ani
Leviticus7:22 Tatitojj Moisesaruw parläna; aqham saraquïnwa:
Leviticus7:23 “Israelitanacarusti aqham saraquim: Janipuniw liq'jja mank'apjjañapäquiti
Leviticus7:24 Jiwata uywanacan liq'ipjja uqhamaraqui montenquiri animalanacan jiwayata liq'ipsa cunataquis puedisipctaw apnakañjja
Leviticus7:25 “Cawquïritejj naqhantayatäñataqui Tatitur loktatäqui uca uywanacan liq'ipa mank'ani ucasti
Leviticus7:26 “Cawqhantï jumanacajj jacapjjäta
Leviticus7:27 Cawquïri jaketejj wila mank'ani ucasti jakenacap taypitjja chhaktayatäjjaniwa.”

Leviticus13:1 Tatitusti Moisesampiru
Leviticus13:2 “Cunapachatejj mayniru janchipajj p'usuni
Leviticus13:3 Sacerdotew uca janchipan llaganacapjja uñjjataraquini
Leviticus13:4 “Ucat janchin manchapatejj jank'öchejja
Leviticus13:5 Uca pakallko urunaca pasjjepansti
Leviticus13:6 Uca pakallko urunaca pasatatsti wasitatwa sacerdotejj uca usuta jakerojj uñjjataraquini
Leviticus13:7 “Ucampisa uca llagatejj
Leviticus13:8 Ucatsti sacerdotejj wasitata uñjjatasinjja
Leviticus13:9 “Cunapachatejj mayni jakejj lepra llaganacanïnejja
Leviticus13:10 Sacerdotew juparojj suma uñjjataraquini
Leviticus13:11 uca jakesti jan kollcaña lepra usuniwa. Sacerdotesti uca jakerojj k'añu jaketwa khanañchjjañapa
Leviticus13:12 “Ucat uca lepra usutejj janc'aqui akatatani
Leviticus13:13 sacerdotejj uñjaraquiniwa; ucatsti uca usutejj takpacha janchi k'ala chhaktaychejja
Leviticus13:14 Ucampisa cuna urutejj uca jaken janchipanjja wila p'usojj uñstjjani ucapachasti k'añuwa uñjasjjaraquini.
Leviticus13:15 Uqhamasti sacerdotew uca wila janchjja suma uñjjataraquini
Leviticus13:16 “Ucatsti uca wila janchitejj jank'oru tucjjaraquinejja
Leviticus13:17 uqhamat sacerdotejj juparu uñjjatañapataqui
Leviticus13:18 “Cunapachatejj mayni jaken janchipan mä llagajj sarnjama uñstani ucapachasti uca llagajj jacjjaquiraquini
Leviticus13:19 ucampisa uca chekanjja mä jank'o p'usojj uñstjjaraquini
Leviticus13:20 Sacerdotejja llaga uñjjatasinjja
Leviticus13:21 Ucampisa sacerdotejj uñjani uca llagajj jan juc'ampi janchjja mank'sutapa
Leviticus13:22 Ucatsti uca llagatejj juc'ampi janchinjama akatatascaquini ucapachasti sacerdotejj uca jakerojj k'añutwa khanañchjjaraquini
Leviticus13:23 Ucampisa uca llagachata chekatejj jan juc'ampi akatatcchejja
Leviticus13:24 “Cunapachatejj mayni jakejj janchipa khatsuyasini
Leviticus13:25 ucapachasti sacerdotew uñjjatjjaraquini uca janchin ñic'utapatejj jank'oru tucjjani
Leviticus13:26 Sacerdotetejja uca llaganaca uñjjatasinjja uñjani ucanjja jan jank'o ñic'utajj utjatapa
Leviticus13:27 Ucat uca pakallko urunaca phokhasjjepansti
Leviticus13:28 Ucampisa uca manchatejj jan juc'ampi janchinjama akatatatäcani
Leviticus13:29 “Cunapachatejj mä chachasa jan ucajj mä warmisa p'ekepana mä llagajj uñstani jan ucajj sunqhapansa
Leviticus13:30 ucapachasti sacerdotew uca llagjja uñjjatani. Uca llagatejj janchitjja juc'ampi mankharu mantatäni
Leviticus13:31 Ucat sacerdotejj uca llaga uñjjatasajja
Leviticus13:32 Uca pakallko urunaca pasjjatatsti sacerdotejj wasitatwa uca llaga uñjjatjjaraquini
Leviticus13:33 ucapachasti sacerdotejj uca jakerojj ñic'utapa k'alwa mururasiyaraquini
Leviticus13:34 Uca pakallko urunaca pasjjatatsti sacerdotejj wasitatwa uca llagani chekjja uñjjataraquini
Leviticus13:35 Ucampisa uca llagatejj juc'ampi akatatascaquini sacerdotena uñjjatatapat khepatjja
Leviticus13:36 sacerdotesti wasitatwa uca jakerojj llagapa uñjjataraquini
Leviticus13:37 Ucampisa sacerdotetejj uca llagan jan juc'ampi akatatatapa uñjani
Leviticus13:38 “Cunapachatejj mä chachajj jan ucajj mä warmisa janchipanjja jank'o manchanacanïni ucapachasti
Leviticus13:39 sacerdotejj uca janchi uñjjataraquini
Leviticus13:40 “Mä jakerutejj p'ekepajj k'arartchi
Leviticus13:41 Mayni jakerutejj ñic'utapajj nayräjja toket willirtchejja
Leviticus13:42 Ucampisa mä llagatejj uñstani niya jank'o wilar uñtata uñstaraquini p'eke k'arawjanacana
Leviticus13:43 Ucapachaw sacerdotejj uca llaga uñjjataraquini
Leviticus13:44 uca jakejj lepra usuniwa p'ekepajj k'arätap laycu. Uca jakesti janiw k'omäcaraquiti
Leviticus13:45 “Qhititejj lepra usu llaganacanïqui ucanacasti isinacapjja ch'iyanokatwa apjjapjjañapa
Leviticus13:46 Uca llaganacapan utjañapcamasti uca jakejj k'añut uñt'ataquipunïscaniwa
Leviticus13:47 “Cunapachatejj mä manchajj mä t'awrat lurat isina jan ucajj linot lurat isinsa uñstani
Leviticus13:48 jan ucajj mä t'awrata p'itata isinsa jan ucajj linot p'itata isinsa
Leviticus13:49 ucat uca manchanacasti ch'ojjñaptawayani jan ucajj wilaptawayanisa
Leviticus13:50 Sacerdotew uca manchjja uñjjatani ucatsti pakallko urutaquiw jist'antaraquini.
Leviticus13:51 Ucat pakallko urunaca pasjjatatwa sacerdotejj uca mancha wasitat uñjjatjjaraquini
Leviticus13:52 Uqhamasti cawquïri yänacatejj uqhama manchanacanïni ucasti k'ala naqhantayatäjjañapawa
Leviticus13:53 ucampisa sacerdotetejj uñjjatani
Leviticus13:54 sacerdotejj uca manchanacjja t'ajjsokayjjañapawa ucatsti uca yänacajj pakallko urunacampi jist'antataraquïniwa.
Leviticus13:55 “Uca t'ajjsokatäjjatapatsti sacerdotejj wasitatwa uca mancha uñjjatjjaraquini. Ucat uñjaraquini uca manchajj jan chhaktatapa
Leviticus13:56 Uca mancha uñjjatasintejj sacerdotejj amuyani uca manchajj t'ajjsokatäjjatapatjja chhaktjjatapa
Leviticus13:57 Ucampisa wasitat uñstascaquini uca isina jan ucajj uca lip'ichit lurata yänacansa ucapachasti
Leviticus13:58 Uca isisti uqhamarac uca lip'ichit lurata yänacasa uca manchajj chhaktjjani t'ajjsokatäjjatapatjja
Leviticus13:59 Acanacaw yatichäwinacajj uca lepra manchanaca toketjja ucanacajj t'awrata jan ucajj linota lurata isinacansa uñstpan
Leviticus14:1 Tatitusti Moisesaruw parläna; aqham saraquïnwa:
Leviticus14:2 “Acanacaw yatichäwinacajja mä lepra usuni jakena k'omachasiñap tokenacatjja: usut jakesti sacerdoten nayrakataparu irpatäniwa
Leviticus14:3 sacerdotesti uca jakjja campamentot ankäjjaruw irparaquini
Leviticus14:4 uca k'omachasiri jaketaquejj pä jamach'inaca aptayanini
Leviticus14:5 saraquiniwa: mä jamach'jja uca ñek'e phuqhu patjjaruw jiwayäta
Leviticus14:6 Ucat jacasquiri jamach'i caturaquini
Leviticus14:7 Ucatsti cawquïri jaketejj uca lepra usut k'omachatäcani ucarusti pakallko cutiw uca wila umampi ch'allt'araquini
Leviticus14:8 “Uca k'omachasiri jakesti isinacapjja t'ajjsokasjjañapawa
Leviticus14:9 Pakallko urunaca phokhasjjepansti k'alwa ñic'utapjja mururasjjaraquini
Leviticus14:10 “Quimsakallko ururusti pä orko ovejanaca caturaquini
Leviticus14:11 Cawquïri sacerdotetejj k'omachcani ucasti
Leviticus14:12 ucat uca ovejanacat maynïri caturaquini
Leviticus14:13 Uca orko ovejsti cawqhatejj sacrificiot loktañataqui uywanaca qharinucuña chicajj yakhachatäqui ucqhanwa qharinucjjañaparaqui. Jucha luratata sacrificio loktäwisti sacerdotetaquïniwa
Leviticus14:14 “Uca khepatsti sacerdotejj jucha luratat loktatäcänsa ucanacat mä juc'a wila aptaraquini
Leviticus14:15 Ucat mä juc'a aceite aptaraquini
Leviticus14:16 uca cupi amparapampiw luc'anapa uca aceitempi jawt'araquini
Leviticus14:17 Cuna aceitetejj amparapan jilt'cani ucatwa sacerdotejj mä juc'a aptaraquini
Leviticus14:18 Ucat uca aceite jilt'sti cawquïri jaketejj k'omachasisqui ucan p'ekepjjaruraquiw jawsjjani. Uqhamatwa sacerdotejj uca jaketaquejj juchat pampachatäña jicjjatani.
Leviticus14:19 Ucatsti sacerdotejj janc'aquiw cuna sacrificiotejj juchat loktatäqui uca loktjjaraquini
Leviticus14:20 ucsti altarjjaruraquiw loktaraquini
Leviticus14:21 “Cawquïri jaketejj usutäcani ucatejj pobrëni
Leviticus14:22 pä palomampi jan ucajj pä palom wawampsa
Leviticus14:23 Quimsakallko ururusti take ucanacwa sacerdoten ucaru aparaquini; uqhamat jupajj k'omachata jicjjatasiñapataqui; take ucanacsti Tatitun nayrakatapanwa catuyaraquini
Leviticus14:24 Sacerdotesti
Leviticus14:25 cawquïri ovejatejj juchata loktatäcani ucwa qharinucuraquini
Leviticus14:26 ucatsti ch'eka amparaparu mä juc'a aceite warjjataraquini
Leviticus14:27 cupi luc'anampiw pakallko cuti Tatitun nayrakatapan uca aceitempi ch'allt'araquini.
Leviticus14:28 Uqhamaraquiwa
Leviticus14:29 Ucat aceite jilt'sti sacerdotejj cawquïri jaketejj k'omachasisqui ucan p'ekepjjaruwa jawsuraquini
Leviticus14:30 Ucjjarusti sacerdotejj maynïri paloma jan ucajj mä palom wawsa loktjjaraquini
Leviticus14:31 Maynïr palomjja jucha luratat sacrificio loktäwïcaspasa uqhamwa loktaraquini
Leviticus14:32 Take ucanacawa yatichäwinacajj cawquïri jakenacatejj lepra usu llaganacani uñstcani ucanacataquejja
Leviticus14:33 Tatitusti Moisesampiru
Leviticus14:34 “Cunapachatejj jumanacajj Canaán orakeru mantjjapjjäta
Leviticus14:35 uca utanisti sacerdoter uñjiriw sarani
Leviticus14:36 “Sacerdotesti janïra uca utar mantcasajja
Leviticus14:37 “Uca uta uñjasatejj sacerdotejj amuyaraquini
Leviticus14:38 ucapachasti uca utatjja mistunjjaniwa
Leviticus14:39 Pakallko ururuw sacerdotejj cutt'awayaraquini uca manchanaca uñaquipañataqui
Leviticus14:40 saraquiniwa: cawquïri kalanacatejj manchanacani uñstqui ucanac apsupjjaraquim
Leviticus14:41 uca quipcaraquiwa saraquini uca utan perkanacapajj k'ala q'issutäñapawa
Leviticus14:42 Uqhamasti cawquïri kalanacatejj apsutäcäna uca lantisti yakha kalanacaw uscutäjjaraquini
Leviticus14:43 “Uqhama kalanacasa apsutäjjatapatjja
Leviticus14:44 sacerdotejj wasitatwa uca uta uñjiri mantaraquini. Uca usutejj wasitat uca utan akatatatächejja
Leviticus14:45 Uqhamasti uca utajj allinucutäñapawa
Leviticus14:46 Cawquïritejj uca utaru mantcani
Leviticus14:47 Cawquïritejj uca utan iccani jan ucajj mank'caraquinisa ucasti isinacapjja t'ajjsokasjjañapawa
Leviticus14:48 “Sacerdotetejj uca utaru uñjiri mantasinjja
Leviticus14:49 Uca uta k'omachañataquisti pä jamach'i caturaquini
Leviticus14:50 Uca jamach'inacatsti maynïrwa jiwayaraquini mä ñek'e phucjjaru
Leviticus14:51 Ucat aptaraquini cedro
Leviticus14:52 Uqhamwa uca utjja k'omachani uca jamach'in wilapampi
Leviticus14:53 Uca khepatsti jacasquiri jamach'irojja antutjjaraquiniwa
Leviticus14:54 Take ucanacawa yatichäwinacajja cawquïri lepra usunacatejj
Leviticus14:55 Isinacana uñstani jan ucajj utanacansa uñstani ucapachajja
Leviticus14:56 uqhamarac cawquïri p'usunacatejj uñstani
Leviticus14:57 uqhamat yatisiñapataqui cunatejj k'omäqui
Leviticus15:1 Tatitusti Moisesampiru
Leviticus15:2 “Israelitanacarusti aqham sapjjam: Cunapachatejj mä jakejj usutäsina jathapa aywiyani ucapachasti uca jakejj k'añut uñt'atäniwa.
Leviticus15:3 Jakesti k'añuta uñt'ataraquïniwa
Leviticus15:4 “Cawqui chekarutejj uca jakejj iquini
Leviticus15:5 “Cawquïritejj uca jaken iquiñapa llamct'ani ucasti
Leviticus15:6 “Cawquïri jaketejj uca aywiyiri jaken konuñaparu kont'ani ucasti
Leviticus15:7 “Cawquïritejj uca jatha aywiyiri jakeru llamct'ani ucasti isipjja t'ajjsokasjjañaparaquiwa
Leviticus15:8 “Uca jatha aywiyiri usut jaketejj mayni k'oma jakeru thusjjatani
Leviticus15:9 “Cawquïri monturatejj uca jatha aywiyiri jaken lat'jjatatäni ucasti k'añut uñt'atapunïniwa.
Leviticus15:10 “Cawquïri jaketejj uca jatha aywiyir jaken mä cuna kont'atapjjarusa llamct'ani ucasti k'añut uñt'atapunïniwa jayp'thapiñapcamajja.
Leviticus15:11 “Cawquïri jatha aywiyiri usut jaketejj amparapa jan jarekasisa yakha jakeru llamct'ani
Leviticus15:12 “Uca jatha aywiyiri jaketejj mä ñek'e phuqhu llamct'ani
Leviticus15:13 “Uca jaketejj uca jatha aywiyañ usupata c'umarachasjjani ucapachasti pakallko urunacaw jact'asini k'omachasiñapataquejja
Leviticus15:14 Quimsakallko ururusti pä paloma jan ucajj pä palom wawanacwa caturaquini
Leviticus15:15 Sacerdotesti mayjja jucha luratat sacrificio loktjjaraquini
Leviticus15:16 “Cunapachatejj mayni jakejj jatha ch'akarayasini ucapachasti take janchipwa umampi jarekasjjaraquini
Leviticus15:17 “Cuna isinacjjarutejj
Leviticus15:18 “Mayni chachatejj mä warmimpi iquintani mayachasisa
Leviticus15:19 “Mayni warmitejj phajjsi wilapampïscani ucasti pakallko uruwa k'añut uñt'atäni. Cawquïritejj uca warmiru llamct'ani ucasti k'añut uñt'atäniwa
Leviticus15:20 “Cawqhanacarutejj uca warmejj phajjsi wilanïcasina iquini uca iquiñapasti k'añut uñt'atäniwa. “Cawqhanacarutejj kont'asiraquini
Leviticus15:21 “Cawquïritejj uca phajjsi wilani warmin iquiñapa llamct'ani ucasti isinacapjja t'ajjsokasjjañapawa
Leviticus15:22 “Cawquïritejj uca warmina mä cuna konjjatatapjjarusa llamct'ani ucasti isipjja t'ajjsokasjjañapawa jupa quipcasa jarekasjjañaparaquiwa
Leviticus15:23 Uca warmin iquiñapsa jan ucajj mä cunapsa maynejj llamct'ani
Leviticus15:24 “Maynitejj uca phajjsi wilani warmimpi iquintani
Leviticus15:25 “Mayni warmitejj wila sarayasini jan phajjsi usunïcasina
Leviticus15:26 “Cawqharutejj uca wila apayasir warmejj iccani
Leviticus15:27 “Cawquïritejj uca yänaca llamct'ani ucasti k'añut uñt'atäniwa. Isipjja t'ajjsokasjjañapawa
Leviticus15:28 “Cunapachatejj uca wilapajj sayt'jjani ucqhasti pakallko urunacaw suyt'ani
Leviticus15:29 Quimsakallko urunacarusti pä paloma caturaquini jan ucajj pä palom wawanacsa
Leviticus15:30 Sacerdotesti uca palomanacat mayjja jucha luratata sacrificiot loktjjaraquini
Leviticus15:31 Uqhamatwa jumanacajj israelitanacatjja take k'añunacjja jayaru apanucjjapjjäta
Leviticus15:32 Acawa yatichäwinacajja cawquïri jakenacatejj usutäsinsa jan usutäsinsa jathanacapa aywiyasa sarnakapjjani
Leviticus15:33 uqhamaraqui cawquïri warminacatejj phajjsi wilanïpjje
Leviticus16:1 Tatitusti Moisesampiw parlaraquïna
Leviticus16:2 Ucat Tatitojj Moisesarojj aqham saraquïnwa: “Aarón jilamarojj saraquim
Leviticus16:3 Aaronajj uca kollan chekaru mantañataquejj mä orko vaca
Leviticus16:4 Cunatejj Tatituru loktatäqui uca linot lurata tunicampi isthapitaw mantaraquini
Leviticus16:5 “Israelita jakenacataquisti
Leviticus16:6 Jupan quipca juchapatwa mä vaca sacrificiot loktaraquini
Leviticus16:7 Uca khepatsti uca pä cabrito caturaquini
Leviticus16:8 Ucjjarusti uca paya cabritonacjjarojja suerte jaktaraquini; maynïri suertejja Tatitutaquïniwa
Leviticus16:9 Cawquïri cabritjjarutejj suertejj Tatitutaqui sasa wact'cani ucsti Aaronajj jucha luratat sacrificio loktjjani
Leviticus16:10 ucampisa cawquïri cabritotejj jucha apcani ucasti jacquirpacha Tatitun nayrakataparu uñstayatäniwa
Leviticus16:11 “Uca khepatsti Aaronajj orko vaca sacrificiot loktjjaraquini
Leviticus16:12 Ucjjarusti mä incensario caturaquini
Leviticus16:13 uca inciensti Tatitun nayrakatapancqui uca ninjjaruw jach'jjataraquini
Leviticus16:14 Uqhamaraquiwa uca vacan wilapatjja mä juc'a aptaraquini
Leviticus16:15 uca khepatwa cabritorojj jiwayjjaraquini
Leviticus16:16 Uqhamatwa uca kollan chekjja k'omachjjaraquini take uca k'añunacatjja
Leviticus16:17 “Aaronan
Leviticus16:18 ucatjja mistunjjaraquiniwa cawquïri altaratejj Tatitun nayrakatapancqui ucqharu. Ucatsti uca vacan wilapatjja mä juc'a aptaraquini
Leviticus16:19 ucat luc'anapampejj pakallko cutiw altarar ch'allt'araquini. Uqhamwa israelitanacan k'añunacapatjja k'omachani
Leviticus16:20 “Cunapachatejj Aarón sacerdotejj uca kollana cheka
Leviticus16:21 uca cabriton p'ekepjjaru amparapa lokjjatasasti
Leviticus16:22 Uqhamawa uca cabritojj wasara tokeru chhakjjani
Leviticus16:23 “Ucjjarusti Aaronajj Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carparuw mantjjaraquini
Leviticus16:24 Uca quipca kollana chekanwa jarekasjjaraquini
Leviticus16:25 Cawquïri uywatejj jucha luratat sacrificio loktatäcan uca liq'inacapsti altarjjaruw nact'ayjjaraquini
Leviticus16:26 ucjjarusti cawquïri jaketejj uca cabrito wasararu apcäna Azazel ucataqui
Leviticus16:27 “Cawquïri orko vacatejj
Leviticus16:28 Cawquïri jaketejj take ucanaca naqhantayjjani ucasti isinacapjja t'ajjsokasjjañapawa
Leviticus16:29 “Aca leyinacasti jumanacataquejj wiñayataquïniwa: tunca uru sarakataru pakallköri phajjsina jumanacajj ayunapjjäta
Leviticus16:30 Ucüruraquiwa jumanacajj juchanacamat pampachatäñjja jicjjatapjjäta Tatitun nayrakatapanjja
Leviticus16:31 Aca leyisti wiñayataquiraquiwa: uca urusti jumanacataquejj wali jach'a urüniwa

Leviticus17:1 Tatitusti Moisesaruw parläna; aqham saraquïnwa:
Leviticus17:2 “Aaronampiru
Leviticus17:3 “Cawquïri jaketejj mä orko vaca
Leviticus17:4 ucatsti janiraqui Tatitumpi Jiquisiña Carpäquisa uca nayrakataru apancaniti
Leviticus17:5 Acasti Israelita jakenacan Tatituru loktapjjañapataquiwa
Leviticus17:6 Sacerdotesti Tatitun nayrakatapancqui uca altarjja wilampiw ch'allt'araquini
Leviticus17:7 Janipuniw mayampsa uca ñankhanacarojj ofrendanacapjja loktascjjapjjaniti
Leviticus17:8 “Ucjjarusti saraquim cawquïri israelita jaketejja jan ucajj cawquïri jakesa yakha marcat jutasina jumanac taypina jacani
Leviticus17:9 ucampisa janiraqui Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpäquisa uca nayrakataru apcaraquiniti
Leviticus17:10 “Nayasti take israelitanacataqui
Leviticus17:11 Take jaquirinacasti cuna wilatejj jupanjja utjqui ucampiwa jacaraqui. Nayaw jumanacarojj altarajjan wila churapjjsma
Leviticus17:12 “Uca laycu israelita jakenacarusti saractwa: Janipuniw jumanacajja ni jumanac taypina jaquir yakha marcat jutiri jakenacasa wiljja mank'apjjätati sasa.
Leviticus17:13 Cawquïri israelitanacatejja
Leviticus17:14 uca wilajj take jaquirinacarusa jacaña churatap laycu
Leviticus17:15 “Cawquïri israelita jaketejja jan ucajj cawquïri yakha marcat jutasina jumanac taypina jaquiri jakesa mä jiwat uywan aychapa jan ucajj mä monte animalan jiwayata uywan aychapsa mank'ani ucasti isipjja t'ajjsokasjjañapawa
Leviticus17:16 Ucampisa janitejj isinacapa t'ajjsokascani ni jupa quipcasa umampi jarekascaraquini ucapachasti uca ñankha luräwipampi k'añuchataquïscaniwa.”
Leviticus18:1 Tatitusti Moisesaruw parläna; aqham saraquïnwa:
Leviticus18:2 “Israelitanacarusti aqham saraquim: “Nayätwa Tatitu Diosapajja.
Leviticus18:3 “Jan Egipto marcan sarnakäwinacaparjama jacapjjamti
Leviticus18:4 “Nayan arsutanacajjaru phokhapjjam
Leviticus18:5 “Nayan arsutanacajjsti
Leviticus18:6 “Janipuniw cawquïri jakesa pachpa familiapana utjiri warmirojj jac'achasiñapäquiti uca warmimpi jucha lurañataquejja. Nayätwa Tatitojja.
Leviticus18:7 “Janiraqui awquimarusa ñankhachcamti
Leviticus18:8 “Jan awquimarojj ñankhachamti
Leviticus18:9 “Janipuni cullacamarojj warmisimti; ucajja awqui toketsa cullacamäscpan jan ucajj tayca toketsa cullacamäscpan; utamana nacirïpasa jan ucajj yakha chekana nacirïpasa
Leviticus18:10 “Jan jumapachajj ñankha lurasimti imill wawa allchhimaru warmisisajja
Leviticus18:11 “Janipuni awquiman warmipana phuchaparojj warmisimti. Jupasti awquimana jathasitawa
Leviticus18:12 “Jan awquiman cullacaparojj warmisimti
Leviticus18:13 “Jan taycaman cullacaparojj warmisimti
Leviticus18:14 “Jan tiomarojj ñankhachamti warmiparu warmisisajja
Leviticus18:15 “Jan yojjch'amarojj warmisimti
Leviticus18:16 “Janiraqui jilamarus ñankhachamti
Leviticus18:17 “Janipuni mä warmimpejja wachoka jucha lurasa sarnakamti
Leviticus18:18 “Jan warmiman cullacaparojj warmisimti
Leviticus18:19 “Phajjsi wilani warmimpisti janipuni jucha luramti.
Leviticus18:20 “Jake masiman warmipampisti janipuni iquintamti
Leviticus18:21 “Janipuni wawanacamjja Moloc sat diosarojj sacrificiot loktamti. Janiraqui uqham lurasajj Diosan sutipsa ñankhachamti. Nayaquïtwa Tatitojja.
Leviticus18:22 “Jan mä chachampejj warmimpjama iquintamti. Uqham chachapur iquintañajj sinti jan wali k'añu luräwiwa.
Leviticus18:23 “Janiraqui animalanacampisa wachoka jucha luramti
Leviticus18:24 “Janipuni ucanacampejja k'añuchasipjjamti. Cawquïri marcanactejj nayajj jumanac nayrakatata ananuccä ucanacasti uca luräwinacampiwa k'añuchasipjjejja
Leviticus18:25 uca quipcaraquiwa jupanacan orakenacapasa k'añuchata uñjasjjaraquejja
Leviticus18:26 Ucampisa jumanaca
Leviticus18:27 Cawquïri jakenacatejj jumanacat nayräjja aca oraken jacapcän ucanacajj take uca k'añu luräwinacwa lurapjjänjja
Leviticus18:28 ¡Uca orakesti janiraqui jumanacarojj apanucpati cunjämtejj uca jakenacarojj apanuccänjja uqhama
Leviticus18:29 Cawquïri jaketejj uca k'añu luräwinaca lurascani ucanacasti jakenac taypitjja jiwayatäjjaniwa.
Leviticus18:30 Uca laycu
Leviticus19:1 Tatitusti Moisesaruw parläna; aqham saraquïnwa:
Leviticus19:2 “Israelita jakenacarusti aqham saraquim: Jumanacasti kollanäpjjam
Leviticus19:3 “Sapa maynisa awquiparu uqhamarac taycaparu ajjsarasa sarnakpan. Nayan samaraña urunacajjarusa imapjjaraquim. Nayätwa jumanacan Tatitu Diosamajja.
Leviticus19:4 “Janipun yakha diosanacarojj sarapjjamti
Leviticus19:5 “Cunapachatejj Tatituru sumancthapiña sacrificionac loktapjjäta ucapachasti
Leviticus19:6 Cawquïri uywatejj loktatäcani ucasti uca urpachaw mank'antatäjjañapa
Leviticus19:7 Uca ofrenda loktatatejj quimsa urcama mank'ataquïscani
Leviticus19:8 qhititejj mank'cani ucasti juchapa uñt'asiraquini
Leviticus19:9 “Cunapachatejj yapumana cosecha apthapcäta ucapachasti janiw thiyanacamppacha yawthapïtati
Leviticus19:10 Uva yapumatsti janiw takpacha apthapïtati
Leviticus19:11 “Jan lunthatasipjjamti
Leviticus19:12 “Jan c'ari arsüwinac nayan sutejjaru luramti
Leviticus19:13 “Janiraqui jake masima contrajj ch'amampiqui sayt'asimti
Leviticus19:14 “Okara jakerusti jan maldicimti. Juyqhun sarnakañaparusti janipuni cuna casta jan walt'añanacsa liwisiñapataquejj uscumti. Tatitu Diosamaru ajjsartam. Nayätwa Tatitojja.
Leviticus19:15 “Cunapachatejj mä queja t'akjäta ucapachasti jan ñankhanacjja luramti; janiraqui pisi ch'amanirusa arjjatamti ni munañanina nayrakataparusa alt'asimti. Cunapachatejj mä queja uñjcäta ucapachasti cunatejj chekapäqui ucaru jaysasa luram.
Leviticus19:16 “Jakenac taypinsti janipuni arunac apnakasa sarnakamti. “Janiraqui jake jiwayañanacansa chicachasimti. Nayätwa Tatitu Diosamajja.
Leviticus19:17 “Jan chuymamarojj jilamar uñisiñanacjja imjjäsimti. Cunapachatejj jake masimaru tokenokañajj waquischi ucapachasti tokenokam
Leviticus19:18 “Jake masimarusti janipuni cuna luratasa phoksusiraquimti
Leviticus19:19 “Nayan leyinacajjsti phokhapunim. Uywanacamsti janiraqui yakha casta uywanacampi catusiyamti. Janipun orakemarojj take casta jathanaca chharktasin yapuchamti. Janiraqui take casta telanacat lurata isinacampi isisimti.
Leviticus19:20 “Mayni jaketejj cawquïri esclavatejj yakha jakeru churatäqui ucampi iquintani
Leviticus19:21 Uca jakesti Tatiturojj mä orko oveja churaraquini jucha luratata mä sacrificiöcaspas uqhama
Leviticus19:22 Uca oveja sacrificiot loktasaraquiw sacerdotejj uca jaketaquejj Tatitut juchata pampachatäña mayiraquini
Leviticus19:23 “Cunapachatejj jumanacajj uca orakeru puripjjäta
Leviticus19:24 Pusi mara purinjjepansti take uca achunacajj Tatituru loktatäjjaraquiniwa
Leviticus19:25 pheska mara purinjjepansti jumanacajj uca achunacatjja mank'jjapjjaraquïtawa. Uqhamatwa uca kokajj juc'ampi jumanacataquejj achuraquini. Nayätwa jumanacan Tatitu Diosamajja.
Leviticus19:26 “Janipun mank'apjjamti cunsa wilanïni ucanacjja. Janipun yatirïñjja munapjjamti
Leviticus19:27 “Janiraqui ñic'utanacamsa muypacha mursusipjjamti
Leviticus19:28 “Janiraqui mä jiwat laycu janchinacamsa k'allunokasipjjamti. Janipuni cuna casta kellkanacsa janchinacamarojj jan mayampitaqui mistquirjja kellkantasipjjamti. Nayätwa Tatitojja.
Leviticus19:29 “Janiraqui phuchamarusa ñankha luramti
Leviticus19:30 “Samarañ urunacajjarusti imapjjapunim. Nayan utajjataquisti wali ajjsartañajj utjaracpan. Nayätwa Tatitu Diosajja.
Leviticus19:31 “Janipuni ch'amacaninacarusa ni laykanacarusa sarapjjamti. Janiraqui jupanacaru jisqhisisasa ñankhachasipjjamti. Nayätwa jumanacan Tatitu Diosamajja.
Leviticus19:32 “Jilïri jakenac nayrakatansti sayt'asisina jupanacarojj mä suma ajjsart'aña uñacht'ayaraquim. Tatitu Diosamaru ajjsartatamsa uñacht'ayaraquim. Nayätwa Tatitojja.
Leviticus19:33 “Jaya marcat jutiri jakenacarusti cawquïrinacatejj jumanac taypin jacani ucarusti janipuni t'akhesiyapjjamti. Jumanacat maynïrïcaspasa uqhama uñjapjjam; juparusti munapjjaraquim jupajj jumanacjama jakëtapa laycu. Uqhamarusa jumanacajj Egiptonjja jaya jakenacäsipcaraquïyätawa. Nayätwa jumanacan Tatitu Diosamajja.

Leviticus23:27 “Uca pachpa pakallko phajjsi sarakatansti

Leviticus23:29 Qhititejj uca uru jan ayuncani ucasti
Leviticus23:30 Uqhamarac qhititejj uca urojj cuna casta irnakañsa lurcani

Leviticus25:2 “Israelitanacarusti aqham saraquim: Cunapachatejj jumanacajj cuna oraktejj churapcäma ucaru mantjjapjjäta ucapachasti orakejj samaraniwa
Leviticus25:3 Yapunacamjja sojjta maraw yapuchasipjjäta. Uqhamaraqui uva yapunacamsa sojjta maraw qhuchhurapjjaraquïta
Leviticus25:4 ucampisa pakallko mara purinjjepansti orakejj samaraniwa
Leviticus25:5 janiraqui yawthapipjjamti jupapacha alcani uca trigonacjja; khepa cosecha apthapitatjja
Leviticus25:6 Cuntejj orakejj jan yapuchatäcasina achcani
Leviticus25:7 uqhamarac uywanacamataquisa
Leviticus25:8 “Jumanacasti pakallko semananaca sapa mara jact'apjjäta
Leviticus25:9 uca marana pakallko phajjsi sarakjjepansti
Leviticus25:10 Pheska tunca mara purinjjepansti jumanacajj uca mararojj mä khespiyasiñ maratwa catokapjjäta; uca marasti khespiyasiña maräniwa
