Leviticus25:12 uca marajj jumanacataqui khespiyasiña marätap laycu
Leviticus25:13 “Uca khespiyasiñ maransti jumanacajj takeniwa orakenacamjja tumpasjjapjjäta.
Leviticus25:14 Maynitejj mä orake aljani jan ucajj alasinisa
Leviticus25:15 qhititejj alascani ucasti mä suma alapa pagañapawa
Leviticus25:16 walja maranaca cosechañataqui utjascchi ucapachasti uca oraken alapajj jilaraquïniwa. Juc'a maranacaqui cosecha apsuñataquejj utjchi ucapachasti alapajj juc'aquiraquïniwa
Leviticus25:17 “Jan qhitisa yakharu jan walinac lurpati. Diosarusti ajjsartapjjaraquim. Nayätwa jumanacan Tatitu Diosamajja.
Leviticus25:18 Nayan leyinacajjarjama sarnakapjjam
Leviticus25:19 Orakesti sumwa achuraquini
Leviticus25:20 “Inas jumanacajj sapjjaraquisma: ¿Uqhamasti cunraqui pakallko mara purinjjani ucapachasti mank'añänisti
Leviticus25:21 Nayaw jumanacarojj sojjtïri maräqui ucanjja bendicionanac apayasinipcäma
Leviticus25:22 uqhamwa jumanacajj cuna granotejj imata utjcani ucat mank'apjjäta
Leviticus25:23 “Orakesti janiraquiw wiñayataqui aljatäñapäquiti
Leviticus25:24 Uqhamasti jumanacajj cawquïri orakenactï catupjjäta
Leviticus25:25 “Mayni marca masimatejj aynacht'ata uñjasini
Leviticus25:26 “Cunapachatejj maynejja jan jac'a familianïcani
Leviticus25:27 ucat suma tantiyt'araquini kawkha maranacasa pasjjatayna uca orake aljatapatjja
Leviticus25:28 Ucampisa janitejj kollkejj ucacama utjarapcani uca orake cutsuyasjjañataqui ucapachasti uca orakejj alasirin amparapancascaquiniwa
Leviticus25:29 “Maynitejj mä uta mä marcana aljasini
Leviticus25:30 Ucampisa uca utatejj uca marana jan cutsuyatäcani ucapachasti alasirimpiquiw uca utajj kheparjjani
Leviticus25:31 Ucampisa cawquïri utanacatejj jan perkani marcanacanccani ucanacasti pampa orakenacjamaquïscaniwa; cutsuyasitäscaspawa
Leviticus25:32 “Levitanacasti wasitatjja cutsuyasjjapjjapuniniwa cawquïri utanacatejj jupanacan marcanacapancqui ucanacjja.
Leviticus25:33 Cawquïritejj cutsuyascani ucatejj mä levita jakëni ucasti uca utatjja mistuwayjjañapawa khespiyasiña maranjja
Leviticus25:34 Cawquïri uywa awatisiña orakenacatejj levitanacan marcapan utjqui ucanacasti janipuniw aljatäcaspati
Leviticus25:35 “Mayni marca masimatejj aynacht'ata uñjasini
Leviticus25:36 Cuntejj mayt'cäta ucanacatsti janipun cunsa apakamti
Leviticus25:37 Cuna kollktejj mayt'cäta ucatsti jan interesanac cobramti
Leviticus25:38 Nayätwa jumanacan Tatitu Diosamajja
Leviticus25:39 “Mayni marca masimatejj aynacht'ata uñjasini
Leviticus25:40 Juparusti utaman nacirïcaspasa
Leviticus25:41 ucatsti utamatjja mistuwayjjaraquiniwa take wawanacapampi
Leviticus25:42 jupanacajj nayan sirvirinacajjätap laycu; nayaw jupanacarojj Egiptot apsunta janiw jupanacajj esclavot aljatäñapäquiti.
Leviticus25:43 Jan jupanacarojj khoru cancañampi uñjamti
Leviticus25:44 “Jumatejj esclavonacanïña munsta ucapachasti yakha marcanacat alasim
Leviticus25:45 Yakha marcat jutiri jakenacsa
Leviticus25:46 Ucatsti wawanacamarojj mä herenciäcaspasa uqhamwa jaytjjapjjaraquïta
Leviticus25:47 “Yakha marcat jutir jaketejj jumanaca taypina jaccasina kamiri tucuni
Leviticus25:48 uca israelita jakensti waquisiscaquiwa libre sarnakasiñ alasiñapajja
Leviticus25:49 mä tío
Leviticus25:50 Ucsti sumwa tantiyt'asiraquini cuna maratejj jupajj aljatäcäna uca
Leviticus25:51 Walja maranacatejj utjascchi
Leviticus25:52 ucampisa khespiyasiñapataquejj juc'a maranacaquitejj jilt'cani ucapachasti
Leviticus25:53 Juparusti mä marataquis irnakañapataqui jawsatäcaspas uqhamarjamaraquiw uñjatäni; uca jake masimarusti janiraqui khoru cancañampi uñjamti.
Leviticus25:54 “Uca maranacantejj jan uca jakejj khespiyatäcani ucapachasti
Leviticus25:55 Israelitanacasti nayan sirvirinacajjaraquiwa
Leviticus26:1 “Janipuni cuna casta yakha diosanacsa ni lluch'itanacsa lurasipjjamti; janiraqui jumanacan marcamanjja sirviña kalanacsa sayt'ayasipjjamti
Leviticus26:2 Samarañ urunacajjsti suma uñjapjjaraquim
Leviticus26:3 “Jumanacatejj nayan leyinacajjarjama sarnakapjjäta
Leviticus26:4 nayajj jallunacsa horasaruw apayanipjjäma
Leviticus26:5 trigosti jumanacataquejj uvanac cosechapjjañamcamaw utjaraquini
Leviticus26:6 Jumanacarusti samarañwa uca orakenjja churapjjäma
Leviticus26:7 Jumanacasti uñisirinacamarusa jaltayapjjaraquïtawa
Leviticus26:8 jumanacat pheskaniwa pataca uñisirinacaru chhuctayanejja; jumanacat patacanisti tunca waranka uñisirinacaruw chhuctayapjjaraquïtajja; jumanacan uñisirinacamasti jumanaca nayrakatan jiwarapjjaraquini.
Leviticus26:9 Jumanacarusti suma uñjapjjaraquïma
Leviticus26:10 Nayra mara imasita trigonacamwa mank'apjjaraquïta
Leviticus26:11 “Nayaw jumanac taypin jacaraquëjja
Leviticus26:12 jumanac taypinpunwa sarnakasiraquëjja
Leviticus26:13 Nayätwa jumanacan Tatitu Diosamajja
Leviticus26:14 “Ucampisa jumanacatejj jan nayaru ist'apquitäta
Leviticus26:15 jan ucasti nayan leyinacajjsa
Leviticus26:16 ucapachasti nayajj jumanacampejj acanacwa luraraquëjja: Jumanacjjarojj ajjsarañanacwa apayanëjja
Leviticus26:17 Nayasti jumanac contraw sayt'araquëjja
Leviticus26:18 “Take acanaca ist'asinsa janipuni nayarojj jaysapquitäta ucapachasti nayajj jumanacarojj pakallko cutimpiw juchanacamatjja t'akhesiyapjjäma.
Leviticus26:19 Jumanacan jach'a jach'a tucupjjatanacamsti t'unjaraquïwa
Leviticus26:20 Inamayaquiw ch'amsa tucusipcäta
Leviticus26:21 “Jumanacatejj naya contra sayt'asaquipuni sarnakasipcäta
Leviticus26:22 Jumanacjjarusti montenquiri khoru animalanac antutanëjja
Leviticus26:23 “Take acanaca ist'casinsa
Leviticus26:24 ucapachasti nayajj jumanac contraw sartaraquï
Leviticus26:25 Jumanacjjarusti mä guerra jutayaraquëjja
Leviticus26:26 “Cunapachatejj nayajj jumanacaru mank'añjja menost'ayjjapjjäma ucapachasti
Leviticus26:27 “Take ucanaca pasquipansa janitejj jumanacajj nayaru ist'apquitäta
Leviticus26:28 nayajj jumanac contraw sayt'araquëjja
Leviticus26:29 Ucapachaw jumanacajj pachpa imill wawanacama
Leviticus26:30 Nayaw jumanacan yakha diosanacaru yupaychaña altaranacamjja t'unjaraquëjja
Leviticus26:31 jumanacan marcanacamsti
Leviticus26:32 “Jumanacan marcanacamsti k'alwa t'unjaraquëjja
Leviticus26:33 Jumanacarusti marcanac taypiruwa ananucupjjaraquïma
Leviticus26:34 Ucapachasti jumanacan orakenacamajj samararaquiniwa
Leviticus26:35 Cunapachatejj orakejj k'ala t'unjata uñjasini ucapachasti orakejj samaraniwa
Leviticus26:36 “Qhitinacatejj uca uñisirinacaman orakenacapan jacasipcani
Leviticus26:37 guerratsa chhuctapcaspa uqhamaw jupanaccama liwirtapjjani
Leviticus26:38 Jumanacasti marcanac taypinjja t'unjataw uñjasipjjäta; uñisirinacaman marcapaw jumanacarojj k'al t'unjapjjätam;
Leviticus26:39 cawquïrinacatejj uñisirinacaman orakepan kheparapcani ucanacasti juchanacap laycu t'unjataw uñjasipjjani
Leviticus26:40 “Jumanacajj ñankha luratanacamsa
Leviticus26:41 nayasti jumanaca contraw sayt'araquëjja ucatsti uñisirinacaman marcaparuw apapjjaraquïma; ucanwa jan Diosar uñt'iri amuyunacamajj jisc'achata uñjasini
Leviticus26:42 Ucapachaw nayajj amtasiraquï cuna arust'äwtejj Jacobompi
Leviticus26:43 uca orakesti jumanacatjja librewa jicjjatasiraquini
Leviticus26:44 “Take ucanaca pasquipansa uqhamarac jumanacajj uñisirinacaman marcapana jacapcäta ucasa
Leviticus26:45 Ucampisa cuna arust'äwtejj jupanacampi lurcäyätjja cunapachatejj Egiptot jupanacar apsuncta ucapachajja take ucanacatjja amtasiraquïwa
Leviticus26:46 Acanacawa leyinacajja
Leviticus27:1 Tatitusti Moisesaruw parläna; aqham saraquïnwa:
Leviticus27:2 “Israelitanacarusti aqham saraquim: Cunapachatejj maynejj mä arsüwi phokhañ munasina Tatituru phokhaña munani ucapachasti
Leviticus27:3 Mä chachatejj pä tuncata sojjta tunca marancamäni ucanacasti pheska tunca kollkenac churani
Leviticus27:4 mä warmisti quimsa tunca kollkenacwa churaraquini.
Leviticus27:5 Cawquïri jakenacatejj pheska maranita pä tunca marancamäni ucanacasti pä tunca kollkenacwa churani
Leviticus27:6 Cawquïri wawanacatejj mä phajjsita pheska marancamäni ucasti pheska kollkenacwa churaraquini
Leviticus27:7 Cawquïri chachanacatejj sojjta tunca maranita amstarüni ucanacasti churäwipjja tunca pheskani kollkenacwa churaraquini
Leviticus27:8 Cawquïri jaketejj arsüwipa phokhañataqui churaña muncani
Leviticus27:9 “Uywanac toketsti cawquïri uywanacatejj Tatituru loktatäcani ucanacasti Tatitutaquipunïniwa
Leviticus27:10 janiraquiw yakha uywanacampi trocaquipatäcaspati
Leviticus27:11 “Cunapachatejj jan Tatitur loktaña mä k'añu animalajj Tatituru churaña munatäni ucapachasti uca animalajj sacerdoten nayräjjaparu irpatäniwa
Leviticus27:12 uqhamat sacerdotejj kawkhatejj churañäqui uca arsuñapataqui
Leviticus27:13 Uca animalatejj wasitata cutsuyasiña munatäjjani
Leviticus27:14 “Maynitejj Tatituru utapa catuyañ muncani
Leviticus27:15 Ucampisa cawquïritejj utapa Tatitur churcäna ucajj cutsuyasjjaña munani ucasti kawkhatejj churam satäcän ucjjarojja chicatan chicataparu mä juc'a menost'atampi churatäjjaniwa
Leviticus27:16 “Maynitejj orakepat mä parte Tatituru churani ucasti
Leviticus27:17 Qhititejj orakepjja Tatitur churani khespiyasiñ maranjja
Leviticus27:18 ucampisa khespiyasiñ mara pasatata Tatitur churascani ucapachasti
Leviticus27:19 “Cawquïritejj orakepa churjjasina cutsuyasjjaña muncani
Leviticus27:20 Ucampisa janitejj uca orake cutsuyascani
Leviticus27:21 Cunapachatejj uca orakejj khespiyasiñ marana libre uñjasjjaraquini
Leviticus27:22 “Maynitejj Tatituru mä alata orake churani
Leviticus27:23 ucapachasti sacerdotew uca oraken alapjja tantiyt'ani
Leviticus27:24 Khespiyasiñ maransti uca orakejj aljiriparuw wasitat cuttayatäjjaraquini
Leviticus27:25 “Take tantiyt'atanacamasti mä siclo sat kollke pä tunca geras sat jisc'a santuarion kollkepajj kawkhäquitejj ucarjama tantiyt'ataraquïniwa.
Leviticus27:26 “Uywanacan nayrïri kallunacapatsti
Leviticus27:27 Uca loktäwitejj mä k'añu animalänejja
Leviticus27:28 “Mayni jaketejj Tatituru yänacapat mä chicat churaña muncani ucajj jakenacäpasa
Leviticus27:29 Cawquïri jaketejj t'unjatäñataqui juchañchatäcän ucasti janipuniw khespiyatäcaspati
Leviticus27:30 “Take achunacat tuncat mayajja
Leviticus27:31 Maynitejj uca tuncat maya churatäcän uca cutsuyasjjañ munani ucapachasti kawkhäquitejj alapajj ucwa churjjañapa
Leviticus27:32 “Uywanacatsti sapa tuncat mayjja Tatiturupuniw churjjapjjäta
Leviticus27:33 Janiraquiw cawquïritejj sumäqui uqhamaraqui cawquïritejj jan sumäqui ucasa ajllitäcaraquiniti
Leviticus27:34 Aca camachi arunacwa Tatitojj Moisesaru Sinaí kollu patan israelitanacataqui churänjja.
Numbers1:1 Payïri phajjsita mä uru sarakataru
Numbers1:2 “Take israelit jakenacat mä censo aptapjjam
Numbers1:3 pä tunca maranit amstaru
Numbers1:4 uqhamaraqui sapa familian jilïripampi sapakat tributa.
Numbers1:5 Acanacaw yanapt'apcätam uca jilïrinacan sutinacapajja: Rubén tributjja: Sedeur chachan
Numbers1:6 Simeón tributjja: Selumiel sat
Numbers1:7 Judá tributjja: Naasón sat
Numbers1:8 Isacar tributjja: Natanael sat
Numbers1:9 Zabulón tributjja: Eliab sat
Numbers1:10 José chachan wawanacapan tribunacapatjja acanaca: Efraín tributjja Elisama sat
Numbers1:11 Benjamín tributjja: Abidán sat
Numbers1:12 Dan tributjja: Ahiezer sat
Numbers1:13 Aser tributjja: Pagiel sat
Numbers1:14 Gad tributjja: Eliasaf sat
Numbers1:15 Neftalí tributjja: Ahira sat
Numbers1:16 Take aca jilïri jakenacaw sapakat tribut ajllitäna
Numbers1:17 Uqhamaw Moisesampi
Numbers1:18 ucatsti takpach marcaruw tantachapjjäna
Numbers1:19 cunjämatejj Tatitojj Moisesaru ewjjawaycäna uqhamar phokhasa. Aca censojj Sinaí sat wasara kollun lurasïna.
Numbers1:20 Cunapachatejj censojj luratäjjän sapa tributjama
Numbers1:21 
Numbers1:22 Simeón tributjja jact'asïnwa pheska tunca llätuncani waranka quimsa patacani jakenaca.
Numbers1:23 
Numbers1:24 Gad tributjja pusi tunca pheskan waranka sojjta pataca pheska tuncani jakenacaw jact'asïna.
Numbers1:25 
Numbers1:26 Judá tributjja pakallk tunca pusini waranka sojjta pataca jakenacaw jact'asïna.
Numbers1:27 
Numbers1:28 Isacar tributjja pheska tunca pusin waranka pusi patacani jakenacaw jact'asïna.
Numbers1:29 
Numbers1:30 Zabulón tributjja pheska tunca pakallkoni waranka pusi patacani jakenacaw jact'asïna.
Numbers1:31 
Numbers1:32 José chachan wawanacapatjja; Efraín tributjja pusi tunca waranka pheska patacani jakenacaw jact'asïna; Manasés tributjja quimsa tunca payan waranka pä patacani jakenacaw jact'asiraquïna.
Numbers1:33 
Numbers1:34 
Numbers1:35 
Numbers1:36 Benjamín tributjja quimsa tunca pheskan waranka pusi patacani jakenacaw jact'asïna.
Numbers1:37 
Numbers1:38 Dan tributjja sojjta tunca payan waranka pakallk patacani jakenacaw jact'asïna.
Numbers1:39 
Numbers1:40 Aser tributjja pusi tunca mayan waranka pheska patacani jakenacaw jact'asïna.
Numbers1:41 
Numbers1:42 Neftalí sat tributjja pheska tunca quimsan waranka pusi patacani jakenacaw jact'asïna.
Numbers1:43 
Numbers1:44 Take acanacaw Moisesampina
Numbers1:45 Take cawquïri israelitanacatejj pä tunca maranïpcäna
Numbers1:46 Takpachanisti jact'atajj sojjta pataca quimsan waranka pheska pataca pheska tuncani jakenacänwa.
Numbers1:47 Ucampisa levitanacajj janiw nayra awquinacapan tribunacapampi jaqhutäpcänti
Numbers1:48 jupanacatsti Tatituw Moisesaru aqham satayna:
Numbers1:49 “Cunapachatï israelitanacat censo aptapcäta ucqhajj
Numbers1:50 Levitanacarojj uchapjjätaw Tatitun Arust'äwi kollan chekan sirviñapataqui
Numbers1:51 Ucatsti cunapachatejj uca Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpajj mä chekat mä chekaru apatäni ucqhajj jupanacaw apapjjani
Numbers1:52 Maynïri israelitanacajj
Numbers1:53 Ucampisa levitanacajj Arust'äwi Carpan thiyaparuw puripjjani
Numbers1:54 Take israelitanacajj cunjämtï Tatitojj Moisesaru siscäna uqhamaruw lurapjjäna.
Numbers2:1 Tatitusti Moisesampiru
Numbers2:2 “Israelit jakenacajj Jiquisiñ Carpäquis ucqhatjja jaya chekaruw puripjjani
Numbers2:3 “Inti jalsu tokerusti puripjjaniw cawquïr ejercitonacatejj Judá tribun wiphalapanïqui ucanaca. Judá tribun ejercitopan jilïripasti Naasón chachawa
Numbers2:4 Jupanacasti censo aptatarjamajj pakallk tunca pusini waranka sojjta patacani jakenacänwa.
Numbers2:5 Jupanac chicasti Isacar tribun ejercitopaw puriraquini
Numbers2:6 ucatsti censo aptatarjamajj pheska tunca pusini waranka pusi patacani jakenacänwa.
Numbers2:7 Uqhamaraquiw jupanacamp chicajj Zabulón tribun ejercitopas puriraquïna
Numbers2:8 ucatsti censo aptatarjamajj pheska tunca pakallkon waranka pusi patacani jakenacänwa.
Numbers2:9 Uqhamatwa Judá tribun campamentopajj quimsa ejercitonacat utt'ayatäni
Numbers2:10 “Aynacha tokerusti Rubén tribun wiphalapanïqui uca ejercitonacaraquiw puripjjani. Rubén tribun ejercitopan jilïripajj Elisur sat chachawa
Numbers2:11 Ucatsti censo aptatarjamajj pusi tunc sojjtan waranka pheska patacani jakenacänwa.
Numbers2:12 Ucjjarusti jupanac chicajj puriraquiniw Simeón tribun ejercitopa
Numbers2:13 ucatsti censo aptatarjamajj pheska tunc llätuncani waranka quimsa patacani jakenacänwa.
Numbers2:14 Uqhamaraquiw jupanac chicajj puriraquini Gad tribun ejercitopa
Numbers2:15 ucatsti censo aptatarjamajj pusi tunca pheskani waranka sojjta pataca pheska tuncani jakenacänwa.
Numbers2:16 Uqhamatwa Rubén tribun ejercitopajj quimsa ejercitonacat utt'ayatäni
Numbers2:17 “Ucjjarusti levitanacaw sarantapjjani
Numbers2:18 “Inti jalanta tokerusti puripjjaraquiniw cawquïrinacatejj Efraín tribun wiphalapanïqui ucan ejercitonacapa. Efraín tribun ejercitopan jilïripajj Elisama chacharaquiwa
Numbers2:19 ucatsti censo aptatarjamajj pusi tunca waranka pheska patacani jakenacawa.
Numbers2:20 Jupanac chicasti puripjjaraquiniw Manasés tribun ejercitopa
Numbers2:21 ucatsti censo aptatarjamajj quimsa tunca payani waranka pä patacani jakenacawa.
Numbers2:22 Uqhamaraquiw jupanacamp chicajj puripjjani Benjamín tribun ejercitopa
Numbers2:23 ucatsti censo aptatarjamajj quimsa tunc pheskan waranka pusi patacani jakenacawa.
Numbers2:24 Uqhamatwa Efraín tribun campamentopajj quimsa ejercitonacat utt'ayatäni
Numbers2:25 “Amsta tokerusti Dan tribun wiphalapanïqui uca ejercitonacaw puripjjaraquini. Dan tribun ejercitopan jilïripajj Ahiezer chacharaquiwa
Numbers2:26 ucatsti censo aptatarjamajj sojjta tunca payan waranka pakallko patacani jakenacaniwa.
Numbers2:27 Jupanac chicasti Aser tribun ejercitopaw puripjjaraquini
Numbers2:28 ucatsti censo aptatarjamajj pusi tunca mayan waranka pheska patacani jakenacaniwa.
Numbers2:29 Uqhamaraquiw jupanacamp chicajj puripjjani Neftalí tribun ejercitopa
Numbers2:30 ucatsti censo aptatarjamajj pheska tunca quimsani waranka pusi patacani jakenacaniwa.
Numbers2:31 Uqhamatwa Dan tribun campamentopajj quimsa ejercitonacat utt'ayatäni
Numbers2:32 Take israelita familianacat censo apthapitajj sojjta pataca quimsani waranka pheska pataca pheska tuncani jakenacänwa.
Numbers2:33 Ucampis cunjämatejj Tatitojj Moisesaru ewjjawaycäna uqhamarojja
Numbers2:34 Israelit jakenacajj lurapjjänwa cunjamtï Tatitojj Moisesaru ewjjawaycäna uqhama: Sapakat mayniw quipca wiphalanacapamp chica purïna
Numbers3:1 Cunapachatejj Tatitojj Moisesaru Sinaí kolluna parlcän ucapachajj Aaronampina
Numbers3:2 Aarón chachan wawanacapajj acanacänwa: Nadabasti jilïri wawapänwa
Numbers3:3 Uca pusinpacharaquiw wawanacapajj Tatitur sirviñataqui sacerdotet loktatäpjjäna utt'ayatäpjjaraquïna
Numbers3:4 ucampis Nadab uqhamarac Abiú chachanacajj Tatitu nayräjjanwa jiwapjjäna
Numbers3:5 Tatitusti Moisesarojj sänwa:
Numbers3:6 “Leví tribun jakenacaparu jawsayam
Numbers3:7 Jupanacasti Aaronampiru
Numbers3:8 Uqhamaraquiw imapjjani Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpan take yänacapsa
Numbers3:9 Ucatsti levitanacarojj maynïri israelitanacatjja yakhachapjjaraquim
Numbers3:10 sacerdocio lurañanacsti Aaronan wawanacapan amparaparu jaytaraquim. Maynitejj jan cunäcasina sacerdotet sarnakani ucajj juchañchasin jiwayatäniwa.”
Numbers3:11 Tatitojj Moisesarojj sascaquïnwa:
Numbers3:12 “Take israelitanac taypitjja
Numbers3:13 Take jilïri wawanacasti nayanquiwa. Cunapachatejj nayajj egipcionacan jilïri wawanacap jiwarayayäta ucqhajj
Numbers3:14 Tatitojj Moisesarojj Sinaí wasara kollunjja sänwa:
Numbers3:15 “Levitanacar jacthapim jisc'a familiatjama jach'a familiatjama
Numbers3:16 Moisesasti takpach levitanacaruw jact'äna
Numbers3:17 Leví chachan wawanacapasti Gersón
Numbers3:18 Gersón chachan wawanacapasti
Numbers3:19 Coat chachan wawanacapasti jach'a familiatjamajj acanacaraqui: Amram
Numbers3:20 Merari chachan wawanacapajj jach'a familiatjamajj acanacänwa: Mahli
Numbers3:21 Libni
Numbers3:22 Take yokall wawanaca mä phajjsinit amstaru kellkantatanacajj pakallko waranka pheska patacani wawanacänwa.
Numbers3:23 Gersón chachan jach'a familianacapajj Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpa khepäjjap inti jalanta tokeruw puripjjäna.
Numbers3:24 Gersón chachan wawanacapan familiapana jilïri jakepajj Eliasaf chachänwa
Numbers3:25 Jupanacasti Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpanjja kollan lugar uñjañataqui uchatäpjjänwa
Numbers3:26 Uqhamarac cortina pation utjqui ucata
Numbers3:27 Coat chachan wawanacapajj Amram
Numbers3:28 Take uca yokall wawanaca kellkantatajj mä phajjsinit amstarojj quimsakallko waranka quimsa patacani wawanacänwa. Take aca jach'a familianacaw santuario uñjañatac uchatäna
Numbers3:29 ucatsti kollan chekat aynacha tokeruraquiw puripjjäna.
Numbers3:30 Aca jach'a familianacan jilïri irpapajj Elizafán chachänwa
Numbers3:31 Aca jach'a familianacaraquiw imapjjäna Tatitun Arust'äwi Arcapa
Numbers3:32 Levitanacan jilïri jakepajj Eleazar chachänwa
Numbers3:33 Merari chachan familianacapajj Mahli
Numbers3:34 Ucatsti take kellkantat yokall wawanacajj mä phajjsinit amstarojj sojjta waranka pä patacani wawanacäpjjänwa.
Numbers3:35 Jilïri irpiri jakepajj Zuriel sat chachänwa
Numbers3:36 Merari chachan wawanacapajj imapjjänwa kollan chekan tablanacapa
Numbers3:37 Uca quipcaraqui cawquïr lawanacatejj patio muyuntqui ucanacsa
Numbers3:38 Inti jalsu toketsti
Numbers3:39 Cunapachatejj Moisesampi
Numbers3:40 Tatitojj Moisesarojj sänwa: “Take israelitanacan jilïri wawanacap jacthapim
Numbers3:41 Ucatsti take israelitanacan jilïri wawanacap lantsti levitanacaru nayatac jilt'ayam. Nayätwa Tatitojja. Uca quipcaraqui luram israelitanacan uywanacapan nayrïri kallunacapampejja
Numbers3:42 Moisesajj take israelitanacan jilïri wawanacapwa jacthapïna
Numbers3:43 take yokall wawa kellkatanacajj
Numbers3:44 Ucatsti Tatitojj Moisesarojj sänwa:
Numbers3:45 “Apthapim take levitanacaru
Numbers3:46 Ucampis israelitanacan jilïri wawanacapajj levitanacat sipansa waljaniwa; uqhamasti jiläqui uca pä pataca pakallk tunca quimsani jilïri wawanac cutsuyasipjjañapataquejj
Numbers3:47 sapakat maynita pheska sencillo kollke mayïta
Numbers3:48 uca kollkjja Aaronampiru
Numbers3:49 Moisesasti uca kollkenacjja apthapïnwa
Numbers3:50 ucatsti apthapitajj waranka quimsa pataca sojjta tunca pheskani sencillo kollkenacänwa
Numbers3:51 Ucjjarusti take uca kollkenacjja churjjänwa
Numbers4:1 Tatitojj Moisesampiru
Numbers4:2 “Mä censo aptam jach'a familiatjama
Numbers4:3 quimsa tunca maranita
Numbers4:4 “Coat chachan wawanacapan lurañanacapajj wali kollanawa ucanacasti acanacawa:
Numbers4:5 Cunapachatejj takpach marcajj sarjjaruña munani ucqhajj Aaronampi wawanacapampejj kollan velonaca apakapjjani puncu mantañata
Numbers4:6 uca patarusti suma lip'ichinacampiw janjjatapjjaraquini
Numbers4:7 Ucatsti loktaña mesa patjjarojj mä morado telampiw janjjatapjjaraquini
Numbers4:8 Take uca patjjaruraquiw mä wila tela janjjatapjjani
Numbers4:9 Ucatsti mä morado tela aptasinjja candeleroruw ucampi imantapjjani
Numbers4:10 Take ucanacwa llawuntapjjäta suma lip'ichinacampi imantasa
Numbers4:11 “Korit lurat altarjjarusti mä morado telampiw janjjatapjjaraquini suma lip'ichinacampi imantasina
Numbers4:12 Ucjjarusti apthapipjjätaw cawquïri yänacatejj kollan chekan apnakatäcäna take ucanaca
Numbers4:13 Uqhamaraquiw altaran liq'inacapsa
Numbers4:14 Uca patjjarusti take cunanacatejj altaran sirviñatac apnakasqui ucanacwa uchapjjaraquïta: braseronaca
Numbers4:15 Cunapachatejj Aaronampi wawanacapampejj take kollana k'oma yänac llawthapiñ kalltapjjani
Numbers4:16 Eleazar sat Aarón chachan wawapajj lamparanacan aceitepa
Numbers4:17 Tatitusti Moisesampiru
Numbers4:18 “Jan jumanacajj munapjjamti Coat chachan familianacapan levitanac taypit chhakhañapjja.
Numbers4:19 Jan jupanacan jiwañampi mutuyatäpjjañapataqui kollan yänac llamct'apjjatap laycu
Numbers4:20 Uqhamatwa jupanacajj jan mantapcaniti cunatejj kollanäqui ucanac uñjirejja
Numbers4:21 Tatitojj Moisesarojj sascaquïnwa:
Numbers4:22 “Uqhamarac Gersón chachan wawanacaparojj jacthapim jach'a familiatjama
Numbers4:23 Quimsa tunca maranita
Numbers4:24 “Gersón chachan wawanacapan lurañanacapajj acanacawa:
Numbers4:25 Jupanacasti kollan chekan cortinapwa apapjjani
Numbers4:26 uqhamaraqui pation cortinanacapa
Numbers4:27 Aaronampi
Numbers4:28 Take acanacwa lurapjjani Gersón chachan wawanacapajja

Numbers5:22 Aca mutuyawiw jumarojj jutaniwa cunapachatejj uca maldicit uma umt'cäta ucapacha.’ Ucatsti warmejj arsuniwa: ‘Uqhamäpan’ sasa.

Numbers35:14 Jordán jawirat inti jalsu tokenjja quimsa
Numbers35:15 Aca sojjta marcanacaw jan juchañchatäñataqui jaltjjañ marcanacäni
Numbers35:16 “Cawquïritejj mayniru usuchjani mä hierrot lurat herramientampi
Numbers35:17 “Cawquïritejj mayniru kalampi jakt'asina jiwayañ munani
Numbers35:18 “Cawquïritejj mayniru mä lawampi jawk'antasin jiwayañ munani
Numbers35:19 Jiwayatan jac'a familiapaw jiwayaraquini
Numbers35:20 “Cawquïritejj mayniru uñisiñat nuct'ani
Numbers35:21 uqhamarac uñisiñatsa nuwjani
Numbers35:22 “Ucampisa cawquïritejj mayniru jan muncasina nuct'ani
Numbers35:23 uca quipcaraqui mä kalampisa jakt'araquini
Numbers35:24 ucapachasti marcan jakenacaw juezat sayt'apjjani
Numbers35:25 Marcan jakenacaw khespiyapjjani jake jiwayir jakerojja cawquïritejj jiwayañatac arcnakqui ucatjja
Numbers35:26 Ucampis jan juchañchatäñatac imantasiñ oraken korpapattejj mistuwayani
Numbers35:27 jiwayat jaken familiapajj marca ankäjjan jicjjatani
Numbers35:28 Cawquïritejj jiwaychi ucajj jan juchañchatäñatac imantasiñ marcanwa kheparjjani
Numbers35:29 “Aca ewjjanacasti jumanacataquejj mä leyïniwa
Numbers35:30 “Walja testigonacan arsutanacapatwa mä jake jiwayir jakejj juchañchasin jiwayatäni. Ucampisa mä sapa testigojj janiw asquïquiti qhitiru juchañchasin jiwayañataquisa.
Numbers35:31 “Janiraquiw cuna kollkes pagascaspati mä juchañchat jake jiwayirin jacañapa khespiyañataquejja
Numbers35:32 “Janiraquiw cuna kollkes catokascaniti
Numbers35:33 “Jan cuna jake jiwayañampis k'añuchapjjamti
Numbers35:34 “Janiraqui k'añuchapjjamti cawquïri orakentejj jacapcta ucarojja
Numbers36:1 Galaad chachan jach'a familianacapan jilïrinacapajja
Numbers36:2 —Tatituw jumar sistam suertet laquintañamataqui take israelitanacaru
Numbers36:3 Ucampisa jupanacatejj israelitanacan yakha tribunquir chachanacampi casarasipjjani ucqhajj
Numbers36:4 Ucjjarusti cunapachatejj Israelan khespiyasiñap marajj purinini ucqhajj
Numbers36:5 Ucatsti Moisesajj Tatitun yatichäwinacaparjamajj aca arunacampiw israelitanacaru säna: —José tribun jakenacapajj chekpachwa parlapjje.
Numbers36:6 Tatituw munani Zelofehad chachan imill wawanacapan cawquïrimpi casarasiñapsa
Numbers36:7 Cawquïri oraketejj Israelan sapakat mayniru wact'qui
Numbers36:8 Mä warmitejj cawquïri tributsa orakenaca herenciat catokani
Numbers36:9 Janiw cuna herenciasa pascaspati
Numbers36:10 Cunjämatejj Tatitojj Moisesaru siscatayna
Numbers36:11 ucatsti uqhamaw Zelofehad chachan imill wawanacapajj Maala
Numbers36:12 Jupanacasti Manasés chachan wawanacapäpjjänwa
Numbers36:13 Acanacasti leyinaca

Deuteronomy5:30 Jichhasti sanim jupanacaru: “Cuttjjapjjam carpanacamaru” —sasa.

Joshua1:4 Nayasti orakjja churapjjämawa wasara lugaratpacha
Joshua1:5 Take jacañamansti janiw qhitis atipañ puedcätamti. Nayaw jumampïscä cunjämatejj Moisesampïcäyätjja uqhama; janipuniw jaytcämati ni apanuccaraquïmasa.
Joshua1:6 Jumasti wali ch'amani sayt'asim janirac ajjsaramti. Aca marcaru orak laquiñajj jumaruw wact'tam; ucasti nayajj: —Herencia churä —siscäyata awquinacaparu ucawa.

Joshua2:1 Josué chachasti Sitim chekatjja pä jakenacaruw jan qhitinsa uñjcata qhitäna aqham sasa: “Sarapjjam
Joshua2:2 Ucatsti mayni jakew Jericó marcan reyiparojj yatiyäna aqham sasa: —Israelit jakenacaw jichha arumajj marcasar mantanipjje jiwasar uñakeri —sasa.
Joshua2:3 Ucatwa Jericó marcan reyipajj qhitäna Rahab warmin utaparu aqham sasa: —Mistunipjjpan cawquïri jakenacatï utamaru mantanipqui ucanacajja
Joshua2:4 Ucampis Rahab warmejj uca pani jakenacarojj utapanjj mä jan uñjcañawjaruw imantatayna
Joshua2:5 cunapachatï ch'amacthapjje uqhamaraqui marcan puncunacapajj niya jist'antasiñampëjjan ucapachaw uca jakenacajj sarjjapjje
Joshua2:6 Chekpachansa uca Rahab warmiw uca pani jakenacarojj imantatayna techo pataru lino sat alinacampi imjjatasa.
Joshua2:7 Reyin soldadonacapajj thakher mistuwayasinjja Jordán sat jawira tokeruw thaquinjama sarapjjäna
Joshua2:8 Ucatsti uca pani jakenacajj janïra iquirquipanwa Rahab warmejj uta pataru maqhatasina jupanacarojj saraqui:
Joshua2:9 —Nayasti yattwa Diosan jumanacaru aca orake churatapa
Joshua2:10 Nanacasti yatipjjaractwa cunapachatï Egipto marcat mistunipcta ucqhajja
Joshua2:11 Ucanac ist'asajja walpun ajjsarapjjta
Joshua2:12 ucatwa jichhajj mayipjjsma
Joshua2:13 jumanacasti munasiñ chuymampiy awquejjaru
Joshua2:14 Jupanacasti warmirojj sapjjänwa: —Jumatejj jan qhitirus yatiycäta nanacan jutatajj-jja
Joshua2:15 Rahab warmin utapasti perka patancänwa
Joshua2:16 Ucatsti saraquïnwa: —Sarapjjam qhä kollunacaru
Joshua2:17 Jupanacasti sapjjänwa: —Cuntejj juramentompi arsupcsma ucjja phokhapjjämawa.
Joshua2:18 Cunapachatï nanacajj aca marcaru mantanipcä ucqhajj jumasti aca wila lazo ventanamatjja warcokanïta
Joshua2:19 Uta mankhanquirit cawquïritï ankaru mistuni ucasti jupa pachpaw jiwascani
Joshua2:20 Ucampis jumatï qhitirus acanac arsütajja
Joshua2:21 Jupasti sänwa —Arunacamarojj phokhaspan —sasa. Ucatsti jakenacaru qhitanucusajj mä wila lazo ventanapat thaqui tokeru jaksüna.

Joshua2:24 Jupanacasti Josué chacharojj sapjjänwa: “Diosajj take uca orakenac jiwasaruw churistu; jichhasti uca oraken jaquir jakenacajj jiwasat yatisajj wal qhathatipjje” sasa.

Joshua6:26 Josué chachasti uca tiemponjja aca arunacwa Israel marcarojj arsuwayäna: “Diosasti maldispan cawquïri jaketï aca Jericó marca wastat sayt'ayani ucarojja; utan cimientopas jilïr yokap patjjaruraqui sayt'ayaspan
Joshua6:27 Uqhamaw Diosajj Josué chacharojj yanapäna
Joshua7:1 Ucampis Israel marcajj janiw phokcänti cuntejj Diosajj siscatayna ucanacjja. Diosasti: “Janiw cunsa Jericó marcat aptasipjjätati” sänwa. Ucampis mä jakew utjäna Acán sat sutini
Joshua7:2 Josué chachajj mayni jakenacaruw Jericó marcat qhitäna Hai sat orakeru
Joshua7:3 Cuttanisinjja jupanacajj Josué chacharojj sapjjanwa: “Janiw waquisquiti takpachan Hai marcar nuwantañapajja; waliquiw pä waranka jan ucajj quimsa waranka jakenacajja uca marcar t'unjañataquejja. Uca marca uñjir jakenacasti juc'aniquiraquiwa” sasa.
Joshua7:4 Uqhamapï Hai sat marcarojj quimsa warank jakenaca maqhatapjjäna t'unjañataqui
Joshua7:5 Hai sat marcanquir jakenacasti israelitanacarojj quimsa tunca sojjtani jakenac jiwarayäna; mayninacarusti marcan puncupat kala ch'iyañ chekacamaw arctapjjäna
Joshua7:6 Ucatsti Josué chachampi jach'a amuyt'an israelit jakenacampejj isinacap wiqhanokasipjjäna
Joshua7:7 Josué chachajj sänwa: —¡Ay
Joshua7:8 ¡Ay
Joshua7:9 Cananeo jakenacas
Joshua7:10 Ucatsti Diosajj Josué chacharojj sänwa: —Sayt'asim
Joshua7:11 Israel marcajj jach'a juchaniwa; p'aquintapjjew nayan jumanacampi arust'atajj-jja. Cunanacatejj t'unjatäñapäcän ucanacjja jupanacajj lunthatasinipjjewa
Joshua7:12 Ucatpï israelitanacajj jan uñisirinacapampejj nuwasiñ puedcanitejja
Joshua7:13 Sayt'asim ucatsti Israel marcaru tantacht'am: “Arumanthejj alwat chuymanacam k'omachasipjjam” sasa. Naya Israel marcan Tatitu Diosapaw sista: “Oh
Joshua7:14 Arumanthi alwasti tunca payan tribunacaw naya nayrakatan uñstapjjäta
Joshua7:15 Cawquïri jaketï juchani uñstcan ucasti ninampi phichhantatäniwa takpach familiapampi
Joshua7:16 Khepa urojj Josué chachajj wali alwat sartasïna
Joshua7:17 Ucatsti Josué chachajj Judá familiaruw sapa maynit uñstapjjam säna
Joshua7:18 cunapachatejj Zabdi sat familiajj jac'achasinïna maynit maynicama ucqhajj
Joshua7:19 Ucatsti Josué chachajj Acán jakerojj sänwa: —Wawajja
Joshua7:20 Acanajj Josué chacharojj sänwa: —Chekpachansa nayaw Israelan Diosap nayrakatan jach'a juch lurta
Joshua7:21 Jericó marcar mantasinjja
Joshua7:22 Ucatsti Josué chachajj jakenacaruw Acán sat jaken carpaparu qhitäna
Joshua7:23 Acanan carpapat apsunisajja
Joshua7:24 Josué chachasti Acán chacharuw irpjjaruyäna
Joshua7:25 Josué chachajj Acanarojj sänwa: —¿Cunatarac jumasti aca jan walinac lurapjjestasti? Jichhasti aca urunjja Diosay jumaru mutuypan nanacar jucha apanitamata —sasa. Josué chachan uca arunac tucuyipanjja
Joshua7:26 Ucjjarusti Acan chachan amayap patarojj walja kalanac montont'apjjäna
Joshua8:1 Diosajj Josué chacharojj sänwa: “Jan jumajj ajjsaramti ni sustjasimsa. Ejercitomampi saram ucatsti Hai sat marcaru t'unjanim; nayaw amparamaru churäma Hai marcan reyipsa
Joshua8:2 Jumasti cunjämtï lurta Jericó marcampejja uca quipca luraraquïta Hai marcarojja uqhamaraqui reyiparusa. Acamänsti jumanacaw take yänacap jumanacataqui apasinjjapjjäta
Joshua8:3 Josué chachasti wali sum waquichasïna takpach ejercitopampi Hai marcaru sarañataqui
Joshua8:4 “Jumanacasti marca khepäjjaruw imantasipjjäta
Joshua8:5 Nayasti chicat jakenacampiw marcar jac'achasinï
Joshua8:6 Jupanacasti nanacan jaltatajj uñjasajj
Joshua8:7 Ucapachaw jumanacajj mistunipjjäta cawqharutï imantasipcta ucqhata
Joshua8:8 Cunapachatï jumanacajj marcaru t'unjapjjäta
Joshua8:9 Ucatsti Josué chachajj sarapjjam sasaw säna ejercitoparojja
Joshua8:10 Khepärmanthisti Josué chachajj wali alwat sartasïna
Joshua8:11 Josué chachasti ejercitopampejj marcaruw nayräjjat jac'achasïna
Joshua8:12 Josué chachajj pheska waranka jakenacaruw imantäna Betel marcampi Hai marcampi chicäwjaru
Joshua8:13 Israel marcan ejercitopajj payaru t'akjtatänwa
Joshua8:14 Cunapachatejj Hai marcan reyipajj uqham pasascatapa uñjasajj
Joshua8:15 Josué chachajj jakenacapamp chicajj atipjatjamaw jaltjjapjjäna Hai jakenacan nayrapa wasara thaquinjama.
Joshua8:16 Uqham uñjasinjja take Hai marcanquir jakenacaw israelitanacar alist'apjjäna khepata
Joshua8:17 Janiw mä jakes Hai marcanjja kheparcänti
Joshua8:18 Ucatsti Diosajj Josué chacharojj aqham sänwa: “Jichhasti aca marcarojj t'unjayam
Joshua8:19 Ucatsti cawquïri ejercitotï inti jalanta toker imantasipcän ucanacajj mäquiw mistunipjjäna; marcar mantasin t'unjapjjäna
Joshua8:20 Cunapachatejj Hai marcanquir jakenacajj khepa toker uñtasinipjjän ucqhajj
Joshua8:21 Josué chachajj uqham Hai marcaru jakenacapan t'unjasquir uñjasajj uqhamaraqui nina akasquir uñjasasa
Joshua8:22 Ucjjarusti Hai marcanquir jakenacajj israelitanacan ejercitop taypiru muyuntataw uñjasipjjäna jan cawcsarus jaltañjamäquipanjja
Joshua8:23 Hai sat marcan reyiparusti janiraquiw jiwayapcänti; catuntawayasinjja Josué chachan nayrakataparuw irpapjjäna.
Joshua8:24 Ucjjarusti cawquïri jakenacatï jupanacaru khepat arcanipcatayna ucanacarojj takeniruw espadampi jiwarayapjjäna
Joshua8:25 Uca urusti tunca payani waranka jakenacaw Hai marcatjja jiwarapjjäna take chachanaca uqhamaraqui warminacasa.
Joshua8:26 Josué chachasti k'ala uca marcan jakenacar tucjañcamaw arupampi phokhäna.
Joshua8:27 Israelit jakenacajj take Hai marcan uywanacapa
Joshua8:28 Josué chachasti Hai marcarojj ninampiw phhichhantäna jan cuna jilt'ayasa
Joshua8:29 Hai marcan reyiparusti mä kokaruw cuncata warccatayäna jayp'ucama
Joshua8:30 Ucatsti Josué chachajj mä altar Israelan Dios Tatitupataqui Ebal kolluna luräna
Joshua8:31 cunjämatï Moisesajj israelitanacar siscäna
Joshua8:32 Ucjjarusti Josué chachajj altar lurat kalanacarojj Moisesan kellkatanacap amparapampi kellkäna
Joshua8:33 take israelit jakenacaraquiw Diosan arcap thiyaru tantachasipjjäna
Joshua8:34 Ucjjarusti Josué chachajj Diosan leyipatjja leet'änwa bendición arunaca uqhamaraqui maldición arunacsa.
Joshua8:35 Josué chachajj take arsüwinac leet'äna
Joshua9:1 Cawquïri reyinacatï Jordán jawirat inti jalanta token jacapcäna
Joshua9:2 Uca reyinacasti mä amtäwiruw mantapjjäna: Josué chachampi Israel marcampi nuwasiñataqui.
Joshua9:3 Ucampisa gabaonita jakenacajj sumwa yatipjjäna cunjamtï Josué chachajj lurcatayna Jericó marcampejja uqhamaraqui Hai sat marcampisa ucanacjja
Joshua9:4 jupanacajj Israel marcaru mä sallka lurañ amtapjjäna. Ucatwa gabaonit jakenacajj asnonacaparu thantha costalanac
Joshua9:5 uqhamaraquiw cayunacaparojj wali thantha wisqhunac uchasiwayapjjäna
Joshua9:6 Cunapachatejj gabaonit jakenacajj Gilgal sat israelitanacan campamentopar puripjjän ucqhajj
Joshua9:7 Ucatsti israelit jakenacajj jupanacarojj sapjjänwa: —Inas jumanacajj aca jac'anacan jacasipcsta; ¿Cunjämaraqui jumanacampi mä suma amtäwiru mantsnasti? —sasa.
Joshua9:8 Gabaón marcat jutir jakenacasti Josué chacharojj aqham sapjjaraquïnwa: —Nanacasti juman sirvirinacamaw tucupjjä —sasa. Ucatwa Josué chachajj jupanacaru jisct'äna: —¿Qhitïpjjaracta jumanacasti
Joshua9:9 Jupanacasti sapjjänwa: —Nanacajj wali jaya marcat jutapjjta. Diosaman jach'a ch'amanïtap yatipjjta
Joshua9:10 uqhamaraqui cunjämtï lurcatayna uca pani amorreon reyipampisa
Joshua9:11 —Ucatwa nanacan jilïri jakenacajjajj sapjjetu: Sarapjjam
Joshua9:12 Cuna urutï nanacajj jumanacar thakheri utanacajjat mistunipjjta ucqhajj uca t'ant'anacajj wali junt'üscänwa
Joshua9:13 uqhamaraqui uñjapjjam aca lip'ichi wayakanaca
Joshua9:14 Israelit jakenacajj uca gabaonit jakenacan mank'apjja mallt'apjjänwa
Joshua9:15 Ucatsti Josué chachajj uca jakenacampejj mä suma amtäwiruw jan nuwasiñatac mantäna
Joshua9:16 Quimsa urunac pasipanjja israelitanacajj acatjamat yatipjjäna uca Gabaón marcajj jupanacan jac'ancaquitapa
Joshua9:17 Ucatsti israelit jakenacajj Gabaón marcar puriñcamaw sarapjjäna
Joshua9:18 Ucampis israelitanacajj purisinjja janiw jiwarayapcänti jan ucasti jacañanacapjja perdonapjjänwa Gabaón marcanquir jakenacarojja
Joshua9:19 Ucatwa Israelan jilïri jakenacapajj sapjjäna: —Nanacasti Dios nayräjjana juramento lurapjjta; janiw jichhajj jiwayapquiristti ni cunsa lurapcaraquiristti.
Joshua9:20 Jichhasti jaytañäni jupanacar jacaskiri
Joshua9:21 Uqhamaw Israel marcan jilïri jakenacapajj jacañanacap perdonapjjäna Gabaón marcat jutir jakenacarojja
Joshua9:22 Ucatjja Josué chachajj gabaonit jakenacar jawsasinwa jisct'äna: —¿Cunatarac nanacar sallkjapjjesta wali jayat jutapjjta sasa? Jumanacajj chekpachansa aca pachpan jacapjjtajja
Joshua9:23 ucatwa jichhajj jumanacajj nanacan maldicitäpjjäta
Joshua9:24 Gabaonanquir jakenacajj Josué chacharojj sapjjänwa: —Nanacasti ucjja lurapjjtwa jumar ajjsarasina
Joshua9:25 Jichhasti nanacajj juman amparamancapjjtwa
Joshua9:26 Ucatsti Josué chachajj janiw israelit jakenacan gabaonit jakenacaru jiwayañap muncänti
Joshua9:27 ucampis uca Gabaón marcat jutir jakenacajj lawa
Joshua10:1 Adonisedec sutini Jerusalén marcan reyipajj
Joshua10:2 Aca yatïwisti juc'ampi ajjsartayäna
Joshua10:3 Ucatwa Adonisedec reyejj mä yatiyäwi apayäna acnïri reyinacaru: Hohan sat Hebrón marcan reyiparu; Piream sat Jarmut marcan reyiparu; Jafía sat Laquis marcan reyiparu; uqhamaraqui Debir sat Eglón marcan reyiparu aqham sasa:
Joshua10:4 “Jumanacasti jutapjjamay acsaru
Joshua10:5 Uqhamaw pheska amorreo reyinacajj sarapjjäna walja jakenacamp cuna; Jerusalén marcan reyipa
Joshua10:6 Ucatsti Gabaón marcanquir jakenacajj mä yatiyäwi Josué chacharu apayanipjjäna
Joshua10:7 Ucatsti Josué chachajj uca urpachaw take guerran nuwasir jakenacapampi mistuniwayäna.
Joshua10:8 Ucatwa Diosajj Josué chacharojj säna: “Jan jumajj ajjsarayasimti
Joshua10:9 Josué chachasti arum pakari jutasinjja
Joshua10:10 Diosaw uqham Gabaón chekan jakenacarojj wal sustjäna
Joshua10:11 Cunapachatï amorreo jakenacajj Bet-horón sat aynacha jalakasipcän israelitanacat jaltasa ucqhajj
Joshua10:12 Cunapachatï Diosajj israelitanacar amorreo marca catuyän ucqhajj Josué chachasti Tatituruw parläna Israel marca nayrakatana aqham sasa: “Jumasti inti sayt'am Gabaón marca pataru
Joshua10:13 Intimpi phajjsimpejj sayt'apjjänwa cuna horasatejj Israel marcajj uñisirinacapat phoksusipcän ucqhacama. Cunjämtï Justo sat jaken libropan kellkatäqui: “Intejj chica cieloruw sayt'äna
Joshua10:14 Janipuniw uca urjamajj utjcänti ni jichha tiemposa ni nayra tiemposa
Joshua10:15 Ucjjarusti Josué chachajj israelit jakenacampi chicaw Gilgal campamentonacapar cuttanjjapjjäna.
Joshua10:16 Uca pheska amorreonacan reyipajj jaltjjapjjänwa
Joshua10:17 Ucampis uca reyinacajj kheparojj jicjjatatäpjjänwa
Joshua10:18 Ucatwa Josué chachajj jakenacaru aqham sasa qhitäna: “Jumanacasti kalanac korumiyapjjam uca putu puncucama
Joshua10:19 Uccañcamasti jumanacajj janiraqui uca chekan kheparapjjamti
Joshua10:20 Cunapachatejj Josué chachajj uqhamaraqui Israel marcasa k'al amorreo marcar t'unjapjjäna waljaniru jiwarayasina ucqhajj cawquïri amorreo jakenacatï jacasipcän ucanacajj marcanacaparuw imantasipjjäna.
Joshua10:21 Ucampis Israel marcajj jan cuna camacht'ataw Maceda chekaru cuttanjjapjjäna Josué chachampi chica. Ucatsti janiraquiw qhitis jupanacatjja cuna jan walsa parlañ puedipcänti.
Joshua10:22 Ucatwa Josué chachajj jupanacar säna: “Jist'arapjjam uca putun puncupa; apsunipjjam uca pheska reyinacaru” sasa.
Joshua10:23 Uqhamwa jupanacajj lurapjjäna putu mankheta pheska reyinacar irpsunisa
Joshua10:24 Cunapachatejj Josué chachan nayrakataparu irpanipjjän ucqhajj Josué chachajj take israelit jakenacaruw jawsayäna ucatsti jilïri jakenacarojj aqham sänwa: “Jac'aru maqhatanipjjam ucatsti aca reyinacan cuncanacaparu cayunacamampi takjjatapjjam” sasa. Jupanacasti uqhamwa lurapjjäna.
Joshua10:25 Ucatsti Josué chachajj sänwa: “Jan jumanacajj ajjsarapjjamti ni sustjasipjjaraquimsa
Joshua10:26 Uc arsusinsti Josué chachajj jiwayänwa uca reyinacarojja
Joshua10:27 Cunapachatejj intejj jalantañ munjjän ucqhajj
Joshua10:28 Uca quipca uruw Josué chachajj Maceda marcar mantasina t'unjäna
Joshua10:29 Uca chekansti Josué chachampi israelit jakenacampejj Libna sat chekaruw mantapjjäna
Joshua10:30 Tatitusti uca marcjja jupanacarojj catuyaraquiquïnwa take cunanacatï utjcän ucanacamppacha
Joshua10:31 Ucjjarusti Josué chachajj take israelit jakenacampejj Libna marcat sartasinjja Laquis marcaruw puripjjäna
Joshua10:32 Pä uru pasipanjja
Joshua10:33 Ucatsti Horam sat Gezer marcan reyipaw ejercitopampi mistunïna Laquis marcaru arjjatañataqui
Joshua10:34 Laquis marcat mistuwayasinjja Josué chachajj israelit jakenacampejj Eglón marca jac'aruw puripjjäna ucat nuwantapjjaraquïna.
Joshua10:35 Uca quipca ururaquiw k'ala uca Eglón marcan jaquir jakenacarojj espadampi jiwarayapjjäna
Joshua10:36 Eglón sat marcatjja
Joshua10:37 Cunapachatejj israelitanacajj uca marcar mantapjjän ucqhajj
Joshua10:38 Ucqhatjja Josué chachampi israelit jakenacampejj Debir marcar mantasinwa t'unjapjjaraquïna.
Joshua10:39 Israelit jakenacajj cunjamtï Hebrón marcaru
Joshua10:40 Uqhamaw Josué chachajj take uca oraken jaquir jakenacaru atipjäna. Kollu token jaquir reyinacaru
Joshua10:41 Josué chachasti take uca oraken jaquirinacacuw atipjäna Cades-barnea chekat Gaza sat chekacama
Joshua10:42 Diosaraquiw Israel marcat arjjatasina nuwasiscäna.
Joshua10:43 Ucjjarusti Josué chachajj take israelit jakenacampi Gilgal sat campamentoruw cuttanjjapjjäna.
Joshua11:1 Cunapachatejj Jabín sat Hazor marcan reyipajj ucanac yatïna ucqhajj mä jakenac qhitäna Jobab sat Madón marcan reyiparu
Joshua11:2 take cawquïri reyinacatï kollu tokenacan jacapcäna
Joshua11:3 uqhamaraqui inti jalanta
Joshua11:4 Take uca reyinacasti walja soldadonacampi
Joshua11:5 Take jupanacaw mä suma arust'äwiru mantapjjäna
Joshua11:6 Ucampis Diosajj Josué chacharojj sänwa: “Jan ajjsaramti ni cuna laycusa
Joshua11:7 Ucatsti Josué chachajj take soldadonacapampiw saräna
Joshua11:8 Diosasti Israel marcaruw atipjaña churäna
Joshua11:9 Josué chachasti Diosan arsutaparjamajj phokhänwa
Joshua11:10 Ucjjarusti Josué chachajj cuttanisinjja Hazor sat marcar mantasinwa t'unjäna uca marcan suma arust'äwir mantañataqui p'ekenchatap laycu
Joshua11:11 uqhamaw take ucan jaquirinacaru jiwarayapjjäna. Take cunwa t'unjapjjäna
Joshua11:12 Uca pachparacwa maynïri suma arust'äwir mantir marcanacarojj luräna
Joshua11:13 Ucampis janiraquiw israelitanacajj cawquïri marcanacatï kollu tokenacancapcän uca marcanacarojj ninampi phichhantapcänti
Joshua11:14 Israelitanacajj jupanacataquiw take utjirinacjja
Joshua11:15 Diosajj cuntï Moisesaru siscäna ucanacjja Moisesajj Josué chacharuraquiw säna; Josué chachajj israelitanacarojj uca arsüwinacjja phokhayänwa
Joshua11:16 Uqhamaw Josué chachasti take uca orakenac catuntäna
Joshua11:17 Cawqhattï Halac sat kollojj Seir chekaru maqhatqui
Joshua11:18 Walja maranacaraquiw uca reyinacampejj nuwasïna.
Joshua11:19 Ucampisa mä sapa marcaquiw israelitanacampejj suma arust'äwiru mantäna
Joshua11:20 Dios quipcaraquiw uca jakenacarojj chuymanacap kalarayäna jupanacan wali ch'amampi israelitanacampi nuwasiñapataqui
Joshua11:21 Uca urunacanjja Josué chachajj t'unjaraquïnwa anaquitas sat jakenacaru
Joshua11:22 Janiw Israel marcanjja mä anaquita jach'a jakes utjcjjänti
Joshua11:23 Uqhamaw Josué chachajj takpach orakenaca catuntänjja

Joshua12:5 Aca reyin orakepajj Hermón sat kolluta

Joshua13:1 Cunapachatejj Josué chachajj chuymanëjjän ucqhajj
Joshua13:2 Filisteonacan orakenacapa
Joshua13:3 Cawquïri jawiratï Siho sat oraket sarqui
Joshua13:4 Aynacha tokerusti cananeonacan takpach orakepa
Joshua13:5 Giblitas sat marcan orakenacapas jilt'ascaraquïnwa
Joshua13:6 Naya Diosaw Israel marcan nayräjjapata uca sidonios sat jakenacar ananucuscä
Joshua13:7 Jichhasti jumajj aca orakenacjja uca llätunca tribunacar laquintam
Joshua13:8 Rubén
Joshua13:9 Cawquïri oraketï Aroer sat chekat sarqui ucqhata
Joshua13:10 Sehón tokenquir take marcanaca
Joshua13:11 Uqhamaraquiw jupanacarojj Galaad sat orakenacas wact'äna
Joshua13:12 Og sutini Basán reyin orakepamppacha
Joshua13:13 Ucampis israelitanacajj janiw Gesur sat marcarojj
Joshua13:14 Moisesasti janiraquiw Leví triburojj orak churcänti
Joshua13:15 Moisesasti Rubén triburojj orakenacjja churänwa cawqha familiatejj uca tribun utjcäna uqhamarjama.
Joshua13:16 Uqhamasti Rubén tribun orakepajja Aroer chekata Arnón sat jawircamänwa
Joshua13:17 Hesbón marcamppacha
Joshua13:18 Jahaza
Joshua13:19 Quiriataim
Joshua13:20 Uqhamaraqui Bet-peor
Joshua13:21 uqhamaraqui cawquïri marcanacatï pampanacan utjäna
Joshua13:22 Uqhamarus israelitanacajj Balaam sat layka jakerus jiwayapjjaraquïnwa
Joshua13:23 Uqhamaw Rubén tribun orakenacapajj Jordán jawircama purïna
Joshua13:24 Uca quipcaraquiw Moisesajj Gad sutini triburojj orakenaca churäna cawqha wawanacapay utjchi uqhamarjama.
Joshua13:25 Jupanacarusti wact'änwa Jazer orakenaca
Joshua13:26 Uqhamaraqui Hesbón chekatpacha Ramat-mizpa
Joshua13:27 Ucasti vallenacanjja Gad triburojj wact'änwa Bet-aram
Joshua13:28 Uca marcanacaw jisc'a marcanacamp cuna Gad triburojj wact'äna
Joshua13:29 Uca quipcaraquiw chicat Manasés triburus Moisesajj orakenac churäna kawkha wawapay utjchi uqhamarjama.
Joshua13:30 Manasés triburojj take Og reyin orakenacapäquis ucanacaw wact'äna uqhamaraqui takpach Basán sutini orakenaca
Joshua13:31 uqhamaraquiw Galaad orakesa chicatpacha churatäna
Joshua13:32 Take uca orakenacwa Moisesajj Manasés chicat triburu churäna Moab chekana
Joshua13:33 Ucampis Leví sat triburojj Moisesajj janiw cuna oraksa churcänti
Joshua14:1 Israelit jakenacajj acnïri orakenacwa Canaán chekan catokapjjäna mä herenciata

Joshua14:4 José chachan wawanacapajj paninïnwa
Joshua14:5 Cunjämtï Tatitojj Moisesaru siscän uqhamaruw Israel jakenacajj orakenacjja jalanokasipjjäna.
Joshua14:6 Ucapachasti Judá tribun wawanacapaw Gilgal campamentoru sarapjjäna
Joshua14:7 Nayasti ucapachajj pusi tunca maranïyätwa
Joshua14:8 ucampis cawquïri jakenacatï nayampi chica sarapcän ucanacajj purinisinjja wali ajjsarañanac Israel marcarojj yatiyapjjäna
Joshua14:9 Ucatwa Moisesajj arupa churitäna: “Cawqha orakerutï cayumajj tact'qui ucajj jumancapininiwa
Joshua14:10 Ucat acarusti pusi tunca pheskan maraw pasjje cunapachatï Diosajj uca arunaca Moisesaru arscäna ucatjja
Joshua14:11 ucampis nayajj wali ch'amanïsctwa
Joshua14:12 Ucatwa jichhajj maysma jumaru uca kollu nayar churañamataqui

Joshua15:1 Cawquïri orakenacatï Judá tribun familianacapar wact'cän ucanacajj Edom oraken korpapcamaw purïna

Joshua15:9 Muytasincaquïnwa kollu patanjama Neftoa sat uma jalsucama sarakasa
Joshua15:10 Baala chekatsti korpajj muytanïnwa intis jalantqui ucsacama Seir sat kollur puriñcama; pasascaquïnwa Quesalón sutin chekanjama Jearim kollu amsta thiyanjam pasasina ucata Bet-semes chekar puriñcama
Joshua15:11 Sarascaquïnwa Ecrón sat amsta mistuñanjama
Joshua15:12 Tucuyarusti inti jalanta toketjja korpajj Mar Mediterráneo sat jach'a kotaraquïnwa. Uca korpanacaraquiw Judá tribun orakeparus muytäna cawquïrtï familianacajj jaljasipcäna ucanaca.
Joshua15:13 Josué chachasti Jefone jaken Caleb yokaparojj Judá tribun orakenacapatjja churaraquïnwa cunjämtï Diosajj Josué chacharojj siscatayna uqhama

Joshua17:1 Cawquïri oraketï Josean jilïri wawapa Manasés triburu wact'cän ucasti acanacänwa

Joshua17:8 Tapúa marcajj Manasés triburu wact'cchïna ucasa

Joshua17:10 Uqhamaw Efraín tribun orakepajj uma jalsut aynach tokencänwa
Joshua17:11 Uqhamaraquiw Manasés tribusti marcanacapajj utjäna Isacar orakena

Joshua17:16 Jupanacasti sapjjaraquïnwa: —Chekpachansa nanacataquejj aca tribun kollunacapajj wali pisiwa. Ucampis pampanacan jaquir cananeo jakenacan carronacapajj hierrot luratäpjjewa
Joshua17:17 Ucatsti Josué chachajj Efraín tribun
Joshua17:18 jan ucasti uca ch'umi kollunacajj jumanacancaraquiniwa; jumanacajj uca ch'uminac catuntasipjjäta. Uca cananeo jakenacarusa
Joshua18:1 Cunapachatejj Israel marcajj take orakenac catuntañ tucuyatayna ucqhajj Silo chekaruw tantachasipjjäna ucan Diosampi mä suma amtäwiru mantañataqui uqhamarac Tatitumpi Jiquisiñ Carpa sayt'ayasa
Joshua18:2 Ucampis pakallko Israel tribunacajj janïraw cuna oraksa catokapcänti.
Joshua18:3 Ucatwa Josué chachajj Israel jakenacaru säna: “¿Cunapachcamarac jumanacasti aca orakenac jan catuntasipjjäta? Awquinacaman Tatitu Diosapajjay aca orak churapjjstamjja.
Joshua18:4 Jichhasti quimsa jakenac ajllipjjam sapa tributa
Joshua18:5 Aca jakenacaw uca orakenacjja pakallkoru jaljapjjani
Joshua18:6 Ucjjarusti jupanacajj uca orakenac pakallkoru jaljapjjani ucqhajj yatiyapjjetaniwa cunjämätaynas uca
Joshua18:7 Ucampis levitanacarojj janiw cuna orakes churascaniti
Joshua18:8 Cunapachatejj uca jakenacajj sarañataqui janc'aquïpjjan ucqhajj Josué chachajj jupanacarojj sänwa: “Sarapjjam uca orakenac uñatatiri ucatsti jalanokanipjjam
Joshua18:9 Uqhamaw uca jakenacajj take uca chekanac uñatatanipjjäna
Joshua18:10 Ucatsti Josué chachajj Dios nayrakatan uca orakenacjja israelit jakenacar suertetcam churäna Silo sutini chekana.
Joshua18:11 Cunapachatejj suerteta orakenacajj churatäna ucqhajj Benjamín triburojj Judá tribun orakepampi uqhamarac José tribun orakepampi chica taypiruw wact'äna.
Joshua18:12 Uca oraken korpapajj amsta chekata kalltanïna Jordán jawir toketa
Joshua18:13 Uca chekatsti sarascaquïnwa Luz sat chekaru (cawqhatï Betel satäcaraqui) uca aynacharu
Joshua18:14 Ucjjarusti korpajj cuttänwa Mediterráneo sat jach'a kota tokeru
Joshua18:15 Aynacha toketjja korpasti kalltanïnwa Quiriat-jearim satäquis
Joshua18:16 Ucatsti saracascaquïnwa mä kollun tucuyapcama cawquïritï Ben-hinom valle uñcatasincqui ucacama
Joshua18:17 Ucjjarusti amsta toker sarasinjja En-semes sat chekaruw mistüna
Joshua18:18 uca khata amstäjja pasasina
Joshua18:19 Ucjjarusti Bet-hogla sat amsta tokenjam pasawayäna
Joshua18:20 Inti jalsu toketsti Jordán jawiraw korparaquïnjja. Ucanacawa Benjamín triburu churatäcän uca oraken korpanacapajja.

Joshua22:1 Ucatsti Josué chachajj Rubén

Joshua22:3 Jichhürcamajja take aca tiemponacansa janipuniw jilanacamarojj jaytanucupctati
Joshua22:4 Diosajj arunacapjja phokhewa
Joshua22:5 Nayasti jumanacatjja aca mayipjjsma
Joshua22:6 Ucanac arsusajj Josué chachajj jupanacarojj bendizjjänwa
Joshua22:7 Maynïri chicat Manasés triburojj Moisesajj Basán chekanwa orakenac churjjatayna. Maynïri chicat Manasés triburojj Josué chachajj israelit jilanacapan orakenacap taypiruraquiw churäna
Joshua22:8 aqham sasa: “Jumanacasti orakenacamar cutjjapjjam take yänacamampi
Joshua22:9 Uqhamaw Rubén
Joshua22:10 Cunapachatejj Rubén
Joshua22:11 Maynïri israelit jakenacajj yatipjjänwa uca Rubén
Joshua22:12 Uc ist'asinjja take Israel jakenacaw Silo sat chekan tantacht'asipjjäna jupanacampi nuwasir sarañataqui.

Joshua22:14 Jupampi chicasti tunca jach'a jilïri Israel jakenacaw sarapjjaraquïna
Joshua22:15 Take jupanacasti Galaad sat orakeruw sarapjjäna
Joshua22:16 —Nanacasti Diosan marcapan sutipjjaruw parlapjjsma. ¿Cunatsa jumanacajj Israel marcan Diosaparu ñankhachapjjta ucanac lurasajja? ¿Cunatsa Diosar apanucusina mä altar lurasisina Dios contra sayt'apjjta?
Joshua22:17 ¿Janit jumanacataquejj juc'aquïqui Peor sat chekan juchanaca lurctan ucajja
Joshua22:18 ¿Cunat juc'ampsa munasipcacta
Joshua22:19 Cawquïri orakenactï jumanacaru churapjjtam ucanacatejj jan Diosatacjamäcchi ucajja Diosan orakepäquis ucaru jutapjjam
Joshua22:20 Amtasipjjaraquim Acán sat Zara chachan wawapajj jucha lurcän ucata. Jupasti cunatejj t'unjatäñapäcän Tatitur loktasina
Joshua22:21 Ucatwa Rubén
Joshua22:22 —Diosanacansa Diosapa Tatituw nanacar yatipjjetu
Joshua22:23 Nanacatï aca altarjja Diosat jithektañataqui lurapjjsta
Joshua22:24 Chekpachansa nanacajj aca altarjja lurapjjtwa khepürun jan jumanacan wawanacamajj nanacan wawanacajjaru sañapataqui: “Cuna lurañamas utji Israel marcan Diosapampejja
Joshua22:25 Diosaw Jordán jawir mä korpat uscuwayi Rubén
Joshua22:26 Ucatwa nanacajj acan mä altar lurañaru uscusipjjta
Joshua22:27 jan ucasti mä suma amtasïwïñapataqui nanacampi
Joshua22:28 Cawquïritï nanacaru
Joshua22:29 Diosajj nanacar juchañchapjjetpan
Joshua22:30 Cunapachatï Finees sat sacerdotesa
Joshua22:31 Ucatsti Finees sutini Eleazar sacerdoten wawapajj jupanacarojj sänwa: —Jichhasti yattanwa Diosajj jiwasanac taypincascatapa; jumanacajj janiraquiw Dios contras sayt'asiñ amtapcatätati
Joshua22:32 Ucanac pasipanjja Finees sacerdotejj uqhamaraqui jach'a jilïri Israel jakenacasa
Joshua22:33 uca arunac ist'asajj Israel jakenacajj: “Waliquiw” sapjjänwa
Joshua22:34 Rubén
Joshua23:1 Walja maranacaw pasjjäna cunapachatï Diosajj Israel marcaru uñisirinacapat samaraña churäna ucatjja
Joshua23:2 Josué chachajj take Israel marcaru
Joshua23:3 Jumanacajj uñjapjjtawa cunjämtï Diosajj take jumanac contra sayt'ir marcanacampi lurqui ucjja
Joshua23:4 Nayasti sapakat mayni tribunacaruw aca orakenac laquintapjjsma
Joshua23:5 Tatitu Diosaraquiw aca oraketjja jakonucuni
Joshua23:6 “Jumanacasti wal ch'amañcht'asipjjam
Joshua23:7 Uqhamaraqui jumanac taypin jaquir yakha marcanquir jakenacampejj janipuni chicachasipjjamti
Joshua23:8 Tatitu Diosampi chict'atapun sarapjjam cunjämatï jichhacam sarasipcta uqhama.
Joshua23:9 Diosaw jumanac nayräjjatjja walja marcanacaru
Joshua23:10 Jumanacat mä sapa jakequiw waranka jakenacaru jaltayaspajja
Joshua23:11 Ucampis jumanacpachat amuyasipjjam
Joshua23:12 Ucampis jumanacajj yatipjjam
Joshua23:13 Diosasti janiw uca jakenacarojj jumanacan nayräjjamat jakonuccaniti
Joshua23:14 “Nayasti niyaw jiwjjä
Joshua23:15 Ucampis cunjämatï Diosajj take suma arunacap phokhawayqui

Joshua24:1 Josué chachasti take Israelan tribunacaparuw Siquem oraken tantachthapïna. Jawsayänwa awquinacaru
Joshua24:2 Takpach Israel marcaruw parläna: “Aqham siwa Israel marcan Diosapajja: ‘Nayrapachajj jumanacan nayra awquinacamajj
Joshua24:3 Nayaw Abrahamarojj irpsunta Eufrates jawir toketa
Joshua24:4 Isaacarusti pani wawanac churta
Joshua24:5 Ucatsti nayajj Moisesampiru
Joshua24:6 Cunapachatejj jumanacan awquinacamajj Egipto marcat mistunipjjän ucqhajj
Joshua24:7 Jupanacasti nayaruw mayipjjetäna
Joshua24:8 Nayaraquiw amorreonacan orakeparojj irpanipjjsma
Joshua24:9 Ucjjarusti Balac jakejj jumanacampi nuwasiriw jutaraquïna; jupasti Zipor sat Moab marcan reyipan yokapänwa. Ucatsti Balac jakejj Balaam sat Beor chachan wawap thakeriw qhitäna jumanacaru maldiciyañataqui.
Joshua24:10 Ucampisa nayajj janiw Balaam chachampi jumanacar maldiciyapcsmati
Joshua24:11 Ucatsti jumanacajj Jordán jawir pasanisajja
Joshua24:12 Uca pani amorreonacan reyiparojj janiw jumanacajj espadampi ni arcompisa atipapctati jan ucasti nayaw chuymanacapar ajjsarañ uchta
Joshua24:13 Uqhamaraquiw jumanacarojj walja orakenac churapjjsma
Joshua24:14 Ucatsti Josué chachajj sascaquïnwa —Take ucanacatjja Diosarojj ajjsarapjjamaya
Joshua24:15 Ucampisa janitï jumanacajj Diosar sirviñ munapcsta ucajj
Joshua24:16 Ucatsti marcajj sänwa: —Diosajj jan munpati jiwasan juparu apanucuñasjja
Joshua24:17 Diosaw jiwasaru Egipto marcat cawqhantï jiwasajj esclavot sarnakcäyätan
Joshua24:18 Juparaquiw jiwasan nayrakatasatjja take marcanacaru jakonucu thaquinjja
Joshua24:19 Ucampisa Josué chachajj jupanacarojj sänwa: —Jumanacajj janiw Diosarojj sirviñ puedipcasmati
Joshua24:20 Jumanacatï Diosaru apanucupjjäta yakha diosanacar sirviñataqui
Joshua24:21 Israel jakenacajj sapjjänwa: —Janiw ucajj uqhamäcaniti
Joshua24:22 Josué chachasti jupanacarojj sänwa: —Jumanacpachaw testigöpjjtajja Diosar sirviña ajllisipjjatamatjja —sasa. Jupanacasti —Testigöpjjtwa —sapjjänwa.
Joshua24:23 —Jichhasti jumanac taypitjja apanucupjjam uca yakha diosanacaru
Joshua24:24 Ucatsti Israel jakenacajj Josué chacharojj sänwa: —Nanacasti Tatitu Diosajjaruquiw sirvipjjä
Joshua24:25 Uca quipca ururaquiw Josué chachajj Siquem sat chekan mä suma amtäwiru Israel marcampi mantäna
Joshua24:26 Ucanacsti Diosan camachi arunacap kellkat libroruw kellkantaraquïna
Joshua24:27 Ucat Israel marcarojj saraquïna: —Aca kalasti mä arsurit utt'ayatäniwa
Joshua24:28 Ucjjarusti Josué chachajj sapakat mayniruw orakeparcama qhitanucjjäna.
Joshua24:29 Take ucanac pasatatsti Nun chachan Josué yokapajj jiwjjänwa patac tuncani maranëjjän ucapacha.
Joshua24:30 Ucatsti imantjjapjjänwa Timnat-sera marcapan orakeparu
Joshua24:31 Israel marcasti Diosarojj sirvïnwa cunapachatï Josué chachajj jacascäna ucqhacama
Joshua24:32 Israelitanacajj Egipto marcat apanita Josean ch'aqhanacapjja Siquem sat marcaruw imantjjapjjäna

Judges1:1 Josué chachan jiwjjatapatsti
Judges1:2 Ucatsti Diosajja jupanacarojj sänwa: “Judá tribuwa nayrakata nuwasirejj mistsuñapa
Judges1:3 Ucampis Judá tribunquirinacasti jilanacaparuw yatiyapjjäna Simeón sat tribunquirinacaru
Judges1:4 Uqhamaw judänquirinacajj atipjasinjja cananeonacana
Judges1:5 Uqhamarac Bezec sat orakensti Adonisedec sat chacharuraquiw jicjjatapjjäna
Judges1:6 Adonisedec chachasti jaltjjänwa imantasiñataqui
Judges1:7 Ucatsti Adonisedec chachajj saraquïnwa: “Nayrasti nayajja pakallko tunca reyinacaruwa amparanacatsa
Judges1:8 Judá tribunquirinacasti Jerusalén marca catuntasipjjäna. Ucatsti uca marcanquirinacarojj espadampcamaw jiwarayapjjäna
Judges1:9 Ucjjarusti catuntapjjaraquïnwa Néguev kollunacan jaquirinacaru
Judges1:10 Ucat sarapjjaraquïnwa Hebrón marcan jaquir cananeonacar catuntañataqui. Nayrasti aca marcajja Quiriat-arba satänwa. Ucjjarusti atipjasinjja catuntasipjjaraquïnwa Sesai
Judges1:11 Ucatsti Debir sat marcaruraquiw atipjas catuntasipjjäna aca marcasti nayrajj Quiriat-sefer sataraquïnwa.
Judges1:12 Caleb chachasti arsünwa: “Qhititejj Debir marcaru atipjcani ucarusti nayajj Acsa sat phuchajjwa churäjja warmipäñapataqui” sasa.
Judges1:13 Uca marcarusti Otoniel sata chachaw atipjäna
Judges1:14 Otonielasti
Judges1:15 Ucat jupasti saraquïnwa: —Nayajja mayiñwa munsma
Judges1:16 Hobab quenita sata Moisesan awcch'ipan wawanacapasti Palmeras sat marcatsti Judá tribunquirinacampiw mistsupjjäna Judá wasararu Arad sat chekata aynacharu. Ucatsti ucaruwa kheparapjjäna ucanquir jakenacampi chica jacañataqui.
Judges1:17 Judá sat tribunquirinacasti
Judges1:18 Ucampis Judá tribunquirinacasti janiw ch'amanïpcänti catuntañataquejja Gaza
Judges1:19 Diosasti judänquirinacampi chicäscänwa
Judges1:20 Caleb chacharusti Hebrón sat orakewa wact'äna
Judges1:21 Ucampis Benjamín sat tribunquirinacasti janiw Jerusalén marcatjja jebuseos satanacajj uca marcan jacapcäna ucanacarojj alisnucupcänti. Uca laycuwa jichhürcamajja jebuseonacampi
Judges1:22 José sat tribunquirinacajj amtasipjjänwa Betel marca nuwantas catuntasiñataqui.
Judges1:23 Aca marcasti nayrajj Luz sat sutinïnwa
Judges1:24 Uñakerinacasti
Judges1:25 Ucampis uca jakejja iyawsasawa uñacht'ayäna marcaru mantaña puncjja
Judges1:26 Ucatsti uca jakejja sarawayjjänwa hitita satanacan orakeparu
Judges1:27 Manasés sat tribunquirinacasti janiw ch'amanïpcänti jakonucuñataqui Bet-seán
Judges1:28 Uca khepatsti israelitanacajj wali ch'amani tucjjasinsti
Judges1:29 Uqhamaraqui Efraín sat tribunquirinacasti janiraquiquiw ch'amanïpcänti Gezer sat marcana jacapcäna uca cananeonacaru alisnucuñataquejja
Judges1:30 Zabulón sat tribunquirinacasti janiraquiquiw alisnucuñataquejj ch'amanïpcänti Quitrón
Judges1:31 Aser sat tribunquirinacasti janiraquiquiw ch'amanïpcänti alisnucuñataquejja Aco
Judges1:32 cawqhantejj Aser sat tribunquirinacajj jacapcäna uca marcat jan alisnucupjjatapatjja cananeonacajj kheparapjjänwa uca marcanjja jupanac taypina jacañataqui.
Judges1:33 Uqhamaraqui Neftalí sat tribunquirinacajja janiraquiquiw alisnucupcänti Bet-semes

Judges2:1 Diosan angelapasti Gilgal chekata Boquim sat chekaru sarasinjja israelitanacarojj sänwa: “Nayawa jumanacarojj Egipto marcata irpsunisajj aca orakeru irpanipjjsma
Judges2:2 jumanacajja aca oraken jaquirinacampejj jan suma arust'äwiru mantapjjamti
Judges2:3 Uqham lurapjjatanacamatsti nayajj sapjjsmawa: Janiwa uca jakenacjja alisnuccäti jumanaca taypitjja
Judges2:4 Angelajj uqham parlaña tucuyjjepansti
Judges2:5 Ucatwa uca chekarojj Boquim sasa sutichapjjäna
Judges2:6 Josué chachasti israelitanacan sarjjapjjañapataquiw arsüna
Judges2:7 Josué jacquipansti
Judges2:8 Ucampis Nun sat chachan Josué yokapasti jiwjjänwa patac tunca maranëjjan ucqha.
Judges2:9 Amayapjja imt'jjapjjänwa Timnat-sera satäqui uca orakeparu. Aca orakesti Gaas sat orak lomanacata amstanquiwa
Judges2:10 Uca khepatsti Josué chachampi chica jaquir israelitanacajja takeniraquiw jiwarjjapjjäna; uca khepat nacir israelitanacasti janiw Diosatjja cunsa yatiñjja muncjjapjjänti
Judges2:11 Israelitanacajja Diosansa uñjcatawa jan walinaca lurapjjäna. Jupanacasti kalltapjjänwa cunayman Baal sat diosanacaru yupaychaña.
Judges2:12 Israelitanacasti Diosatjja armasjjapjjänwa. Cawquïr nayra awquinacapan Diosapatejj Egipto marcat jupanacaru irpsuncäna ucarojja. Jupanacasti uca jac'an jaquir jakenacan diosanacaparu yupaychañaruw catuyasipjjäna
Judges2:13 Jupanacasti Diosatjja armasiwayapjjänwa Baal sat diosaru
Judges2:14 Uqham uñjasinsti Diosajj Israel marca contra colerasisajja lunthatanacampiw cunanacapatejj jupanacan utjqui ucanaca aparayäna
Judges2:15 Israelitanacajj sapa cuti nuwasiri mistupcäna ucqhasti Diosajj jupanac contraw tucüna
Judges2:16 Uca khepatsti Dios pachparaquiw jilïrinaca sayt'ayaraquïna jupanacaru jan wali luririnacata khespiyañapataqui.
Judges2:17 Ucampis israelitanacajj uca jilïrinacarojj janiw ist'añjja munapcänti. Dios nayrakatan jan walïpjjatap laycusti yakha diosanacaru yupaychiriw sarapjjäna. Jupanacan nayra awquinacapasti Diosan mandamiento arunacaparu ist'asaw jacapjjäna
Judges2:18 Diosasti sapa cuti mä jilïri sayt'aycäna ucarusti yanaparaquïnwa
Judges2:19 Cunapachatejj uca jilïrejj jiwjjäna ucqhajja
Judges2:20 Diosasti
Judges2:21 Uca laycusti nayajj janiw mayampis jupanac taypitjja alisnucjjäti cawquïr marcanactejj Josueajj janïr jiwcasina jan alisnuccäna ucanacjja” sasa.
Judges2:22 Uqham Diosajj arsusinsti israelitanacarojj uñjañwa munäna Diosan thaquipana sarapjjaspati
Judges2:23 Ucatwa Diosajj uca marcanacjja jan mäq alisnuccänti ni Josué chachan amparaparus catuycaraquïnti alisnucuñapataqui
Judges3:1 Diosasti aca marcanacwa kheparayäna Canaán orakeru
Judges3:2 Diosasti uqhamjja kheparayänwa qhitinacatejj nuwasiñanacana
Judges3:3 Kheparapjjänwa filisteonacan pheska jilïrinacapa
Judges3:4 Uca marcanacampisti
Judges3:5 Uqhamasti israelitanacajj kalltapjjänwa jacañjja cananeonaca
Judges3:6 Ucatsti israelitanacana yokanacapasa
Judges3:7 Israelitanacasti Dios Awquipat armasisajja cunanacatejj Diosatac jan walïqui ucanacwa lurapjjäna. Jupanacasti cunayman uñtasit Baal
Judges3:8 Diosasti uqham uñjasinjja jupanacatac colerasisasti Cusan-risataim sat Mesopotamia marcanquir reyin amparaparuw catuyäna. Ucatsti israelitanacajj Cusan-risataim sat reyirojj quimsakallko marawa sirvipjjäna.
Judges3:9 Israelitanacasti Diosaruw arnacasjjapjjäna
Judges3:10 Diosan ajayupawa Otoniel chachjjaru jutäna ucatsti israelitanacaruw khespiyi. Cunapachatejj nuwasiri mistscäna ucqhajja Diosawa atipt'ayäna Cusan-risataim sat reyirojja.
Judges3:11 Uca khepatsti uca orakenjja pusi tunca marawa samarañajja utjäna. Cenaz sat chachan Otoniel yokapajj jiwjjaraquïnwa.
Judges3:12 Otoniel jiwjjatatsti israelitanacajj wastatampiw Diosajj cuntejj jan munqui uca jan wali jucha lurañanaca lurjjapjjaraquiquïna
Judges3:13 Eglón sat reyisti mayacht'asïnwa
Judges3:14 Israelitanacajja Eglón sat moabitanacan reyiparusti tunca quimsakallkon marawa sirvipjjäna.
Judges3:15 Ucat israelitanacajj Diosaru arnakasjjapjjäna; Diosajj arnakasitanacap ist'asinsti mä khespiyirwa jupanac taypit sayt'ayäna. Aca khespiyiristi mä ch'ekachünwa Aod sat sutini
Judges3:16 Ucampis Aod sat chachasti pä puntani espada lurasiwayäna
Judges3:17 Ucat saräna moabitanacan Eglón sat reyiparu wajjt'äwi churiri
Judges3:18 Eglón sat reyiru churawayasinsti
Judges3:19 Gilgal sat marca jac'ancqui uca c'ari diosanac thiyaru purisasti
Judges3:20 Aod chachajj sapaquiwa reyina verano sat horasan kamaña utaparojj kheparäna
Judges3:21 Ucampis Aod chachajja ch'ekachütap laycusti
Judges3:22 Wali ch'amampi jununtatap laycusti
Judges3:23 Ucat Aod chachajja puncuna aldabanacampi aldabrantawayasinsti ventanatwa mistsuwayjjäna.
Judges3:24 Aod sat chacha sarjjatatsti
Judges3:25 Ucampis jupanacajj wali jaya suyasinsti
Judges3:26 Jupanacan uqhama suyquipansti
Judges3:27 Ucat israelitanacan orakepar purisasti ovej wajjratwa pututt'äna Efraín sat lomanacata israelitanacar jawsañataqui. Uqham pututt'ir ist'asinsti take israelitanacaw lomanacat sarakanipjjäna
Judges3:28 Aod chachajj sänwa: —Sarañäni
Judges3:29 Uqham sarasinsti israelitanacajj tunca waranka wali ch'amani
Judges3:30 Uqhamawa israelitanacajj moabitanacaru jiwarayasina tucjapjjäna. Ucatsti uca orakenjja quimsakallk tunca maranacawa samarañajj utjäna.
Judges3:31 Uca khepatsti israelitanacar khespiyirejj Samgar satänwa Anat sat chachan yokapa. Jupasti yunta sarayañ ari puntan fierrompiw sojjta patac filisteonac jiwarayäna. Uqhamatwa Samgar chachajja israelitanacaru khespiyaraquiquïna.
Judges4:1 Aod sat chacha jiwjjatapatsti
Judges4:2 Uqham uñjasinsti Diosajj cananeonacan Jabín sat reyipan ch'amaparuw catuyäna. Aca reyisti apnakänwa Hazor sat marcana. Jupan ejercitopan jilïripasti Sísara sataraquïnwa
Judges4:3 Jabín sat reyisti llätunca pataca fierrot lurata carronacanïnwa. Uca laycusti pä tunca maranacawa israelitanacarojj t'akhesiyapjjäna. Uqham t'akhesiñana jicjjatasisajja israelitanacajja Diosaruw arnakasjjapjjäna yanapt'añapataqui.
Judges4:4 Qhä urunacasti israelitanacajja mä Diosat parliri warmina apnakatäpjjänwa
Judges4:5 Deborasti palmera sat koka cayunacpini konusiña yatïna (aca kokasti “Deboran palmerapawa” sat sutimpi uñt'ataraquïnwa
Judges4:6 Mä urusti Débora sat warmejj qhitänwa jawsiri Barac sat chacharu jupasti Abinoam satan yokapawa. Aca Barac sat chachasti Cedes sat marcanjja Neftalí sat tribu taypinwa jacäna. Ucampis jawsayanisajj sänwa: —Israel marcan Diosapasti jumarojj aqham sasaw sistamjja: “Saram Tabor sat kolluru ucansti tunca waranka chachanaca tantacht'am Neftalí

Judges4:9 Ucatsti Deborajj saraquïnwa: —Uqhamasti nayajj saräwa jumampi chica
Judges4:10 Cedes sat marcansti
Judges4:11 Cedes sat marca jac'anjja Zaanaim sat encina jac'an Heber sat quenitajj utapwa lurasïna

Judges4:13 tantacht'änwa llätunca pataca fierrot lurat carronacapa

Judges4:15 Diosasti Barac chachampi nuwantasiña horasasti
Judges4:16 Ucañcamasti Barac sat chachajj arctascaquïnwa carronacaru
Judges4:17 Hazor sat marca apnaker Jabín sat reyimpi
Judges4:18 Jael sat warmisti catoker mistunisajja sänwa: —Tata
Judges4:19 Sisarasti wali umat pharjatajja uma mayïna umt'añataqui
Judges4:20 Sisarajj saraquïnwa: —Uta puncuru sayt'asim qhitirac jutasina jisct'iristam: “Aca mankhen utjiti qhitisa” sasa
Judges4:21 Ucampis Sisarajja wali karjata purisasti icjawayjjänwa jan sartquiri. Uqham uñjasinsti Jael sat warmejj mä martillompi
Judges4:22 Cunapachatejj Barac sat chachajj Sisararu thakher purinïna
Judges4:23 Uqhamaw Diosajj qhä urojj Jabín sat cananeonacan reyiparojj amuct'ayi jan cuns camsquiri israelitanacan nayrakatapanjja.
Judges4:24 Ucqhatwa israelitanacajj Jabín sat reyirojja sapa cuti wali t'akhesiyapjjäna; kheparusti k'alwa tucjapjjäna.
