Judges6:1 Israelitanacasti Diosan uñjcatajja cunayman jan walinacwa lurapjjäna. Ucatsti Diosajja pakallko maranacawa madianitanacan apnakatäñaru catuyäna.
Judges6:2 Ucampis madianitanacana wali t'akhesiyata uñjasisasti
Judges6:3 Ucampis cunapachatejj israelitanacajj cunsa yapuchasipcäna ucqhajja madianitanacasa
Judges6:4 Jupanacasti israelitanacan orakeparu jutasinjja
Judges6:5 Jupanacasti utanacapampi
Judges6:6 Uqhama madianitanacan luratasti
Judges6:7 Cunapachatejj israelitanacajj Diosaru arnakasipjjäna madianitanacat khespiyañapataqui ucqhajja
Judges6:8 Diosasti mä profeta qhithäna
Judges6:9 Janiwa egiptonquir jakenacatacjja khespiyapcsmati jan ucasti take jumanacar t'akhesiyirinacatwa khespiyapjjsmajja. Jupanacarusti jumanacan uñjcatawa alisnuctjja
Judges6:10 Ucatsti sapjjaracsmawa: ‘Nayätwa jumanacan Diosamajja
Judges6:11 Ucatsti Diosana mä angelapajj jutasinjja Ofra sat chekansti encina sat koka patjjaruw kont'asïna. Aca orakesti Joás sat chachancänwa
Judges6:12 Diosan angelapajj uñstasinjj sänwa: —¡Diosajj jumampïsquiwa
Judges6:13 Ucatsti Gedeonajj saraquïnwa: —Tata
Judges6:14 Diosasti uñcatasinjja sänwa: —Kawkhatejj ch'amamajj utjqui ucampi israelitanac khespiyir saram madianitanacan t'akhesiyatäñata. Nayawa jumarojj qhithascsma —sasa.
Judges6:15 Ucampis Gedeonajj wastatampiw saraqui: —Tata
Judges6:16 Diosasti sascaquïnwa: —Lurätawa
Judges6:17 Gedeonasti wastatampi sascaquïnwa: —Nayatejj juman qhuyapt'ayasiñama jicjjatsta ucajja
Judges6:18 Tata
Judges6:19 Gedeonasti sarasinjja waquicht'anïnwa mä cabrito
Judges6:20 Diosan angelapasti saraquïnwa: “Aychanacampi
Judges6:21 Ucat angelajja aychanacampiru
Judges6:22 Gedeonajj Diosan angelapätapa amuyasinsti sänwa: —¡Dios Tata! ¡Nayasti Diosan angelaparojj ajanuy ajanuw uñcatjja! —sasa.
Judges6:23 Diosasti saraquïnwa: —Jan ajjsaramti
Judges6:24 Ucatsti Gedeonajja mä altarwa Diosataqui waquicht'i ucarusti suticharaquïnwa “Diosawa samarañajja” sasa. Aca altarasti Ofra marcancasquiwa
Judges6:25 Ucampis uca arumpacharaquiw Diosajj
Judges6:26 Sayt'asiñ kollu patansti Diosamataqui mä altara luram. Ucatsti payïri orko vaca catusinsti uca patjjaru mä wilanchäwi sacrificio loktita. Qhuchthapcta uca ajjsarata koka lawanacampiw loktitäta —sasa.
Judges6:27 Ucatsti Gedeonajj tunca sirvirinacapampejj cunjämtejj Diosajj sisqui uqhamaruw luräna. Jupasti janiw urojj lurcänti jan ucasti arumaquiw luräna awquipana familiaparu
Judges6:28 Khepa arumarji khantatisti marcanquir jakenacajj sartasinsti uñjapjjänwa Baal sat diosan altarapajja allthapita
Judges6:29 Ucatsti maynit maynicamaw jisct'asipjjäna: “¿Qhitisa uqhama lurpacha?” sasa. Ucampis wali thakhasa jiscjjatasinjja yatjjatapjjänwa Joás sat chachan Gedeón yokapa luratapa ucatsti sarapjjänwa Joasan uca.
Judges6:30 Purisasti sapjjänwa: —¡Irpsunim uca yokamaru
Judges6:31 Ucampis Joás chachajja jutapqui uca jakenacarojj sänwa: —¿Jumanacasti Baal diosatti sayt'asipjjäta
Judges6:32 Uca urutsti Gedeonarojj Jerobaal sasaw sutichapjjäna
Judges6:33 Ucatsti take madianitanacampi
Judges6:34 Ucampis Diosan ajayupawa Gedeonjjaru jutäna
Judges6:35 Ucampis qhitharaquïnwa yatiyirinaca jawsaniñapataqui Manasés
Judges6:36 Gedeonasti Diosarojj saraquïnwa: “Jumatejj nayaru yanapchitäta Israel marcamaru khespiyañataqui
Judges6:37 Nayasti jichha arumajj mä jisc'a ovej lip'ichi uchawayäjja trigo jawk'añäqui uca chekaru. Arumarji khantatitejj uca jisc'a lip'ichejj ch'aranäni
Judges6:38 Uqhamapuniw lurasïna. Gedeonasti wali alwata sartasinsti
Judges6:39 Ucampis Gedeonajj sascaquïnwa: “Dios Tata
Judges6:40 Uca arumasti Diosajj uqhamwa luräna. Khepa arumarji alwatasti lip'ichejja wañaquiscänwa
Judges7:1 Gedeonan yakha sutipasti Jerobaal sataraquïnwa
Judges7:2 Diosasti Gedeonarojj saraquïnwa: “Jumampïpqui uca jakenacajja sinti waljanïpjjewa. Nayatejj israelitanacar yanapasa atipjayäjja madianitanacaru ucajja alabasipjjaspawa jupanacaquis ch'amanacapampi khespiyasipcaspa uqhama.
Judges7:3 Jichhasti yatiyamay jakenacaru qhititejj ajjsarqui ucajja cuttjjpan utaparu” sasa. Ucatsti Gedeonajj yatiñataquejj yant'änwa ucatjja pä tunca payani waranka jakenacaw sarjjapjjäna
Judges7:4 Ucampis Diosajj sascaquïnwa: “Jakenacajj waljaniquïsquiwa. Uca laycusti uma umt'iri anaquim
Judges7:5 Gedeonajja jakenacjja anaquïnwa umaru umt'apjjañapataqui. Ucampis Diosajj saraquïnwa: “Yakhacham cawquïr jakenacatejj umjja amparanacapampi phojjttasina anunacjama lakhontapcani ucanaca
Judges7:6 Uqhamasti cawquïr jakenacatejj amparanacapampi uma phojjttasina anunacjama lakhontapqui ucanacajja quimsa patacanïnwa. Ucampis mayninacasti takeniwa quillt'asina umar aljjatasa umarapjjäna.
Judges7:7 Ucampis Diosajj
Judges7:8 Gedeonajj chicata jakenacarusti qhitjjänwa utanacaparu. Ucampis janïra sarapquipanjja jupanacatjja apthapiyänwa wacullanacapa
Judges7:9 Uca arumasti Diosajj
Judges7:10 Ucampis jumatejj jupanacampi nuwasiña ajjsarsta ucajja Fura sat uywatamampi sarakam campamentonacaparu.
Judges7:11 Ucatsti ist'ätawa cuntejj parlasipcani uca. Ucatjja uqham ist'asinwa wali ch'amañcht'asïta jupanacampi nuwasiñataqui” sasa. Ucampis Gedeonajj saränwa Fura sat uywatapampi uñisirinacapajj cawqha campamentoncapcäntejj ucqhacama.
Judges7:12 Ucampis madianitanaca
Judges7:13 Gedeonasti enemigonacapan campamentonacapar jaq'achasisasti ist'änwa mä soldadojja mayni masiparu samcasitapa yatiyasquiri: —Nayasti aqhama samcasta mä cebadata lurata t'ant'awa amstata korumini campamentoscama
Judges7:14 Uca masipajja saraquïnwa: —Ucasti Gedeonana espadapäpachawa
Judges7:15 Uqhama samca yatiyiri ist'asina
Judges7:16 Ucjjarusti uca quimsa patac jakenacjja
Judges7:17 Ucat saraquïnwa: —Uñjapjjeta cunjämtejj nayajj lurcä uca. Cunapachatejj nayajj purcäjja enemigonacasan campamentopat maysa tokeru ucqhajja
Judges7:18 Ucampis cunapachatejj nayajja
Judges7:19 Uqhamasti Gedeonajja
Judges7:20 Uca pachpa horasasti quimspacha tama jakenacaw ovej wajjra pututunacat pututt'apjjäna
Judges7:21 Take israelitanacasti
Judges7:22 Ucampis quimsa pataca israelitanacasti pututusipcaquïnwa. Diosasti madianitanacarojj jupanacpurwa nuwasiyäna. Ucatsti tutuctjjapjjänwa Bet-sita sat
Judges7:23 Ucatsti israelitanacajj jawsthapitänwa Neftalí
Judges7:24 Gedeonasti yatiyirinacwa qhithäna kollunquiri
Judges7:25 Ucampis catjapjjänwa madianitanacan pani jilïrinacapa Oreb
Judges8:1 Efraín sat tribunquirinacasti wali colerasisajj Gedeonaruw juchañchapjjäna
Judges8:2 Ucampis Gedeonajj saraquïnwa: —¿Janiti jumanacajj amuyasipcta cuntejj lurapcta ucajj
Judges8:3 Diosawa jumanacarojj catuyapjjtam Oreb
Judges8:4 Gedeonampi
Judges8:5 Sucot sat chekanjja Gedeonajj ucan jaquirinacarojj mayïnwa: —Achict'asipjjsmawa
Judges8:6 Ucampis Sucot sat chekanquir jilïrinacajja sapjjaraquïnwa: —¿Jumajja
Judges8:7 Gedeonasti saraquïnwa: —¡Diosajja
Judges8:8 Ucatsti Penuel sat chekaruw sarapjjäna
Judges8:9 Ucat Gedeonajj saraquiwa: —¡Cunapachatejj nayajj atipjasin cutt'anï ucqhajja uca torre allinucöjja! —sasa.
Judges8:10 Zeba
Judges8:11 Gedeonasti maqhatcatänwa wasarnäma muycatqui uca thacnäma
Judges8:12 Ucatsti Zeba
Judges8:13 Gedeonasti nuwasïwitjja cutt'anjjänwa Heres sat thacnäma.
Judges8:14 Ucatsti Sucot sat chekanquir mä wayna catjasinjja jisct'änwa. Ucampis aca waynajja pakallko tunca pakallkoni Sucot sat chekanquir jilïrinacana
Judges8:15 Gedeonajj
Judges8:16 Ucatsti Gedeonajj wasaranquir ch'aphi lawanaca aptayanisajja
Judges8:17 Uqhamaraqui Penuel chekanquir torrepsa allinucusajja
Judges8:18 Ucjjarusti Gedeonajj jisct'araquïnwa Zeba
Judges8:19 Ucat Gedeonasti saraquïnwa: —¡Jumanacasti nayan jilanacajjaruw jiwarayapjjtajja! Jichhasti chekpachansa Diosajj jacasquiwa. Ucampis jumanacatejj jan jiwarayapcasamänjja
Judges8:20 Ucjjarusti Jeter sat jilïr yokaparuw saraquïna: —¡Sartasin jiwarayam! —sasa. Ucampis Jeter satajj waynäscatap laycojja janiw espadapa aysuña muncänti.
Judges8:21 Ucampis Zebampi
Judges8:22 Ucampis israelitanacajj Gedeonarojj sapjjaraquïnwa: —Jumajjay madianitanacan t'akhesiyatäñatjja khespiyapjjchistajja
Judges8:23 Ucat Gedeonasti saraquïnwa: —Janiwa nayasa
Judges8:24 Ucampis nayajj mayipjjsmawa
Judges8:25 Ucampis israelitanacajj mä capa oraker jant'act'asinjja ucarcamaw aparanipcäna uca kori surtijanacjja uchapjjäna
Judges8:26 Take uca kori surtijanacajj apthaptänwa tunca llätuncan kilonaca. Ucarusti janiw jaqhutäcänti adornonacasa
Judges8:27 Uca koritsti Gedeonajj mä diosa lursuyasasti Ofra sat marcaparuw uchayäna. Ucatsti take chekat israelitanacajj ucaruquiw sarapjjäna
Judges8:28 Uqhamaw madianitanacajj israelitanacan apnakatäna. Jupanacasti pusi tunca marajja janipuniw sayt'asiñataquejj ch'amanïpcänti. Ucampis Gedeón jacquipanjja take uca orakenacanjja samarañaw utjäna.
Judges8:29 Joasan
Judges8:30 Gedeonajj pakallko tunca wawanacanïnwa
Judges8:31 Siquem sat chekancqui uca uñt'atapajja mä wawanïnwa
Judges8:32 Gedeonasti walja maranëjjasinjja jiwjjänwa
Judges8:33 Gedeón jiwjjatatsti israelitanacajj Diosat armt'asiwayasinsti cunayman Baal sat diosanacaru yupaychiriw cutt'awayjjapjjäna
Judges8:34 Jupanacasti Diosapata armt'asiwayasinjja janiw amtascjjapjjänti Diosajj jupanacarojj take uñisirinacapat khespiyatapjja.
Judges8:35 Uqhamarac janiw amtasisajj qhuyapt'ayapcaraquïnsa Jerobaal sat Gedeonan familiaparusa
Judges9:1 Jerobaal satan Abimelec yokapasti
Judges9:2 —Take familianacajjan sutiparuw nayajj achict'apjjsma jumanacajja Siquem marcanquir take jakenacaru amuyt'ayapjjañanacamataqui. Cawquïris walïspa mä jakempi apnakatäñati
Judges9:3 Ucampis Abimelec satajj jupanacan familiapätap laycusti jupanacajj Abimelec toketwa sayt'apjjäna
Judges9:4 Ucampis Abimelec chacharojja pakallk tunca moneda kollke churapjjäna Baal-berit sat diosan templopat apsusina. Ucat uca kollkempisti Abimelec chachajja wali khoru jakenacwa minc'äna jupampi chica sarañapataqui
Judges9:5 Cawqhantejj Jerobaal sat awquipajj jaccäna uca Ofra sat marcaru
Judges9:6 Uca khepatsti take Siquem marcanquiri
Judges9:7 Ucatsti Jotam chachajj yatisinjja Gerizim sat lomaru maqhatasinjja uca kollutwa wali jach'ata art'anïna takeni ist'apjjañapataqui: “¡Siquem marcanquir jakenaca wali ist'apjjeta! ¡Diosasti jumanacarojj uqhamaraqui ist'aracpan!
Judges9:8 “Mä urunjja kokanacajj mä reyinïñwa munapjjäna
Judges9:9 Ucampis olivo kokasti janiw muncänti
Judges9:10 “Ucatsti kokanacajja higo sat kokaruraquiw sapjjaraquïna: ‘Uqhamajj jumay nanacan reyejjäma’ sasa.
Judges9:11 Ucampis higo kokajja janiw muncänti
Judges9:12 “Ucjjarusti kokanacajj jan munipanjja uva aliruw mayipjjaraquïna reyipäñapataqui.
Judges9:13 Ucampis uva alejja saraquïnwa: ‘Nayajj janiw kokanacan reyipäquiristti
Judges9:14 “Ucampis kokanacajja jan munipanjja zarza sat ch'aphi kokaruraquiw mayipjjaraquïna: ‘Jumay uqhamajj nanacan reyïmjja’ sasa.
Judges9:15 Ucatsti zarza sat ch'aphi kokajj saraquïnwa: ‘Jumanacatejj nayan reyimäñajja munapjjsta ucajja take jumanacaw nayan ch'iwejja mankheru mantapjjañamajja. Ucampis jan nayan reyimäñajja munapjjsta ucajja nayatjja ninaw mistuni ucasti Líbano sat kollunquir cedro kokanacaruw naqhantani’ sasa.
Judges9:16 “Jichhasti nayajj jumanacarojj jisct'apjjsmawa: ¿Jumanacajja cheka suma amuyumpiti Abimelec satarojj reyita utt'ayapjjtajja? Uqhamaraqui
Judges9:17 Nayan awquejjasti jumanac laycu nuwasisajj niyaw jacañapsa apt'asi
Judges9:18 Ucampis jumanacajja awquejjan familiapa contraw sayt'asinjja pakallk tunca yokanacapwa jiwarayapjjtajja mä kala patjjaruqui. Ucatsti Abimelec sata awquejjan uñt'atapan yokaparuquiw reyita utt'ayasipjjtajja jumanacan familiamätap laycu.
Judges9:19 Ucampis nayajj sapjjsmawa: Jumanacatejj Jerobaal
Judges9:20 Jan uqhamäcän ucajja
Judges9:21 Uqham arnakawayasinsti Jotam satajj jaltjjänwa
Judges9:22 Abimelec chachajj quimsa maranacaw israelitanacarojj munañaparu apnakäna.
Judges9:23 Ucampis Diosajja
Judges9:24 Uqhamata Abimelec chachajja Jerobaal awquipan pakallk tunca yokanacapa jiwarayatapat pago catokañapataqui
Judges9:25 Siquem marcanquirinacasti kollu patanacaruw jakenac uchapjjäna
Judges9:26 Ucat mä urusti Gaal sat
Judges9:27 Ucampis jupanacajj yapunacaru sarasinjja uva achunaca aptanisajja vino lurapjjäna; fiesta lurasinjja mank'apjjäna
Judges9:28 Gaal sat chachasti sänwa: “¿Abimelec chachajj qhitïtapsa amuyasi? Jupasti Jerobaal chachan yokapaquiwa
Judges9:29 Nayatejj jumanacan jilïrimäristjja anchhichpachaw Abimelec chacharojj alisnucuristjja
Judges9:30 Ucampis Zebul sat marca apnakeristi uqhama Gaal chachan parlatanacapa ist'asinsti wali coleräna.
Judges9:31 Ucatsti Abimelec chacharu yatiyiriwa qhithäna
Judges9:32 Uca laycusti jumajj aruma soldadonacamampi mistuwayasinjja pamparu imantasipjjam.
Judges9:33 Arumarji inti jalsusti marcaru nuwantanipjjam
Judges9:34 Uqhamaw Abimelec chachajja
Judges9:35 Ucampis Gaal sat chachajj marca puncuru mistsupanjja
Judges9:36 Ucat Gaal sat chachajj uñjasinjja Zebul satarojj sänwa: —¡Uñtam
Judges9:37 Ucampis Gaal chachajj sascaquïnwa: —¡Kollu orak chica taypnämsti walja jakenacaw sarakasinqui! Uqhamarac chicata tama jakenacajja yatirinacajj jacapqui uca patjja thacnämaraquiw jutapjjaraqui —sasa.
Judges9:38 Ucat Zebul chachasti saraquïnwa: —Jichhajj jach'at parlamaya: “Abimelec chachajja qhitisa jiwasajj jupan esclavopäñasataquejja” saractasä. Ucajjaya ejercitojja jumataquejj janjamaquiw cunacänsa ucajja. Jichhasti mistsumaya jupanacampi nuwasiri —sasa.
Judges9:39 Gaal chachajja mistuwayänwa Siquem marcanquir jakenac nayrakata
Judges9:40 Abimelec chachasti arctänwa Gaal sat chachan jaltjjatapatjja. Ucampis marcaru mantaña puncunjja walja jiwatanacaw utjäna.
Judges9:41 Abimelec chachasti Aruma chekaruw kheparjjäna
Judges9:42 Khepa arumarjisti Siquem marcanquir jakenacajj pamparuw mistsupjjäna
Judges9:43 ejercitopanquir jakenacjja quimsa tamaruw jaljtayäna; uca pamparuw imantasipjjäna. Ucatjja cunapachatejj Siquem marcanquirinacajj mistsunipcäna ucqhajja jupanacajj imantasipcän uca chekat mistsunisaw nuwantapjjäna.
Judges9:44 Abimelec chachajja tama jakenacapampi marca puncur purisajja jarc'antapjjänwa
Judges9:45 Ucampis uca urojja Abimelec chachajja Siquem marca catuntañcamaw nuwasïna. Catuntasinsti marcjja liju tucjäna
Judges9:46 Migdal-siquem satanquirinacajja Abimelec chachan uqham luratap yatisinjja. El-berit sat templona yänacap imaña p'iyanacaruw imantasir sarapjjäna.
Judges9:47 Abimelec chachasti take jakenacajj ucan tantachasitäscatap yatisinjja
Judges9:48 Salmón sat kolluruw take jakenacampi mistsüna
Judges9:49 Take jakenacajj janc'aquiw koka ramanac qhuchhokawayasin ayjjaruwayasajja Abimelec chachampi sarapjjäna templon yänacapa imaña p'iyaru puriñcama. Purisasti ucan uca lawa ramanac montont'asinjja ninampiw phichcatapjje
Judges9:50 Ucjjarusti Abimelec chachajja Tebes sat marcaruraquiw sararaquïna
Judges9:51 Uca marca taypinjja mä torrew utjäna; uca marcan take jaquir jakenacasti ucaruw imantasipjjäna chacha
Judges9:52 Ucampis Abimelec chachajja uca torre puncuru purisinjja ninampiw phichcatäna.
Judges9:53 Uqham lurquipansti mä warmiwa molinota mä kala jalaktayanïna ucat uca kalajj Abimelec chachan khepäjj p'ekepat jaljjattasinwa p'eke ch'iyjäna.
Judges9:54 Abimelec chachasti janc'aquiw yanapiripa jawsäna
Judges9:55 Ucampis israelitanacajj Abimelec jiwata uñjasinjja utanacaparuw cutt'awayjjapjjäna.
Judges9:56 Diosasti uqhamaw Abimelec chacharojj mutuyäna jupajj awquipa contra jan walinac lurasina pakallk tunca jilanacaparu jiwarayatapata.
Judges9:57 Uqhamarac Diosajj mutuyaraquïnwa Siquem marcanquir jakenacarojj jan wali luratanacapatjja. Uqhamaw Jotam sata Jerobaal chachan yokapan maldicitapajj phokhasïna.
Judges10:1 Abimelec khepatsti
Judges10:2 Jupasti pä tunca quimsan maraw Israel marcarojj apnakawayasa jiwjjäna. Ucatsti Samir sat chekaruraquiw imt'jjapjjaraquïna.
Judges10:3 Uca khepatsti Galaadanquir Jair chachaw
Judges10:4 Jair sat chachasti quimsa tunca yokanacanïnwa. Sapa maynis asnjjataw sarnakapjjerïna
Judges10:5 Jair chacha jiwjjepansti Camón sat chekaruraquiw imt'jjapjjaraquïna.
Judges10:6 Israelitanacasti wastatampiw Dios nayrakatana jan walinac lurjjapjjaraquiquïna cunayman Baal Astarté sat c'ari diosanacar yupaychasina. Uqhamarac Siria
Judges10:7 Ucatpï Diosajj colerasisinjja filisteonacampi
Judges10:8 Uca urutsti filisteonacampi
Judges10:9 Ucampis amonitanacajj Jordán jawirjja maqhatanipjjaraquiquïnwa Judá
Judges10:10 Ucatsti israelitanacajj Diosaruw yanapa mayipjjän aqham sasa: “Dios Tatitu
Judges10:11 Ucat Diosajj saraquïnwa: “Jumanacasti t'akhesiyatäpjjayätawa egipcionacana
Judges10:12 sidonionacana
Judges10:13 Uqhama khespiyatäcasinsa jumanacajj nayatjja armasisipcaquistawa yakha c'ari diosanacaru yupaychaña laycu. Uca laycusti nayajj janiw mayampis khespiyapquirismati.
Judges10:14 Jichhasti
Judges10:15 Uqham ist'asinsti israelitanacajj
Judges10:16 Israelitanacajja uca c'ari diosanacjja apanucjjapjjänwa
Judges10:17 Amonitanacajj tantacht'asisinjja Galaad sat chekaruw campamento uchantasipjjäna
Judges10:18 Galaad sat chekana jaquir israelitanacajja jilïrinacapampejj amtapjjänwa: “Qhititejj amonitanac contra nuwasiñataqui sartcani ucawa aca Galaad sat orakenacana take jaquirinacarojj apnakani” sasa.
Judges11:1 Jefté sat chachajj jan ajjsarasa wali nuwasirïnwa
Judges11:2 Ucampis Galaad chachan warmipasti walja wawanacanïnwa ucanacasti jilsjjasinjja Jefté satarojj utatjja alisnucjjapjjänwa
Judges11:3 Ucatsti Jefté satajja utapata sarjjasinjja Tob sat chekaruw jaquir sarjjäna. Ucansti jupajj wali khoru jakenacampiw mayachasjjäna; cunjämarutejj sarnakañ munapqui uqhamaruw sarnakapjjäna.
Judges11:4 Ucat maranaca pasjjatatsti amonitanacajj israelitanacampiw nuwasiñaru mantapjjäna.
Judges11:5 Galaad sat chekanquir jilïrinacajja Tob sat chekarojj Jefté sat chacharu jawsiriw qhithapjjäna.
Judges11:6 Jeftërusti sapjjänwa: —Jutam nanacajj munapjjtwa jilïrïñama amonitanacampi nuwasiñanjja —sasa.
Judges11:7 Ucat Jefté chachajj saraquïnwa: —Jumanacasti nayarojj uñisipjjerïstajjaya
Judges11:8 Galaad chekanquir jilïrinacasti sapjjaraquïnwa: —Uqham t'akhesiñan jicjjatasisapï nanacajj thakher jutapjjsmajja. Nanacasti munapjjtwa jumana nanacampi chica sarasina amonitanacampi nuwasiñama
Judges11:9 Jefté chachasti saraquïnwa: —Uqhamasti jumanacatejj munapjjsta nayan cutt'añajja amonitanacampi nuwasiñajjataqui; ucampis cunapachatejj Diosajj atipjayitani ucajja nayasti jumanacan jilïrimäyäwa —sasa.
Judges11:10 Ucjjarusti Galaad chekanquir jilïrinacasti sapjjaraquïnwa: —Diosawa testigosajja nanacasti lurapjjäwa cuntejj arsctajja uqhamarjama —sasa.
Judges11:11 Ucampis Jefté chachajj jilïrinacampejj saränwa; puripanjja marcanquir take jakenacajja jilïripatwa utt'ayapjjäna. Ucampis Mizpa sat marcanjja Jefté chachajja Dios nayrakatanjja cuna arunactejj arscäna uca pachpa arunacaracwa arsuraquiquïna.
Judges11:12 Ucjjarusti Jefté chachajj yatiyirinacwa qhitäna amonitanacan reyiparu aqham sasa jisct'iri: “¿Cunasa camachi naya contra sartasina marcajjaru nuwasiri jutañamataquejja?” sasa.
Judges11:13 Amonitanacan reyipajj Jeften yatiyirinacaparojj saraquïnwa: “Jumanaca israelitanacasti Egiptota mistunisajj nanacan orakenacajj aparapjjistajja Arnón sat jawirat kalltasina
Judges11:14 Ucampis Jefté chachajj wastatampiw yatiyirinaca amonitanacan reyipan ucaru qhitharaquiquïna.
Judges11:15 Aqham sasa yatiyiri: “Jeften yatiyäwipajj acawa
Judges11:16 Nanacasti Egiptot mistunisasti
Judges11:17 Ucqhatsti nanacajja yatiyirinacwa qhithapjjta edomitanacan reyipa uca orakepnäma nanacan pasañanacajja churañapataqui
Judges11:18 Ucjjarojj wasarnäma sarasinsti Edom
Judges11:19 Ucampis nanacajj yatiyirinacwa qhithapjjta Hesbón sat chekanquir amorreonacan Sehón sat reyiparu mayiri
Judges11:20 Ucampis Sehón reyejj janiw orakenacapnäma pasayaña munapquituti
Judges11:21 Ucampis Israel marcan Tatitu Diosapaw yanapapjjetu Sehón reyiru
Judges11:22 Nanacasti amorreonacan orakenacapjja catuntasipjjtwa Arnón sat jawirata
Judges11:23 ¿Jichhasti nanacarojj alisnucuñti munapjjesta Diosajj cawquïr orakenactejj amorreonacat aparawayasina nanacaru churapquitu ucatjja?
Judges11:24 Quemós sat diosamajj
Judges11:25 ¿Jumasti jilt'atapunïtatisti moabitanacana Balac sat reyita Zipor satan yokapatsti? Ucampis jupajja janiw nanaca contra nuwasiriti jutcänjja.
Judges11:26 Nanacasti Hesbón
Judges11:27 Ucampis nayajj janiw cuna jan wals lurcsmati
Judges11:28 Uqhama Jefté sat chachan yatiyäwi arunacapa ist'casinsa amonitanacan reyipajj janiw jaysañ muncänti.
Judges11:29 Ucatsti Diosan ajayupaw Jefté chachjjaru jutäna; jupajj saränwa Galaad
Judges11:30 Jefté chachasti aqhama arumpiw Diosaru arsüna: “Jumatejj amonitanacaru atipjayitäta ucajja
Judges11:31 nayajj ninaru phichhantata sacrificio loktäma
Judges11:32 Jefté chachajja amonitanacampi nuwasisajj atipjasinjja take orakenacapwa catuntasïna. Ucampis Diosawa juparojj uqhama atipjayäna.
Judges11:33 Jefté chachasti walja uñisirinacapa jiwarayäna
Judges11:34 Cunapachatejj Jefté chachajj Mizpa sat chekanquir utaparu cutt'jjäna ucqhajja mä sapa phuchapawa catoker mistsunïna thokt'asisa
Judges11:35 Jefté chachasti phuchapa jutir uñjasinjja llaquisiñatjja isipa ch'iyanokasisajj sänwa: —¡Ay
Judges11:36 Ucat phuchapajj saraquïnwa: —Awquejja
Judges11:37 Ucampis achict'assmawa pä phajjsiya kollunaca sarnakawayä amiganacajjampi jacht'asisa jan casarasisa jiwañajjataqui. —sasa.
Judges11:38 Jefté chachasti phuchaparojj pä phajjsi churänwa. Ucatsti jupajj uca pä phajjsinjja kollunacanwa amiganacapampi sarnakäna jacht'asisa jan casarasiwayasina jiwañapata.
Judges11:39 Ucat pä phajjsitsti awquipan ucaruw cutt'jjäna. Ucampis awquipajj phokhänwa cuntejj Diosaru arscatayna ucampi. Uqhamawa Jefté chachan phuchapajj jiwjjäna jan qhiti chachampis wachoka juchar puriwayasina.
Judges11:40 Ucatwa israelitanac taypinjja mä costumbrejj utji sapa mara tawakonacajja Jefté chachan phuchapata pusi uru jachir sarapjjañapajja.
Judges12:1 Efraín sat tribunquir jakenacajj tantacht'asisinjja
Judges12:2 Jefté chachasti saraquïnwa: —Nayampi
Judges12:3 Cunjämatejj jumanacajj nanacar jan yanapir jutapjjatam uñjasinjja nanacaquiw amonitanacampi nuwasiri sarapjjta
Judges12:4 Ucatsti Jefté chachajja Galaad sat marcanquir take jakenaca tantacht'asinjja Efraín sat tribunquir jakenacampi nuwasisajja atipjänwa. Efraín sat tribunquir jakenacajj Galaadanquirinacarojj sapjjänwa
Judges12:5 Galaad marcanquirinacasti Efraín sat tributjja Jordán jawira maqhatañanacwa aparapjjäna. Cunapachatejj yakhepa Efraín tribunquirinacajj jaltjjasina maqhataña mayipcäna ucqhajja
Judges12:6 mayipjjänwa aqham sañapa: “Shibolet” sasa
Judges12:7 Jefté chachasti sojjta maranacaw israelitanacan apnakeripänjja. Cunapachatejj jiwjjäna ucqhajj Galaad sat nacïwi marcaparuw imt'jjapjjäna.

Judges12:13 Uca khepatjja Abdón sata

Judges12:15 Jiwjjepanjja Piratón sat marcaparuraquiw imt'jjapjjaraquïna
Judges13:1 Israelitanacasti wastatampiw Dios nayrakatanjja jan walinaca lurjjapjjaraquiquïna. Ucatsti Diosajja pusi tunca maranaca filisteonacampi t'akhesiyatäñaruw catuyäna.
Judges13:2 Zora sat marcanjja
Judges13:3 Ucampis Diosan angelapajj warmiru uñstasinjja sänwa: “Jumasti jan wawachasirïtawa
Judges13:4 Ucampis janiw umätati vino
Judges13:5 Jumasti usuriptasajja mä yokall wawanïyätawa
Judges13:6 Warmejj chachaparu yatiyiriw saräna: “Mä Diosan jakepaw jutatayna cawqhanccäyättejj ucqharu. Ucampis nayataquejja Diosan mä angelapjamaquiwa. Janiwa nayajj jisct'cti qhitïpachas ucjja
Judges13:7 Ucampis jupajj situwa: Jumajj usuriptasajj mä yokall wawanïyätawa
Judges13:8 Ucatsti Manoa sat chachajja oracionanjja Diosarojj sänwa: “Dios Tatitu
Judges13:9 Diosajj
Judges13:10 Warmejj janc'aquiw chachaparu yatiyirejj jaläna: —¡Nayaru uñstquitu uca chachajj wastatampiw uñstitu! —sasa.
Judges13:11 Manoa chachapasti janc'aquiw sarawayäna cawqhancäntejj uca chachajj ucqhar purisasti saraquïnwa: —¿Jumätati mayüru warmejjampi parlqui ucajja? —sasa. Uca chachasti saraquïnwa: —¡Nayätwa! —sasa.
Judges13:12 Ucampis Manoa chachajj sänwa: —Cunapachatejj arsutamarjamajj phokhasini ucqhajja
Judges13:13 Ucat angelasti saraquïnwa: —Warmimasti cuntejj siscta uqhamarjama phokpan.
Judges13:14 Jupasti janiwa uvata cuna casta vino luratsa
Judges13:15 Manoa chachajja
Judges13:16 Ucat angelasti saraquïnwa: —Nayajj kheparirista ucasa janiwa jumampi chicajja mank'amjja mank'quiristti. Ucampis Diosaruy uca cabrito holocausto sat sacrificiona loktam —sasa.
Judges13:17 Ucatsti Manoa sat chachajj
Judges13:18 Ucat angelajj saraquïnwa: —¿Cunataquisa jumajj sutejja yatiñ munta? Muspharcañawa jan yatiyañjama —sasa.
Judges13:19 Manoa chachajja cabrito catusinjja
Judges13:20 Cunapachatejj altarat ninajj altoru maqhatcäna ucqhajja

Judges13:25 Mä urusti Sansón chachajj Zora
Judges14:1 Sansón chachasti mä urojj Timnat sat marcar sarasinsti mä filistea warmiruw uñjäna.
Judges14:2 Ucat utaparu purisinsti awquinacaparuw yatiyäna: —Nayasti Timnat sat marcanjja mä suma warmi uñjanta jichhasti sart'arapipjjetaya nayasti jupampiw casarasiña munta —sasa.
Judges14:3 Ucat awquinacapasti saraquïnwa: —¿Conataquisa jumajj uca filisteo jucharar jakenac taypiru warmi thakher sarta? ¿Janiti warmejj utjqui jiwas familiasa taypinjja
Judges14:4 Awquinacapajj janiw yatipcänti uqhamäñapa Diosatti jutaspa jan ucajj janicha ucjja. Ucampis jupajja thakhascänwa filisteonacampi cunjämata nuwasiñataquisa. Uca urunacajj filisteonacaw israelitanacar apnakäna uca laycu.
Judges14:5 Sansón waynasti
Judges14:6 Ucatsti Diosan ajayupaw Sansón chachjjaru jutäna
Judges14:7 Ucat sarasinjja cawquïr tawakorutejj muncäna ucampiw parlanïna.
Judges14:8 Urunaca pasatatsti Sansón chachajj wastatampiw cutt'äna uca tawakompi casarasiñataqui. Thaquita sarakawayasinsti uca jiwat león uñjiriw saräna. Jiwat león uñjasasti jicjjatänwa walja mamurayanaca tapapampi
Judges14:9 Uca tapatjja amparampiw misq'jja apsüna
Judges14:10 Sansón chachan awquipasti tawakor uñjiriw saräna. Ucansti Sansón chachajj mä fiesta luräna
Judges14:11 Ucampis filisteonacajj uñjasinjja wali ajjsarayasipjjäna
Judges14:12 Sansón chachasti uca quimsa tuncanirojj saraquïnwa: —Nayasti mä jisct'a jisct'apjjäma yatjjatapjjañamataqui. Ucampis aca pakallko uru fiesta lurcasintejj chekt'apjjäta ucqhajja
Judges14:13 Ucampis janitejj chekt'apcäta ucqhajja
Judges14:14 Sansón chachasti yatjjatapjjañapataquejj sänwa: “Mank'qui ucatjja mank'araquiw mistu
Judges14:15 Ucat pusi urunsti Sansón chachan warmiparojj sapjjaraquïnwa: —Chachamaru jisct'am nanacaru uca yatjjatañäqui uca yatiyañamataqui. Jan ucasti nanacajj ninampiw phichhantapjjäma jumaru
Judges14:16 Ucatsti jupajj Sansón chachaparojj jachasisaw saraqui: —¡Jumajja janiw nayarojj munquistati! ¡Jumasti nayarojj uñisistawa! Marcanquirinacajjarojja mä yatjjataña churtajja yatjjatapjjañapataqui
Judges14:17 Ucatsti Sansón chachan warmipajja pakallko urpacha fiestanwa chachap jac'anjja wali jachäna. Uqham sinti jachir uñjasinsti chachapajj juparu qhuyapt'ayasaw uca yatjjatañajj cun sañtejj munqui ucjja yatiyäna. Ucatsti warmipajja janc'aquiw marcanquirinacaparojja yatiyiri saräna.
Judges14:18 Pakallko urunsti
Judges14:19 Ucampis Diosan ajayupaw Sansón chachjjaru jutäna
Judges14:20 Sansón chachan warmipjja mayni amigoparuwa churjjapjjäna.
Judges15:1 Mä kawkha urunaca pasatatsti
Judges15:2 Awcch'ipasti saraquïnwa: —Nayasti “Janiw muncjjpachati” sistwa
Judges15:3 Ucat Sansón chachajj saraquïnwa: —¡Jichhasti janiw nayajj cuna juchanïcäsa cuna jan walinactejj filisteonacaru lurcä ucatjja! —sasa.
Judges15:4 Ucatsti Sansón chachajj sarasinjja quimsa pataca kamakenaca caturanïna. Payat payacama wich'inqha pura chinthapisasti ninampiw uca chinthapita wich'inqhanacaru wiycatawayäna.
Judges15:5 Ucatsti uca wich'inqhanaca ninampi naccatayasinwa kamakenacjja filisteonacan yapunacap taypiru antutnucüna. Uqhamatwa take naqhantayäna apthapit trigonaca
Judges15:6 Filisteonacajj yatjjatañaruw uchasipjjäna qhitisa uqham lurpacha uca. Ucatsti yatjjatapjjänwa Sansón chachan phoksusiñata uqhama luratapa
Judges15:7 Ucampis Sansón chachajj saraquïnwa: —Niyajjay jumanacajj uqham lurapjjchistajja. Jichhasti janiwa samarcäti jumanacampi phoksusiñcamajja —sasa.
Judges15:8 Ucat wali colerata nuwasisasti filisteonacan take ch'aqhanacapwa p'aquiräna. Ucatsti Etam sat kala janqhara p'iyaruw jaquiri sarjjäna.
Judges15:9 Filisteonacajja jutasinjja Judá orakenacata Lehi satcamaw campamentonacapa sayt'ayasipjjäna.
Judges15:10 Ucat Judá orakenquirinacasti jisct'apjjänwa: —¿Cunatsa jumanacajj jutapjjta nanacampi nuwasiri? —sasa. Ucampis filisteonacajj sapjjaraquïnwa: —Nanacasti Sansón chacharu catjiriw jutapjjta
Judges15:11 Uqham ist'asinsti Judá tribunquir quimsa waranka jakenacasti tantacht'asiwayasajj Etam sat kala janqhara p'iyaruw sarapjjäna. Ucar purisajj Sansón chacharojj sapjjänwa: —¿Janiti yatcta filisteonacajj jiwasanacatsa juc'ampi ch'amanïtapjja? ¿Cunatsa aqhama jan walt'añanacar apantapjjesta? —sasa. Ucat Sansón chachajj saraquïnwa: —Janiw nayajj cuna jan walsa lurcti
Judges15:12 Ucatsti jupanacajj sapjjaraquïnwa: —Nanacasti jutapjjtwa jumaru catuntasa filisteonacar irpjjaruyañataqui —sasa. Ucat Sansón chachajj saraquïnwa: —Juramento lurarapipjjeta jumanacajj jan nayaru jiwayapjjañamataqui.
Judges15:13 Jupanacasti sapjjaraquïnwa: —Janiw nanacajj jiwayapcämati
Judges15:14 Cunapachatejj Lehi sat chekaru puripcäna ucqhajja filisteonacajj cusisiñata wali arnakasisaw jutapjjäna. Ucampis Diosan ajayupaw Sansón chachajjar jutäna. Ucatsti Sansón chachajj amparanacapan ñach'antatäqui uca wiscanacjja jan cunaquiw t'akaräna
Judges15:15 Ucjjarusti mä chhuyu asno quijada ch'aqha catusinsti
Judges15:16 Ucjjarusti Sansón chachajj saraquïnwa: “Asnona mä quijada ch'aqhapampisti maya
Judges15:17 Ucatsti uqham parlaña tucuyasinsti uca quijada ch'acjja jakonucjjänwa. Ucatwa uca chekanjja Ramat-lehi sasa sutichatänjja.
Judges15:18 Sansón chachasti umata wali pharjayasisinsti Diosaruwa säna: “Jumawa aca jan walt'añanjja atipt'ayistajja
Judges15:19 Ucatsti Diosajj Lehi sat chekancqui uca p'iyatjja uma mistsuyanïna. Sansón chachajj uca jalsunir uma umt'asinjja jacatatänwa. Ucat Lehi sat chekancqui uca uma jalsurojja jichhürcamajj En-hacore sas sutichapjje.
Judges15:20 Sansón chachajj Israel marcarojja pä tunca maranacaw apnakänjja
Judges16:1 Mä urojj Sansón chachajj Gaza sat marcaruw saräna. Ucansti uñjänwa chachanacampi sarnaker mä warmiru; uca arumajja utapanwa iquïna uca warmimpi chica.
Judges16:2 Cunapachatejj Gaza marcanquirinacajj Sansón chachan ucancatapa yatisinjja
Judges16:3 Sansón chachasti chica arumcamaquiw iquiwayäna. Uca aruma sartasinsti marca puncjja chacañanacapamppacha qhacsuwayäna jiqhanipar k'epjjaruwayasinjja Hebrón sat uñcatasi kollu pataruw k'epsüna.

Judges16:13 Dalilasti

Judges16:16 Dalilajja
Judges16:17 Khepjjarusti uca jan arscañjja Dalilarojj chekwa yatiyjjäna: —Nayarusti janiw qhitisa cunapachas ñic'utajj-jja mururapquituti
Judges16:18 Jichhamänjja

Judges16:20 art'äna: —¡Sansón

Judges16:22 Uca khepatsti Sansón chacharojj ñic'utapajj wastatampiw jilantjjaraquïna.
Judges16:23 Ucat filisteonacan jilïrinacapasti tantachasipjjänwa atipjasina fiesta lurañataqui
Judges16:24 Cunapachatejj jakenacajj uñjapjjäna ucqhasti k'ochupjjänwa
Judges16:25 Jupanacasti cusisiñatjja mayipjjänwa Sansón irpanipjjañapataqui cusisiñataqui. Carcelata Sansón chachar irpsuwayasinjja

Judges16:29 Ucjjarusti Sansón chachajj amparapampiw thaktäna takpacha templo catjjäsqui uca chicachicanquir paypacha sayirinaca. Uca columnanacaru amparanacapampi limcatasinsti
Judges16:30 jach'at art'äna: “¡Take filisteonaca nayampi chica jiwarapjjam!” sasa. Take ch'amapampiw nuqhutatäna. Ucat templojj alljjattänwa filisteonacan take jilïrinacaparu
Judges16:31 Ucjjarusti Sansón chachan jilanacapa
Judges17:1 Efraín satan kollunacapansti mä jakew jacäna Micaía sat sutini.
Judges17:2 Jupasti taycaparuw arsüna: —Nayätwa waranka patacani kollke lunthatctam ucajja. Nayawa catuscta
Judges17:3 Jupajj waranka patacani kollke cutt'ayjjepansti
Judges17:4 Ucampis Micaiajj taycaparojj kollke churjjäma sascaquïnwa. Taycapajja pä pataca kollke apakawayasin platero sat kollke luririn ucaruw apäna mä diosa suma lurañapataqui
Judges17:5 Micaía sat chachana utapanjja mä chekawa utjäna culto lurañataqui. Ucatsti efod sat iswa lurasïna
Judges17:6 Uca urunacansti Israel marcanjja janiw reyejj utjcänti
Judges17:7 Belén marcanjja jayanquir mä waynaw utjäna Judá sat tributa. Jupasti Leví familiatänwa.
Judges17:8 Aca waynajja Belén marcata mistuniwayasajja yakha cheka jacañataqui thakeriw saräna. Ucampisa Efraín satanquir kollunacnäma sarasinsti Micaía sat jaken utaparuw purïna.
Judges17:9 Micaía sat chachasti jisct'änwa: —¿Cawquitsa jutta
Judges17:10 Micaiasti saraquïnwa: —Acar kheparascam
Judges17:11 Ucatsti uca levitajj iyawsänwa Micaiampi jacañataqui
Judges17:12 Micaiasti sacerdotepwa tucuyäna
Judges17:13 Ucatsti Micaiajj saraquïnwa: “Jichhacuchawa Diosajj bendicitani
Judges18:1 Uca urunacasti Israel marcanjja janiw reyejja utjcänti. Uqhamaraqui Dan sat tribunquirinacasti janiraquiw orakenïpcaraquïnsa
Judges18:2 Ucampis Dan sat tribunquirinacajja Zora
Judges18:3 Micaian utapar jac'achasinjja levita waynan parlasitap uñt'apjjäna
Judges18:4 Levita waynajj yatiyänwa cunjämtejj Micaiampi jupampejj mä amtäwir mantapqui uca
Judges18:5 Ucat jupanacasti sapjjaraquïnwa: —Uqhamajj jisct'amay Diosaru aca nanacan jutatanacajjajja waliquïniti
Judges18:6 Levita sacerdotejja saraquïnwa: —Jan ajjsaras sarasipcaquim
Judges18:7 Ucatjja uca pheska uñakerinacajja Lais sat marcaruw sarapjjäna. Uca marcansti jakenacajj wali cusisitaw jacasipjjäna sidonionacan sarnakäwinacaparjama. Jupanacasti suma samarañanwa jacasisipcäna jani qhitinsa arjjayata
Judges18:8 Ucatsti uca pheska uñakerinacajj cutt'jjapjjänwa Zora
Judges18:9 —Nanacajj uca chekanacjja uñjanipjjtwa; ucan orakenacajj wali sumawa. Jichhasti ¡sarantañäni jupanacar nuwantiri! ¡Jan jumanacajj ucqhanaqui konupjjamti jan cunsa lurasajja! ¡Waquisiwa uca orakenaca catuntasir sarañasajja!
Judges18:10 Uca chekar purisinsti jicjjatapjjätawa wali cusisita jakenaca jach'a orakenacani
Judges18:11 Sojjta pataca jakenacaw Dan sat tribunquiritjja Zora
Judges18:12 Jupanacasti Judá sat orakerojj wali armantataw purintapjjäna
Judges18:13 Ucqhatsti Efraín sat kollunacaruw sarapjjäna; puripjjaraquïnwa Micaian utaparu.
Judges18:14 Pheska uñakerinacajj Lais sat chekanaca uñjir sarapcäna ucanacajja
Judges18:15 Ucatsti uca uñakerinacajj jupanacatjja saraktawayapjjänwa
Judges18:16 Uccañcamasti sojjta pataca danita soldadonacajj wali armantataw puncuta suyt'apjjäna.
Judges18:17 Uca pheska uñakerinacasti nayrakata utar mantasin apsupjjänwa suma lurat yakha diosa
Judges18:18 Ucat sacerdotesti uca pheska uñaker jakenacar Micaía satan utaparu mantasinjja suma lurata yakha diosa
Judges18:19 Jupanacasti sapjjaraquïnwa: —¡Amuquïma
Judges18:20 Uqhamajj wali asquïtap amuyasinsti sacerdotejj suma lurata yakha diosa
Judges18:21 Jupanacajj wastatampiw wawanacapampi sarantawayjjapjjäna
Judges18:22 Cunapachatejj jupanacajj jaya sarjjapjjäna ucqhajja Micaisampi
Judges18:23 Arctanirinacan arnakasitanacapa ist'asinsti
Judges18:24 Ucat Micaiajj saraquïnwa: —Jumanacasti nayajj lurascta uca diosanacajja
Judges18:25 Ucampis danitanacajj sapjjaraquïnwa: —Jan uqhama arnakapjjestati
Judges18:26 Ucampis Micaiajj
Judges18:27 Ucampis danitanacajj
Judges18:28 Uca marcasti
Judges18:29 Uca marcasti Lais satänwa
Judges18:30 Danitanacajja uca suma lurata c'ari diosjja mä chekaru uchasinjja ucaruwa yupaychapjjäna
Judges18:31 Uqhamawa jupanac taypincänjja Micaiajj lurcäna uca yakha diosjja
Judges19:1 Israel marcana jan reyejj utjcäna uca urunacasti mä levitawa Efraín sat kollunacat jayana jacäna
Judges19:2 Uca uñt'atapasti jupampi tokesiwayasinjja Belenanquir awquipan ucaruw jaquir sarjjäna. Pusi phajjsi ucan jacjjasinsti
Judges19:3 levitajja utap thakheriw saräna irptanjjañataqui. Jupasti mä uywatapa irpäna
Judges19:4 Awquipajj cusisitaraquiw catokäna; jupanacampi chicäñapataquiraquiw kheparayäna. Levitampi
Judges19:5 Ucat pusi ururusti wali alwat sartasipjjäna sarjjañataqui. Ucampis niya sarjjarusipcäna ucqhaw tawakona awquipajj tollkaparojj saraquïna: —Janïra sarcasinsti mä jisc'a t'ant'saya mank'asiwayapjjam
Judges19:6 Panpachaniw konthapita mank'apjjäna
Judges19:7 Levitajj sartasina sarjjarcchïnsa
Judges19:8 Ucampis pheskëri urunsti levitajj wali alwataw sartasïna sarjjañataqui; tawakon awquipajj wastatampiw achict'araquiquïna
Judges19:9 Cunapachatejj levitajj sartjjäna sarjjañataqui
Judges19:10 Ucampis levitajja janiw uca arumampi kheparaña muncänti
Judges19:11 Ucampis uywatapajj
Judges19:12 Ucat levitasti saraquïnwa: —Janiw sarcsnati cawqha marcarusa
Judges19:13 Janc'aqui sarañäni Gabaa
Judges19:14 Lakapuniw sarapjjäna
Judges19:15 Ucatsti thaquita sarakawayasinjja Gabaa sat marcaruw mantapjjäna ucana uca arumajj ict'awayañataqui. Ucampis levitajja purisinjja marca plazaruwa kont'asïna
Judges19:16 Arumarojja
Judges19:17 Uca awquejja plazana saririnaca uñjasinjja sänwa: —¿Cawquitsa jutta
Judges19:18 Ucat levitasti saraquïnwa: —Nanacasti Belenanquir Judá sat marcatwa jutapjjta
Judges19:19 Nanacansti utjapjjetuwa wichhu
Judges19:20 Awquisti saraquïnwa: —Waliqui jutapjjtajja
Judges19:21 Uca awquisti utaparuw irpäna. Ucansti saririnacajja cayunacapa jarekt'asisinjja
Judges19:22 Uqhama cusisitäpcäna uca horasawa
Judges19:23 Ucampis utanejja achict'änwa: —¡Amigonacajja
Judges19:24 Nayan mä phuchajjawa utjitu
Judges19:25 Ucampis uca jakenacajja awquirojj janiw ist'aña munapcänti. Ucatsti levitajj uñt'atapa irpsusinjja calleruw qhithanucüna. Ucat uca jakenacasti uca aruma pakarawa warmirojj iquintasisinjja jan wali lurapjjäna. Ucatsti willjta horasaruw apanucuwayjjapjjäna.
Judges19:26 Willjta horasajja warmejj cutt'anjjänwa awquin utaparu cawqhanccäntejj chachapajja ucaru. Uta puncu nayrakatar purisinjja ucqharuw liwnoktasa jiwjjäna.
Judges19:27 Ucampis chachapajj alwata sartasinjja sarjjañataquiw puncu jist'aräna ucatsti uñjänwa uñt'atapajj puncu mantañan liwnoktata amparanacapas uta puncu toker loktanita.
Judges19:28 Ucat saraquïnwa: —Sartam sarjjañäni —sasa. Ucampis warmejj janiw ist'cänti. Jiwatätap uñjasinjja amayapjja mayni asno patjjaru qhumjjatawayasinwa utapa tokeru sarawayjjäna.
Judges19:29 Utaparu purisasti uñt'atapan jiwat janchipjja cuchillompiw jisc'a jisc'a tunca payaniru qharinokäna
Judges19:30 Take uqham uñjirinacasti sapjjänwa: —Israelitanacajj Egiptota mistunctan uca urutjja janipuniw aqhamjja uñjirïctanti. Jichhasti waquisiwa amuyt'añasa uca luratata
Judges20:1 Ucatsti take israelitanacajj Dan
Judges20:2 Israelanquir tribunacana jilïrinacapasti takeniw uca tantachasïwincapjjäna. Diosan marcapajja pusi pataca waranka soldadonacaw tantachasipjjäna.
Judges20:3 Benjamín sat tribunquirinacajja yatipjjänwa chicata tribunquir israelitanacajj Mizpa sat marcana tantachasipjjatapa. Israelitanacasti levitarojj jisct'apjjänwa cunjämatsa uñt'atapajj jiwäna uca.
Judges20:4 Jiwat warmina levita chachapajja saraquïnwa: —Nayasti
Judges20:5 Ucampis uca arumasti uca marcanquir jakenacajja korpachatäpcta uca utaruw muyuntanipjjäna nayaru jiwayañataqui
Judges20:6 Ucatsti nayajj jiwat janchipjja jisc'a jisc'a qharinokasinjja take Israel marcpacharuw apayta uqhamata take israelitanacajja aca jan walinac lurasin jiwayatata yatipjjañapataqui.
Judges20:7 Jichhasti jumanacaruw wact'apjjtamjja
Judges20:8 Israelitanacajj mä jakeru tuct'asinjja takeniwa sayt'asisa sapjjäna: —Janiwa jiwasanacat maynisa utasarojj cutt'cañäniti.
Judges20:9 Jichhasti mä surtiyäwiruw mantañäni
Judges20:10 Takpach tribunacatjja
Judges20:11 Take israelitanacasti mayaruquiw tuct'apjjäna Gabaa sat marcaru nuwantañataquejja.
Judges20:12 Yatiyirinacwa Benjamín sat tribun orakenacapar qhithapjjäna: “¿Cunatsa jumanacat mä yakhepanacajj jan walinac lurasina jiwayapjjta?
Judges20:13 Churjjapjjeta Gabaa marcancqui uca jan wali jakenaca
Judges20:14 Ucatsipana Benjamín tribunquirinacasti take marcanacata
Judges20:15 Benjamín sat tribunquir marcanacatsti pä tunca sojjtan waranka soldadonacaw tantachasipjjäna. Gabaa sat marcata pakallk patac ajllita jakenacajj janiw jaqhutäcänti.
Judges20:16 Take uca jakenac taypinsti pakallk pataca ch'eka amparampi sum k'orawt'ir jakenacaw utjäna. Jupanacasti mä ñic'utarus jan pantjasa kalampi k'orawt'irinacänwa.
Judges20:17 Ucampis mayni israelitanacasti pusi patac waranka guerrana suma nuwasiña yatirinacaruw tantachapjjaraquïna.
Judges20:18 Ucampis israelitanacajja Betel marcaru sarasinjja Diosaruw jisct'apjjänjja cawquïr tribusa nayrakata saraspa Benjamín sat tribunquirinacampi nuwasirejja. Ucatsti Diosajj yatiyänwa Judá sat tribuna nayrakata sarañapa.
Judges20:19 Uqhamwa israelitanacajj wali alwata sarantawayasinsti Gabaa sat marca uñcatasiruw campamento waquiyasipjjäna.
Judges20:20 Jupanacasti Benjamín sat tribunquirinac contra sarasinjja Gabaa sat marca nayrakataruwa waquiyasipjjäna nuwasiñataqui.
Judges20:21 Ucampis Benjamín sat tribunquirinacajj marcata mistsunisajja pä tunca payan waranka israelitanaca jiwarayapjjäna.
Judges20:22 Ucat israelitanacajj Betel marcaru sarasinjja Diosan nayrakatapanjja arumcamawa jachapjjäna. Jisct'apjjaraquïnwa wastatampi sarapjjaspati Benjamín sat tribunquir jilanacapampi nuwasiri janicha uca. Diosasti saraquïnwa: “Sarapjjam wastat nuwasiri” sasa.
Judges20:23 Diosan arsutaparjamajja israelitanacajj ch'amañcht'asipjjänwa wastatampi nuwasiri mistsuñataqui cawqhantejj nayrïr urunjja nuwasipcäna ucqharu.
Judges20:24 Ucat payïr urunsti jupanacajj Benjamín sat tribunquirinacaruw nuwantapjjäna.
Judges20:25 Ucampis Benjamín tribunquirinacasti wastatampiw tunca quimsakallkon waranka israelitanaca jiwarayapjjaraquiquïna.
Judges20:26 Ucatsti take Israel marcanquir soldadonaca
Judges20:27 Uca urunacansti Diosan arcapajja Betel marcancascänwa
Judges20:28 Ucampis israelitanacajj Diosaruw jisct'apjjäna: “¿Waquisispati wastatampi nuwasiña Benjamín sat tribunquir jilanacajjampi
Judges20:29 Ucatsti yakhep israelita soldadonacajja Gabaa marca thiyanacaruw imantasipjjäna.
Judges20:30 Ucampis mayninacajja quimsïri urunjja Benjamín sat tribunquirinacampi nuwasirejj sarantapjjaraquiquïnwa. Gabaa marca nayrakataruw mistsupjjäna nayrïr urunacjama nuwasiñataqui.
Judges20:31 Mayampiraquiw Benjamín sat tribunquirinacajj marcata mistsunisajja sarapjjäna israelitanacampi nuwasiñataqui. Ucansti wastatampiw quimsa tunca israelitanaca jiwarayapjjaraquiquïna Betel
Judges20:32 Benjamín sat tribunquirinacasti amuyapjjänwa israelitanacajj tutuctjjapjjatapa
Judges20:33 Acatjamatwa israelitanacajja mistsunipjjäna cawqhancapcäntejj ucqhata Baal-tamar sat ucqhana nuwasiñataqui. Uqhamarac Gabaa sat marca thiyanacana imantasitäpcän ucanacasa mistsunipjjaraquïnwa nuwasiñataqui.
Judges20:34 Ucatsi tunca waranka guerrana suma nuwasiña yatir israelitanacaw Gabaa sat marcarojj nuwantapjjäna. Uca nuwasiñansti wali tucjasipjjäna. Ucampis Benjamín sat tribunquirinacasti janiw amuyasipcänti jupanacajj niya aynacht'atäpjjatanacapa.
Judges20:35 Diosasti israelitanacarojj atipjayänwa; uca urojja israelitanacajj pä tunca pheskan waranka patacani jakenacwa jiwarayapjjäna Benjamín sat tribunquirinacjja.
Judges20:36 Benjamín sat tribunquirinacasti amuyasipjjänwa jupanacajj atipjatäjjäpjjatapa. Ucampis israelitanacajja sarjjapjjänwa Benjamín tribunquirinacamp nuwasitatjja. Jupanacasti Gabaa marcaru nuwantañataqui imantasipcäna uca jakenacaruw confiasipjjäna.
Judges20:37 Uca jakenacasti acatjamata Gabaa sat marcaru nuwantasinsti take ucanquir jakenacwa espadampcama jiwarayapjjäna.
Judges20:38 Marcaru nuwantañataqui imantasipcäna ucanacajja
Judges20:39 Ucapachasti jaltapcän uca israelitanacajja nina jewk'eri uñjasinjja cuttanipjjänwa Benjamín sat tribunquirinacampi nuwasiñataqui. Benjaminitanacasti uca nuwasïwinjja quimsa tunca israelitanaca jiwarayapjjäna. Ucatsti amuyapjjänwa jupanacajj atipjapjjatapa
Judges20:40 Ucampis benjaminitanacajja khepa toke uñtasinjja uñjapjjänwa marcata nina jewk'ejj mistsusajj alajjpachcama maqhatiri.
Judges20:41 Ucat israelitanacasti cutjtapjjänwa nuwasiñataqui. Ucampis benjaminitanacajj ajjsarthapiyasipjjänwa jan walt'añajj jupanacaru jac'achanitapata.
Judges20:42 Jupanacajj jaltjjapjjänwa israelitanacan nayrakatapatjja wasara thacnäma
Judges20:43 Benjaminitanacajj israelitanacampi muyuntataw uñjasipjjäna. Ucatsti israelitanacajj arctasinjja take tucjapjjäna Menúha satata Gabaa sat marcat inti jalsu tokecama.
Judges20:44 Uqhamaw tunca quimsakallkon waranka soldadonaca Benjamín sat tribunquïritjja jiwarapjjäna.
Judges20:45 Maynïrinacajj cuttanisajja wasara tokeruraquiw jaltjjapjjaraquïna Rimón sata kala janqhara tokeru
Judges20:46 Uca urunsti Benjamín sat tribunquir soldadonacajja pä tunca pheskan warankanacaw jiwarapjjäna.
Judges20:47 Ucampis sojjta pataca benjaminitanacaw cuttanisajja wasararu jaltjjapjjäna. Ucatsti Rimón sat kala janqharanjja pusi phajjsiwa ucancapjjäna.
Judges20:48 Israelitanacasti chicata benjaminitanacarojj nuwantasipcaquïnwa
Judges21:1 Israelitanacasti Mizpa sat marcanjja juramento lurapjjäna phuchanacapajja jani benjaminitanacampi casarasiñapataqui.
Judges21:2 Ucatsti Betel marcaru sarasinjja Diosan nayrakatapanwa arumcama jachapjjäna:
Judges21:3 “¡Israelan Diosapa! ¿Cunatsa aqhama jan walt'añanacajj utji? ¿Cunjämaraqui Israel taypinsti mayni tribusti chhakhatäspasti?” sasa.
Judges21:4 Ucat khepa urusti israelitanacajj wali alwata sartasinjja mä altara lursupjjäna. Ucatwa Diosaru holocausto sat sacrificionacjja loktapjjäna sumancañataqui.
Judges21:5 Jupanaccamasti jisct'asipjjaraquïnwa: “¿Qhitisa jiwasanacatjja Mizpa marcanjja jan tantachasïwinccanjja?” sasa. Ucansti juramento lurapjjäna jan uca tantachasïwiru sarirejja jiwañapataqui.
Judges21:6 Israelitanacasti wali llaquitawa jicjjatasipjjäna Benjamín sat tribunquirinacampejj cunatejj pascäna ucanacata. Sapjjaraquïnwa: “Jichha urunwa Israel taypitjja mayni tribujja chhaktayatajja” sasa.
Judges21:7 “Jichhasti
Judges21:8 ¿Acanjja utjpachati Mizpa marcana Dios nayrakataru jan jutir israelitajja?” sasa. Ucampis jupanacajj amtasipjjänwa Galaad sat ucqhanquir Jabes sat marcata
Judges21:9 Cunapachatejj listata art'asipjjäna ucqhajja janiw qhitisa uca ucqhanquirejj uñstcänti.
Judges21:10 Ucatsti take marcpachawa qhithapjjäna tunca payan waranka wali nuwasir soldadonaca Jabes sat marcana take jaquirinacar jiwarayanipjjañapataqui.
Judges21:11 Jupanacasti sapjjänwa: “Jiwarayanipjjam take chachanacaru
Judges21:12 Jabes sat marcan jaquirinac taypinjja pusi pataca jan chacha uñt'ir tawakonacaw utjäna
Judges21:13 Ucatsti takpacha marcawa Rimón sat kala janqharancapqui uca benjaminitanacaru thakheri qhithapjjäna sumancthapiñataqui.
Judges21:14 Benjaminitanacajj cutt'anjjapjjepanjja israelitanacajj Jabes sat marcata irpanipcäna uca tawakonacwa churapjjäna warmipataqui. Ucampis warminacajja janiw waljanïcänti uca laycusti pist'änwa.
Judges21:15 Israelitanacasti
Judges21:16 Ucampis marcanquir jilïrinacajja jisct'asipjjänwa: “¿Cunjämatsa warminaca mayninacataqui jicjjatañäni? Benjaminitanacan warminacapajj take jiwarayatächejjaya.
Judges21:17 Benjamín sat tribusti
Judges21:18 Ucampis jiwasanacajja janiw phuchanacasa churcsnati jupanacampi casarasipjjañapataquejja. Jiwasasti take israelitanacaw juramento lurtanjja maldicisa phuchanacasa jan benjaminitanacar churañataqui.
Judges21:19 Ucampis Silo sat chekansti sapa maraw Diosan jach'a fiestapajj utji. Ucasti Betel marca amstanquiwa
Judges21:20 Ucatsti israelanquir jilïrinacasti
Judges21:21 Cunapachatejj Silo sat marcata tama tawakonacajja thokt'asisa mistunipcani ucqhajja jumanacasti imantasipcta ucqhatjja mistsupjjaraquim
Judges21:22 Ucampis tawakonacana awquinacapasa
Judges21:23 Benjaminitanacajja uca arunacar iyawsasinjja sapa mayniwa mä tawako thokquipanjja lunthataniwayapjjäna. Ucatsti orakenacaparuw irpasjjapjjäna. Orakenacapanjja wastatampiw marcanaca lurasipjjäna ucat ucana jacañataqui.
Judges21:24 Maynïr israelitanacajja sapa mayniraquiw cutt'jjapjjaraquïna orakeparu
Judges21:25 Uca urunacansti Israel marcanjja janiw reyejja utjcänti
Ruth1:1 Cunapachatejj Israel marcajj juezanacan apnakatäcäna uca maranacanjja
Ruth1:2 
Ruth1:3 Ucampis Elimelec chachajj jiwjjänwa
Ruth1:4 Uca khepatsti
Ruth1:5 Mahlonampi Quelionampejj jiwjjapjjaraquiquïnwa
Ruth1:6 Ucatwa mä urojj Noemí warmejj Moab marcana ist'äna
Ruth1:7 Ucatwa Noemí warmejj Judá marcaru cutjjañ amtäna
Ruth1:8 Ucampis thaqui sarcasinjja jupajj sänwa: —Sarjjapjjam
Ruth1:9 Diosajj munpan jumanacan casarasipjjañama
Ruth1:10 Sapjjaraquïnwa: —¡Janiwa! ¡Nanacajj jumamp chicaw marcamar sarañ munapjjta! —sasa.
Ruth1:11 Noemí warmejj jupanacarojj sascaquïnwa: —Cuttjjapjjam
Ruth1:12 Sarjjapjjam
Ruth1:13 jumanacajj
Ruth1:14 Jupanacasti wasitat juc'ampi jachapjjäna. Ucatsti
Ruth1:15 Ucatwa Noemí warmejj säna: —Uñtam
Ruth1:16 Ucampis Rut warmejj juparojj saraquïnwa: —Jan mayistati jumat sarjjañajja
Ruth1:17 Nayasti
Ruth1:18 Noemí warmisti Rut warmin jupamp chica sarañ munatapatjja
Ruth1:19 Uqhamaw jupanacajj panpacha sarapjjäna Belén marcar puriñcama. Cunapachatï Belén marcar mantapjjäna ucapachasti take marcpachaw jupanacar uñjasinjja chuymanacap ch'alljjtayasipjjäna. Warminacasti sapjjaraquïnwa: —¿Janit acasti Noemí warmïquï? —sasa.
Ruth1:20 Ucampis Noemí warmejj jupanacarojj saraquïnwa: —Jan Noemí sapjjestati
Ruth1:21 Nayasti aca chekatjja take phokt'ataw mistuwayta
Ruth1:22 Uqhamaw Noemí warmejj Rut warmimpi Moab marcata cuttanjjäna. Belén marcar purinjjapjjäna ucqhasti cebada apthapiña horasaw kalltasiraquïna —sasa.
Ruth2:1 Noemí warminsti mä familiapaw utjäna
Ruth2:2 Mä urusti Rut warmejj Noemí taycch'iparojj sänwa: —Pampar sarä
Ruth2:3 Uqhamaw Rut warmejj pampar saräna; yawthapirinacajj jalaktayapcäna uca cebada puyanac apthapisaw arcäna. Uca yapusti Booz chachancänwa
Ruth2:4 Uqhamaruw Booz chachajj Belén marcata purini takpachanir aruntasa: —Diosasti jumanacampïpan —sasa. Jupanacasti sapjjänwa —Diosasti jumarojj bendizpan —sasa.
Ruth2:5 Ucatsti Booz chachajj cebada yawthapirinacan jilïriparuw jisct'äna
Ruth2:6 Jupasti sänwa: —Uca tawakojj Noemí warmimp chica Moab marcata jutiriwa
Ruth2:7 nayaruw jicjjatasin achict'asitu cebada yawirinacan khepapa puyanac apthapisa sarañataqui. Jupasti alwatpacha jichhacamaw apthapisqui jan samart'asa. Jichhaquiw juti aca ch'iwi c'uchuru samart'iri.
Ruth2:8 Ucatwa Booz chachajj Rut warmirojj saraqui: —Ist'it
Ruth2:9 Ucatsti sarascaquim cawqhantejj cebada yawir jakenacajj yawthapipcani uca chekaru. Nayasti uywatanacajjarojj sistwa “Janiw cunsa parljjayapjjätati” sasa. Cunapachatejj umat pharjätam ucqhasti
Ruth2:10 Rut warmisti orakeruw p'ekep alt'äna take ajjsart'añampi
Ruth2:11 Booz chachasti juparojj saraquïnwa: —Nayasti yattwa cunanactï taycch'imataqui lurcta ucanaca
Ruth2:12 ¡Diosaw jumar cuttayjjätam! ¡Israel marcan Diosaparu thakctajja ucaw bendicïtam take luratanacamata!
Ruth2:13 Jupasti Booz chacharojj saraquïnwa: —Jumasti wali suma jakëtawa nayataquejja arunacamasti ch'amañchituwa
Ruth2:14 Mank'aña horasasti
Ruth2:15 Cunapachatejj wastat cebada puyanac apthapir sarcäna ucqhasti
Ruth2:16 Uqhamaraquiw jalaktayawayapjjäta cebada pichunacamatjja yakhep puyanaca
Ruth2:17 Rut warmejj arumt'añcamaw cebada puyanaca apthapisïna
Ruth2:18 Jupasti cebada k'ept'ataw marcarojj cuttanjjäna
Ruth2:19 Noemí warmisti Rut warmirojj jisct'änwa: —¿Cawqhansa jichhürojj irnakta? ¿Cawqhataraqui walja cebada puyanac apthapinta? ¡Bendicitäpan cawquïri jaketejj uqham yanapctam ucajja! —sasa. Rut warmejj yatiyänwa taycch'iparojj cawquïri jakempitejj irnakcäna uca. Jupasti saraquïnwa: —Cawquïr jakempitejj irnakcta ucajja
Ruth2:20 Noemí warmisti juparojj saraquïnwa: —¡Diosasti juparojj bendizpan! Jupasti jichhajj jiwasarojj sum uñjistu
Ruth2:21 Rut warmejj ucjjarojj sänwa: —Jupasti nayarojj situwa: “Irnakascaquim uywatanacajjampi chica cosecha apthapiñcama” —sasa.
Ruth2:22 Ucatsti Noemí warmejj yojjch'aparojj sänwa: —Wawa
Ruth2:23 Rut warmisti Booz chachan uywatanacapampiw cebada puyanaca apthapiscaquïna
Ruth3:1 Mä urojj Noemí warmejj Rut yojjch'aparojj sänwa: —Wawa
Ruth3:2 Ist'am
Ruth3:3 Jumasti jichhajj aqham luram: Jarekasiwayam
Ruth3:4 Ucatsti sum uñch'uquïta cawqharutï iquintcani uca. Ucat saram
Ruth3:5 Rut warmejj Noemí taycch'iparojj sänwa: —Take cunanactejj ewjjawayquistajja ucanacjja luräwa —sasa.
Ruth3:6 Uqhamaw Rut warmejj pampa tokeru saräna; take cuntejj taycch'ipajj sawaycäna ucarjamaw luräna.
Ruth3:7 Booz chachajj mankt'asisa
Ruth3:8 Chica arumjarojj Booz chachajj acatjamat konthapïna
Ruth3:9 Ucat jisct'araquïna —¿Qhitïtas jumajja? —sasa. Rut warmisti saraquïnwa: —Nayasti Rut uywatamätwa. Jumasti nayan familiajjätawa
Ruth3:10 Booz chachasti juparojj sänwa: —¡Diosasti jumarojj bendispan! Jichhasti nayarojj uñacht'ayistaw cunja munasiñamas utji jiwquis uca chachamataquejja. Jumasti chachasiñ munasajj nayat juc'amp wayna jake thakasisamänjja
Ruth3:11 Jichhasti jan ajjsaramti
Ruth3:12 Chekpachansa nayarojj jumar khespiyañajj wact'chitu familiamätajja laycu
Ruth3:13 Uqhamasti jichha arumajj acar kheparam. Arumanthitejj jupajj familiapätap laycu jumar khespiyañ munchejja
Ruth3:14 Rut warmisti uca arumajj Booz chachan cayöjjaparuw ict'äna. Khepärmanthejj wali alwat sartasinjja
Ruth3:15 Ucatsti Booz chachajj sänwa: —Awayt'atäctas uca phullu awaysusim
Ruth3:16 Cunapachatejj Rut warmejj utaparu purjjäna ucqhajja
Ruth3:17 Ucjjarusti sascaquïnwa: —Nayarusti aca cebada churaniwayitu
Ruth3:18 Ucatsti Noemí taycch'ipajj sänwa: —Jichhasti suyt'aquim
Ruth4:1 Booz chachajj
Ruth4:2 Ucatwa Booz chachajj marcanquir tunca jilïr chuyman jakenacaru jawsäna
Ruth4:3 Booz chachajj familiaparojj sänwa: —Noemí warmejj Moab marcata cutt'anisinjja
Ruth4:4 Nayasti acwa jumar yatiyañ munsma
Ruth4:5 Ucatsti Booz chachajj khanañchänwa aqham sasa: —Sum amuyt'asim
Ruth4:6 Uca arunac ist'asasti uca familiajj sänwa: —Uqhamïpanjja janiw nayajj alasisin khespiyquiristi
Ruth4:7 Qhä urunacanjja Israel marcanjja mä sarapaw utjäna: Cunapachatejj maynejj familia luräwinaca luraña mayniru pasayjje
Ruth4:8 Booz chachan familiapajj wisqhup apsusisinjja
Ruth4:9 Ucatsti Booz chachajj
Ruth4:10 Uqhamaraquiw jumanacajj arsüpjjäta
Ruth4:11 Take ucanquirinacasti arsupjjaraquïnwa aqham sasa: —Nanacaw take acanacat uñjapjjta. ¡Diosasti munpan
Ruth4:12 Diosasti walja wawanacarac aca warmitjja jumatac utjaypan. Waljaniraquïpan familiamajja
Ruth4:13 Uqhamaw Booz chachajj Rut warmimpi casarasïna. Ucatsti cunapachatï paninëjjapjjäna ucqhajja
Ruth4:14 Ucatsti Noemí warmirojj warminacajj sapjjänwa: —¡Diosasti jach'achatäpan jichhüruna
Ruth4:15 Juparaquiw cusisiyätam
Ruth4:16 Noemí warmisti wawaru ichtasinjja
Ruth4:17 Uqham uñjasinjja

1Samuel1:1 Efraín kollunac tokena Ramá sat chekana
1Samuel1:2 Elcanasti pä warminïnwa. Maynejj Ana sata
1Samuel1:3 Sapa mararaquiw Elcanajj Silo sat chekaru sarirïna take ch'amani Tatituru yupaychiri
1Samuel1:4 Cunapachatejj Elcanajj sacrificionac loktirïcän ucqhajja
1Samuel1:5 Ucampisa Anarojj cunatejj sumäqui ucpun churirïnjja
1Samuel1:6 Ucatwa Peninajj
1Samuel1:7 Sapa marapuniwa
1Samuel1:8 Ucat Elcana chachapajj saraquirïna: “Ana
1Samuel1:9 Mä cutiwa
1Samuel1:10 Anasti jacht'asisa
1Samuel1:11 aqham sasa: “Take ch'aman Tatitu
1Samuel1:12 Cunjämatejj Anajj Tatitu nayrakatan wali jaya mayisiscänjja
1Samuel1:13 ucampis jupajj chuymap mankhenac mayisiscänjja. Janiw cuna arsutapas ist'ascänti; lacapaquiw onokescänjja. Ucat Elí sacerdotejj: “Umatäpachaw” sasaw amuyäna
1Samuel1:14 ucatwa saraqui: —¿Cunapachcamas ucan umatäscäta? ¡Vinjja apanucum! —sasa.
1Samuel1:15 —Janiw umatäcti
1Samuel1:16 Jan jumajj nayan jan wali warmïtajj amuyamti
1Samuel1:17 —Uqhamajj jichhajj sumaquiy sarjjam
1Samuel1:18 —Waliquiw
1Samuel1:19 Khepärmanthisti wali alwat sartasïna

1Samuel1:24 Cunapachatejj wawarojj ñuñu t'akjjän ucapachasti

1Samuel2:1 Anasti aca oración luraraqui: “Tatitu

1Samuel2:4 Ch'amaninacan arconacapsa t'unjaraquiwa

1Samuel2:7 Tatituw pobrerusa

1Samuel2:10 Tatitojj uñisirinacaparojj t'unjaniwa
1Samuel2:11 Ucatsti Elcanajj utaparuw cuttawayjjaraquïna
1Samuel2:12 Elí sacerdoten wawanacapasti jan wali jakenacäpjjänwa
1Samuel2:13 ni sacerdoten phokhañapäqui ucsa marcampejj phokhapcänti. Yatitaraquïnwa
1Samuel2:14 perolaru

1Samuel2:18 Ucampisa

1Samuel2:24 Wawanaca

1Samuel3:1 Samuel waynasti Tatiturojj sirviscaquïnwa Elí sacerdoten arsutanacap phokhasa. Uca urunacansti janiraquiw Tatitojj cuna arunacsa alekaqui yatiyirïcänti
1Samuel3:2 Ucampis mä uruw Elí sacerdotejj juyqhuptjjäna
1Samuel3:3 Samuelosti Tatitun templopan iquiscaraquïna
1Samuel3:4 Ucatwa Tatitojj jawsäna: “¡Samuel!” sasa. —¡Acancasctwa! —sasaw jupajj ucjjarojj saraquïna.
1Samuel3:5 Ucatsti janc'aquiw Elí sacerdoten ucaru sararaqui aqham sasa: —Acajj juttwa
1Samuel3:6 Ucampisa Tatitojj wasitat jawsascaquïnwa: —¡Samuel! —sasa. Ucat Samuelojj sartasin Elí sacerdoten ucaruw sararaqui
1Samuel3:7 Samuelojj janïraw Tatitur uñt'cataynati

1Samuel3:10 Ucatsti Tatitojj puriniraquïnwa
1Samuel3:11 Tatitusti saraquïnwa: —Jichhajj nayajj Israel marcanwa mä luräwi luraraquï
1Samuel3:12 Uca uruw cuntejj Elí sacerdoterojj familianacap toket siscta ucjja phokharaquï.
1Samuel3:13 Niyaw juparojj yatiyaracta familiapar wiñayatac mutuyañ toketjja
1Samuel3:14 Ucatwa
1Samuel3:15 Ucanac ist'asinsti Samuelojj iquintjjänwa
1Samuel3:16 ucampisa Elí sacerdotejj jawsasinjja jisct'änwa: —Samuel
1Samuel3:17 Elí sacerdotesti jisct'araquïnwa: —¿Cunsa Tatitojj parlawaytam? Jan cuns imt'istati jan ucasti takpacha yatiyita. ¡Diosasti jumarojj mutuyaraquïtamwa janitejj phokhata yatiyquitäta ucapachajja! —sasaw Elí sacerdotejj säna.

1Samuel3:20 Israelita jakenacasti takeniraquiw Dan sat ucata Beerseba sisqui ucacama yatipjjäna Samuelojj chekpachansa Tatitun profetapätapa.

1Samuel6:5 Uca laycu jichhajj korit uca tumoranac lurapjjam

1Samuel9:5 Zuf sisqui uca chekaru purisinsti Saúl waynajj cawquïri uywatatejj jupampi chica sarcäna ucarojj saraquïnwa: —Cuttjjaquiñäni
1Samuel9:6 Uywatasti ucjjarojj saraquïnwa: —Aca marcanjja mä profetaw utji
1Samuel9:7 —Uqhamajj sarañäniya
1Samuel9:8 Uywatasti ucjjarojj saraquïnwa: —Nayan mä jisc'a sencillo kollkew utjitu. Uc profetarojj churañäni jiwasar cawcsaru sarañasäquitejj uca uñacht'ayañapataqui —sasa.
1Samuel9:9 (Nayrapachanacanjja mä israelita jakejj cunsa Diosar jisct'asiñ munirïna ucapachajj sapjjerïnwa: “Uñjirin ucar sarañäni” sasa. Jichhajj qhititejj “profeta” satäqui ucajj nayrajj “uñjiri” satänwa.)
1Samuel9:10 —Waliquiwa
1Samuel9:11 Cunapachatejj uca amstanjam marcaru maqhatasipcän ucqhasti
1Samuel9:12 Tawakonacasti sapjjaraquïnwa: —Jïsa
1Samuel9:13 Marcaru purisinsti janc'aquiw juparojj thaktapjjäta
1Samuel9:14 Jupanacasti marca tokerojj maqhatasipcaquïnwa. Puripcäna uca horasaraquiw Samuelojj mistusincäna
1Samuel9:15 Saúl waynan puriniñapa nayräjja urusti
1Samuel9:16 “Arumanthi alwajj aca quipca horasaruw Benjamín toket jutiri mä jakeruw qhitanïma
1Samuel9:17 Cunapachatejj Samuelojj Saúl waynar uñjcän ucqhajj Tatitojj sänwa: “Acajjay cawquïri jakettejj parlcäyäsma ucajja. Jupaw jichhajj marcajjarojj apnakani.”
1Samuel9:18 Marcar mantañ puncuru jac'achcasinsti Saúl waynajj Samueloruw jicjjati
1Samuel9:19 —Nayätwa uñjirejja. Jichhajj nayan nayrakatajja santuarior maqhatam
1Samuel9:20 Cawquïri kachu asnonacamatejj chhakqui
1Samuel9:21 Saúl waynasti saraquïnwa: —¡Nayajj Benjamín tribunquirïtwa
1Samuel9:22 Uqhamasti Samuelojj Saúl waynampiru
1Samuel9:23 Ucatsti Samuelojj phayirirojj sänwa: —Cawquïri aychtejj churcsma uqhamaraqui “Yakhachätaw” siscsma uc apanim —sasa.
1Samuel9:24 Phayiristi janc'aquiw mä charpacha apsuni
1Samuel9:25 Cunapachatejj santuariot marcaru sarakanjjapjjän ucqhasti Saúl waynataquejj mä iquiña uta pataru waquicht'apjjäna.
1Samuel9:26 Saúl waynasti ucaruw iquintjjäna. Khepärmanthi alwatasti Samuelojj Saúl waynaru jawsasinjja uca uta patanwa parljjayäna aqham sasa: —Sartasjjam
1Samuel9:27 cunapachatejj marca ankäjjaru mistusinipcäna
1Samuel10:1 Uqhamasti Samuelojj mä keru aceite catusinjja Saúl waynan p'ekepjjaruw warjjatäna
1Samuel10:2 Jichhajj acat sarjjasinsti
1Samuel10:3 Juc'ampi sarcasinsti
1Samuel10:4 Aruntt'apjjätamwa
1Samuel10:5 Ucjjarusti Diosan orakepa Gabaa sisqui uca chekaruw puriraquïta
1Samuel10:6 Ucapachaw Tatitun ajayupajj jumjjaru jutani
1Samuel10:7 Cunapachatejj take ucanacajj jumampi lurasini ucapachasti
1Samuel10:8 Gilgal sisqui uca chekaru nayrt'araquim
1Samuel10:9 Saúl waynan
1Samuel10:10 Ucatsti cunapachatejj Saúl waynampi uywatapampi Gabaa sisqui uca chekaru puripcäna ucapachasti
1Samuel10:11 Ucampisa take qhitinacatejj nayratpacha Saúl waynaru uñt'apcäna ucanacasti
1Samuel10:12 Ucat mayni uca chekanquiristi ucjjarojj saraquïnwa: “¿Qhitisa jupanacan awquipajja?” Ucatpï säwejj jutejja: “¿Saúl waynajj mä profetaraquichä?” sasa.
1Samuel10:13 Uqham profetjama parlaña pasatatsti
1Samuel10:14 Ucat tiopajj juparu uywatampiru jisct'i: —¿Cawquirus sarapjjta? —sasa. Saúl waynasti saraquïnwa: —Kachu asnonac thakheriw sarapjjta. Ucampisa jan uñstcjjepansti
1Samuel10:15 Tiopasti ucjjarojj saraquïnwa: —¿Camsapjjaractam Samuelosti? Yatiyapjjetaya —sasa.
1Samuel10:16 Saúl waynajj tioparojj saraquïnwa: —Khanwa sapjjetu kachu asnonacajj uñstjjatapata —sasa. Ucampisa Saúl waynajj janipuniw cuntejj reyïña toket Samuelojj parlcatayna ucanacjja arsuscänti.
1Samuel10:17 Ucjjarusti Samuelojj take israelitanacaruw jawsaraquïna
1Samuel10:18 Ucanwa jupanacar saraquïna: “Israelan Tatitu Diosapajj aqham sänwa: Take israelitanacarusti nayaw Egiptot apsunipjjsma
1Samuel10:19 Ucampis jichhajj jumanacajj Diosamarojj jisc'achapjjtawa
1Samuel10:20 Ucjjarusti Samuelojj saraquïnwa take Israelanquiri tribunacarojja: “Jac'achasinipjjam” sasa. Ucatsti suertejj Benjamín triburuw wact'araquïna.
1Samuel10:21 Ucjjarusti Benjamín triburuw saraquïna: —Jac'achasinipjjam —sasa. Ucatsti suertejj Matri sisqui uca jach'a familiaruraquiw wact'äna
1Samuel10:22 Ucatwa wasitat Tatituru jisct'apjjäna
1Samuel10:23 Ucat irpsuriw jalapjjäna; cunapachatejj Saúl waynajj take israelitanaca nayrakataru uñstcän ucapachasti take jakenacaw uñcatapjjäna
1Samuel10:24 Samuelosti take jakenacaruw jisct'araqui: —¿Jichhajj cawquïrirutejj Tatitojj reyit ajllqui ucarojj uñcatjjapjjtati? ¡Janiw mayni israelitas jupjamajj utjquiti! —sasa. Ucjjarusti jakenacajj: —¡Jallalla rey! —sasaw art'apjjaraquïna.
1Samuel10:25 Ucjjarusti Samuelojj marcarojj cuna leyinacatejj reino toket utjcani ucanacwa yatiyäna
1Samuel10:26 Saúl waynas Gabaa sisqui uca utaparuw cuttjjaraquïna
1Samuel10:27 Ucampisa utjaraquïnwa jan wali parliri jakenacajja
1Samuel11:1 Nahas sata Amón oraken reyipasti
1Samuel11:2 Amonitanquiri Nahas jakesti saraquïnwa: —Jumanacampisti mä arust'äwi lurä
1Samuel11:3 Ucjjarusti Jabes marcan utjir jilïri jakenacajj sapjjaraquïnwa: —Nanacarojj pakallko uru churapjjeta
1Samuel11:4 Qhitatanacasti cawqhantejj Saúl waynajj jaccäna uca Gabaa sat chekaruw puripjjäna; ucan jakenacaruw cunatejj pascatayna take ucanac yatiyapjjäna. Takeniw ucanac ist'asajj wali jachapjjäna.
1Samuel11:5 Uqhamäquiriruw Saúl waynajj pampat orko vacanacap ant'ataw jutascäna
1Samuel11:6 Ucanac ist'asinsti
1Samuel11:7 Ucatwa pä orko vacanaca irpcatanisin
1Samuel11:8 Cunapachatejj jakenacajj Bezec sisqui uca chekaru tantacht'asipjjäna ucapachasti
1Samuel11:9 Ucat uca qhitatanacajj purincatayna ucanacarojj aqham saraqui: —Jichhajj Jabes chekan utjiri jakenacarojj sapjjam
1Samuel11:10 Ucat Nahas sisqui ucarusti sapjjaraquïnwa: —Arumanthiw nanacajj jumaru catuyasjjapjjäma
1Samuel11:11 Khepürusti Saúl waynajj ejercitopwa quimsa escuadronani suma waquicht'araquïna
1Samuel11:12 Ucat yakhepa jakenacajja sapjjänwa: —¿Qhitinacas Saúl waynana jiwasan reyisäñapatjja pächasipjjänjja? Take uca jakenac catuyapjjeta jiwarayapjjañajjataqui —sasa.
1Samuel11:13 Ucampisa Saúl waynajj saraquïnwa: —Jichhürojj janiw qhitis jiwayatäcaniti
1Samuel11:14 Ucat Samuelojj take jakenacaru saraqui: —Jichhajj Gilgal sisqui uca chekaru sarjjañäni
1Samuel11:15 Ucat take jakenacaw Gilgal chekaru sarapjjäna
1Samuel12:1 Ucat Samuelojj take israelitanac nayrakatan aqham saraquïnwa: —Jumanacajj uñjapjjtawa
1Samuel12:2 Acajj jichhajj jumanacan reyimajja. Jupaw jumanacaru apnakapjjätam. Nayasti chuymani jakëjjtwa
1Samuel12:3 Jichhasti acajjay acancasctwa. Nayatejj qhitin vacapsa
1Samuel12:4 Ucat jakenacajj sapjjaraquïnwa: —Janipuniw cunapachas nanacarojj t'akhesiyapquistati
1Samuel12:5 —Uqhamajj Tatitusa
1Samuel12:6 Ucjjarusti Samuelojj marcarojj saraquïnwa: —Tatitojj Moisés
1Samuel12:7 Uqhamasti jichhajj waquichasipjjam
1Samuel12:8 Cunapachatejj Jacobojj wawanacapampi Egipto marcar sarjjäna ucapachajja
1Samuel12:9 Ucampisa jupanacajj Tatitu Diosatjja armasjjapjjänwa
1Samuel12:10 Ucampis jupanacajj Tatituruw juchanacap arsusipjjäna
1Samuel12:11 “Uca laycuw Tatitojj qhitanïna
1Samuel12:12 Ucampisa cunapachatejj amonitanacan Nahas reyiparu jumanacar nuwiri jutcän uca uñjasajja jumanacajj mä rey apnakañapataqui mayipjjayätajja
1Samuel12:13 Ucampisa jichhajj acajj jumanacan ajllit reyejja. Tatitojj churapjjtamwa cuna reytejj mayipcta uca.
1Samuel12:14 Jichhajj jumanacarojj wact'apjjtamwa Tatituru ajjsartapjjañama
1Samuel12:15 Ucampisa janitejj Tatituru ist'apcäta
1Samuel12:16 “Uqhamasti jichhajj jan onjjtapjjamti cawqhancapctatejj uca chekata
1Samuel12:17 Jichhajj trigo cosechañ horasäjjewa
1Samuel12:18 Ucspachaw Samuelojj Tatitur mayïna
1Samuel12:19 ucatwa Samuelorojj takeni sapjjäna: —Jumajj Tatitu Diosamaru aca sirvirinacamataqui achict'am
1Samuel12:20 Samuelosti saraquïnwa: —Jan ajjsarapjjamti. Chekpachansa jumanacajj sinti jan wali lurapjjatätajja; ucampisa jichhajj jan Tatitutjja sarakapjjamti
1Samuel12:21 Janiraqui uca c'ari diosanacaru sirvipjjamti
1Samuel12:22 Tatitusti sutipar munatap laycojja janiw apanucupcätamti
1Samuel12:23 Nayasti Tatitu contrajj janic juchañchasïti
1Samuel12:24 Jumanacajj Tatituruquiw ajjsartapjjañama
1Samuel12:25 ucampisa jumanacatejj jan walinac lurañacpun amtasipcäta ucapachasti
1Samuel13:1 Saúl waynajj niya jilïr jakëjjänwa
1Samuel13:2 Saúl reyejj quimsa waranka soldadonacwa ajllïna israelita jakenac taypitjja. Pä waranka soldadonacasti jupa chicänwa Micmas uqhamarac Betel kollunaca tokena
1Samuel13:3 Gabaa sisqui uca chekan Jonatanasti soldadonacampejj filisteonacarojj k'alwa tucjäna
1Samuel13:4 Take israelita jakenacasti yatipjjaraquïnwa
1Samuel13:5 Filisteonacasti mä toketjja tantacht'asipjjaraquïnwa
1Samuel13:6 Israelitanacasti wali mayjt'ataw jicjjatasipjjaraquïna
1Samuel13:7 Jupanacatsti waljaniw Jordán jawira maqhatjjapjjäna
1Samuel13:8 Ucanwa Saúl reyejj pakallko uru suyt'äna
1Samuel13:9 Ucat Saúl reyejj saraquïnwa: —Uywanac aptanipjjam holocaustonaca
1Samuel13:10 Cunapachatejj Saúl reyejj uca sacrificionac loktañ tucuyascän ucapachaw Samuelojj purinïna. Ucat Saúl reyejj catokeri
1Samuel13:11 Ucampis Samuelojj sänwa: —¿Cunatsa uca lurta? —sasa. Saúl reyisti saraquïnwa: —Cunapachatejj jakenacaru sarjjapjjeri uñjta
1Samuel13:12 nayajj nuwantiriw sarakanï saraquiyätwa Gilgal chekana
1Samuel13:13 Samuelosti saraquïnwa: —¡Luratamajj mä lokhe jaken luratapjamawa! Tatitojj cuntejj sisctam uca arunactejj ist'asamän ucapachajj juman apnakañamajj wiñayataquïsapänwa uca Israel marcanjja.
1Samuel13:14 Ucampis jichhajj juman apnakañamajj janiw jayäcaniti. Tatitojj yakha chacha thakani jupan chuymapar purt'quiri
1Samuel13:15 Ucat ucapachaw Samuelojj Gilgal chekatjja sarawayjje thaquipanjama. Chicat ejercitosti Saúl rey chicaraquiw nuwasiñataqui khepararaqui
1Samuel13:16 Saúl reyimpi
1Samuel13:17 Filisteonacajj campamentonacapat quimsa tama guerrilleronaca mistunipcchïn ucasa
1Samuel13:18 Payïri tamasti Bet-horón sisqui ucsaruw sarapjjaraquïna. Quimsïri tamasti vallejj uñstqui Zeboim sata uca kollunac tokeruw sarapjjaraquïna
1Samuel13:19 Take Israel marcansti janiw mayni herrero jakes utjcänti
1Samuel13:20 Take israelita jakenacasti aradonacapan rejanacapsa
1Samuel13:21 Rejanaca
1Samuel13:22 Uqhamasti cawquïrinacatejj Saúl reyimpi
1Samuel13:23 Ucañcamasti mä tama filisteo soldadonacajj Micmas sisqui uca pasaña tokeruw jutapjjäna.
1Samuel14:1 Saúl reyin Jonatán yokapajj mä urojj yanapiriparojj sänwa: “Jutam
1Samuel14:2 Awquipasti mä kollu pataruw utjantasiraquitayna
1Samuel14:3 Efod sata isi apiristi
1Samuel14:4 Jupasti ucañcamajj cawqhanccäntejj filisteonacajj ucar puriñataquiw ch'amachascäna. Uca cheka pasañasti pä jach'a karka taypincänwa
1Samuel14:5 Maynïrejj amsta tokena
1Samuel14:6 Jonatanasti yanapiriparojj sänwa: —Jina
1Samuel14:7 —Take cuntejj amtcta ucanacjja lurascaquim
1Samuel14:8 Ucat Jonatanajj saraquïnwa: —Acajjay jichhajj qhurcataruw maqhatañäni cawqhancquitejj uca chachanacajj ucaru
1Samuel14:9 Jupanacatejj jiwasaru: “Suyt'apjjeta sarakanipjjañajjcama” sistani ucapachasti
1Samuel14:10 Ucampisa jupanacatejj: “Maqhatanipjjam” sistani ucapachasti
1Samuel14:11 Uqhamaw filisteonacampejj jupanacajj panpachani uñjayasipjjäna. Acanacasti uñjasajj sapjjänwa: “Uñtapjjam
1Samuel14:12 Ucat ucspachaw Jonatanampiru yanapiripampirojj art'anipjjäna: “¡Maqhatanipjjam acaru
1Samuel14:13 Jonatanasti cumpucamaquiw uca amsta maqhatawayäna
1Samuel14:14 Aca nayrïri nuwasiñansti Jonatanampi yanapiripampejj pä tunca chachanacwa jiwarayapjjäna
1Samuel14:15 Take qhitinacatejj campamentoncapcäna
1Samuel14:16 Saúl reyin centinelanacapasti
1Samuel14:17 Ucat Saúl reyejj ejercitoparojj saraqui: “Uñarapjjam
1Samuel14:18 Ucürusti Diosan efod sat isipajj israelitanac taypincascänwa
1Samuel14:19 Saúl reyejj uca sacerdotempi parlañapcamasti
1Samuel14:20 Ucapacharaquiw Saúl reyejj take ejercitopampejj tantacht'asisin sarapjje filisteonacampi nuwasiñataqui. Filisteonacasti sinti jan walt'añanwa jicjjatasipjjäna
1Samuel14:21 Uqhamarusa cawquïri hebreo jakenacatejj nayratpacha filisteonacampïcäna
1Samuel14:22 Cawquïri israelitanacatejj Efraín kollunacan imantasitäpcän ucanacasti
1Samuel14:23 Nuwasiñansti jupanacajj Bet-avén sisqui ucacamaw puripjjäna
1Samuel14:24 Ucampisa israelita jakenacajj uca urojj wali karjtatäpjjänwa
1Samuel14:25 Soldadonacasti mä ch'umi chekaruw puripjjäna
1Samuel14:26 Cunapachatejj jakenacajj ch'umiru mantapjjän ucqhasti
1Samuel14:27 Ucampisa Jonatanajj janiw ist'cataynati
1Samuel14:28 Ucat mayni israelita soldadojj juparu saraquïna: —Awquimajj juramentompiw ejercitorojj wayt'i
1Samuel14:29 Ucat Jonatanajj saraquïna: —Awquejjajj jan wal luri aca marcarojja. Uñjam cunjämsa nayajj uca mä juc'a misq'i mallt'asajj ch'amani tucuractjja
1Samuel14:30 juc'amp ch'amaniw jakejj tucusapäna
1Samuel14:31 Uca urusti israelitanacajj filisteonacarojj atipjapjjänwa
1Samuel14:32 Uqhamasti ejercitojj cuntejj uñisirinacapat aparapcatayna
1Samuel14:33 Ucampisa yakhepanacajj Saúl reyir yatiyiriw sarapjjäna: —Jakenacajj Tatitu contraw jucha lurasqui
1Samuel14:34 Uqhamarus jakenacarojj sapjjaraquim
1Samuel14:35 Saúl reyisti mä toketjja
1Samuel14:36 Ucatsti Saúl reyejj saraquïnwa: —Jichhajj aca aruman filisteonacar arctiri sarakapjjañäni
1Samuel14:37 Ucat Saúl reyejj Diosaru jisct'i: “¿Filisteonacarojj arcnakäti? ¿Jupanacarusti israelitanacan amparaparuti catuyäta?” sasa. Ucampis Tatitojj janiw uca urojj cunsa juparojj jaysancänti.
1Samuel14:38 Ucat Saúl reyejj saraqui: —Jichhajj jac'achasinipjjam take ejerciton jilïrinacapa; yatjjatapjjam qhitis jichhürojj uca jucha luri.
1Samuel14:39 -¡Israel marcan khespiyiri Tatitun sutipjjaruw arsta juramentompi
1Samuel14:40 Ucatwa Saúl reyejj take israelitanacarojj saraquïna: —Jumanacajj acsaru sayt'asipjjam
1Samuel14:41 Ucat Saúl reyejj art'araqui: —Tatitu
1Samuel14:42 Ucat janc'aquiw Saúl reyejj saraquïna: —Jichhajj Jonatán yokajjampita nayampitaraqui suerte jaktapjjam —sasa. Suertesti Jonatán yokapjjaruw purïna
1Samuel14:43 ucatwa Saúl reyejj Jonatanarojj saraquïna: —Jichhajj khanañchita cuntejj lurcta uca —sasa. Jonatanasti arsusiraquïnwa: —Chekpachansa
1Samuel14:44 Saúl reyejj art'asiraquïnwa: —¡Diosajj nayar jiwayitpan take ch'amapampi janitejj jiwcäta ucapachajja
1Samuel14:45 Marcasti Saúl reyirojj saraquïnwa: —¡Cunjämaraqui Jonatanasti jiwanisti
1Samuel14:46 Saúl reyisti filisteo jakenacaru arctañjja jaytjjaraquïnwa
1Samuel14:47 Uqhamawa Saúl reyejj Israel marca apnakasajja atipjäna take chekanwa uñisirinacapampejj nuwasiraquïna ucanacasti acanacänwa: Moab
1Samuel14:48 Mä jach'a ejército tantacht'araquïna ucat Amalec ucarojj atipjaraquïna. Uqhamatwa israelitanacarojj uca lunthata lluch'susirinacatjja khespiyäna.
1Samuel14:49 Saúl reyin yokanacapasti: Jonatán
1Samuel14:50 Saúl reyin warmipasti Ahinoam sataraquïnwa
1Samuel14:51 Saúl reyin awquipa Cis ucasti
1Samuel14:52 Filisteonac contra nuwasiñasti walipunïnwa
1Samuel15:1 Mä uruw Samuelojj Saúl reyiru säna: —Tatitojj Israel marcan jumaru reyit utt'ayañataquiw qhitanitu. Uca laycu jichhajj ist'am cuntejj Tatitojj sañ munctam uca.
1Samuel15:2 Take ch'amani Tatitojj aqham siwa: “Amalecita jakenacarojj mutuyäwa
1Samuel15:3 Uca laycu
1Samuel15:4 Saúl reyisti take jakenacaruw jawsayäna
1Samuel15:5 Ucatsti Saúl reyejj Amalec sisqui uca marcan jach'a capitalaparuw saräna
1Samuel15:6 Ucat quenitas sat jakenacarojj saraquïna: “¡Sartapjjam ucqhata! ¡Jumanacajj amalecita jakenac taypit mistuwayjjapjjam
1Samuel15:7 Ucat Saúl reyejj amalecita jakenacarojj nuwantäna Havila sisqui uca chekata
1Samuel15:8 Agag sata
1Samuel15:9 Ucampisa Saúl reyimpi ejercitopampisti Agag reyirojj janiw jiwayapcänti
1Samuel15:10 Ucat Tatitojj Samuelompi parlasinsti saraquïnwa:
1Samuel15:11 “Saúl chachar reyit utt'ayatajjatsti walpun amtta
1Samuel15:12 Khepärmanthi alwasti Samuelojj Saúl reyimpi jiquisir sarañataquiw wali alwata sartasïna
1Samuel15:13 Ucat Samuelojj Saúl reyin ucaru saräna
1Samuel15:14 —Uqhamasti
1Samuel15:15 —Amalec ucatwa ucanacjja apanipjjta —sasaw Saúl reyejj saraquïna. —Ucampisa jakenacajj suma ovejanacampi
1Samuel15:16 —¡Amuct'am
1Samuel15:17 Ucat Samuelojj säna: —¿Janit jumajj jan yäkcañac amuyascäyätajja? Ucampisa Israel tribunacan jilïripaw tucuwaytajja
1Samuel15:18 Jichhajj Tatitutejj jumaru uca ñankha jucharar amalecita jakenacaru k'ala t'unjaniñamataqui qhitchhïyätamjja
1Samuel15:19 ucapachasti
1Samuel15:20 Saúl reyejj saraquïnwa: —Nayajj Tatiturojj jaysapuntwa
1Samuel15:21 Ucampisa soldadonacajj cawquïritï suma ovejanacäqui uqhamarac suma vacanacäqui ucanacjja jilt'ayasipjjewa
1Samuel15:22 Ucat Samuelojj saraquïna: “Tatitutaquejj arsutanacapar phokhañaw juc'ampi sumajja
1Samuel15:23 Jupa contra sayt'asirejja
1Samuel15:24 Ucat Saúl reyejj Samuelorojj saraquïna: —Jïsa
1Samuel15:25 Ucampisa nayajj achict'assmawa
1Samuel15:26 —Janiw jumampi chica sarquiristti
1Samuel15:27 Samuelosti cuttanjjañataquiw sartjjäna
1Samuel15:28 Ucat Samuelojj Saúl reyirojj saraquïna: —Cunjämtejj ch'iyakquistajja uqhamaracwa jumarojj Tatitojj Israelan tronopatjja ch'iyakjjaractamjja. Juman mayni marca masimar catuyjjañataquiw apakjjtam
1Samuel15:29 Israelan jach'a Diosapäqui ucajja
1Samuel15:30 —Chekpachansa
1Samuel15:31 Uqhamasti Samuelojj Saúl reyimp chicaw saräna
1Samuel15:32 Ucspachaw Samuelojj saraquïna: “Acaru nayan nayrakatajjaru amalecita jakenacan Agag sat reyipa irptanirapipjjeta” sasa. Ucat Agag reyejj jan cunaquiw Samuel nayrakatarojj uñstäna chuymapansti amuyaraquïnwa: “Uca jan wali jiwañajjajj pasjjpachawa” sasa.
1Samuel15:33 Ucampis Samuelojj sänwa: “Jumajj espadamampiw walja warminacarojj jan wawani jayttajja. Jichhajj taycamajj jupanacjamaraquiw kheparani” sasa. Ucatsti Tatitu nayrakatana jan ajjsarasaw Samuelojj Agag reyerojj Gilgal sisqui uca chekan pusiruw qharinokäna.
1Samuel15:34 Ucatsti Ramá chekaruw cuttawayjjäna
1Samuel15:35 Samuelosti janipuniw mayampsa Saúl reyirojj uñjcjjänti
1Samuel16:1 Tatitusti Samuelorojj saraquïnwa: —¿Cunapachcamas uqham llaquitaqui sarnakäta uca Saúl reyi laycojja? Janiw nayajj muncjjti jupan Israel marcjjaru reyiquïscañapjja. Jichhajj sartasim
1Samuel16:2 —¿Cunjämsa jichhasti saräjja? ¡Saúl reyitejj saratajj yatinejja
1Samuel16:3 Ucatsti Isaí chacharojj uca sacrificio loktäwirojj jawsayaraquim
1Samuel16:4 Samuelosti cuntejj Tatitojj siscatayna ucanacwa luraraquïna. Cunapachatejj Belenar purcän ucqhasti
1Samuel16:5 —Jïsa
1Samuel16:6 Cunapachatejj jupanacajj purjjapjjän ucqhajj Samuelojj Eliab uñjasajj sänwa: “Acapunïpachaw cawquïri jaktejj Tatitojj reyïñapataqui ajllisqui ucajja” sasa.
1Samuel16:7 Ucampis Tatitojj sänwa: “Jan jumajj uñnakapataqui
1Samuel16:8 Uca Isaí chachajj Abinadab ucaruw jawsayanïna
1Samuel16:9 Ucat Isaí chachajj Sama sat yokaparuw irpcataraquïna; ucampisa Samuelojj saraquïnwa: —Janiw acarus ajlliscaraquiquiti —sasa.
1Samuel16:10 Isaí chachajj pakallko yokanacapwa Samuelorojj uñstayäna
1Samuel16:11 Ucat Isaí jakerojj jisct'äna: —¿Janit juc'ampi yokanacamajj utjcjje? —sasa. —Sinti sullcäqui ucaw utjasqui
1Samuel16:12 Isaí chachajj uca sullca yokaparu jawsiriwa qhitäna. Ucat uca sullquïristi suma wila ajanunïnwa
1Samuel16:13 Ucat Samuelojj janc'aquiw aceiten wajjra aptasinjja
1Samuel16:14 Ucañcamasti Tatitun ajayupajj janiw Saúl reyimpïcjjänti
1Samuel16:15 Ucatwa juparu sirvirinacajj sapjjäna: —Cunjämatejj jumajj uñjtajj
1Samuel16:16 Ucampisa jumajj sirvirinacamaru saraquim
1Samuel16:17 —Uqhamajj qhititejj suma toct'añ yatqui uca thakhapjjam
1Samuel16:18 Ucat jupanacat maynejj arsu: —Nayajj uñjtwa
1Samuel16:19 Ucat Saúl reyejj mä qhitanacwa Isaí chachan ucar qhitäna
1Samuel16:20 Ucat Isaí chachajj David yokaparojj Saúl reyin ucaruw qhitanïna. Jupampi chicasti mä asno irpayaraquïna
1Samuel16:21 Uqhamaw Davidajj Saúl reyin nayrakataparu uñstäna
1Samuel16:22 Saúl reyejj mä ewjja Isaí chachan ucarojj ewjjaraquïna
1Samuel16:23 Uqhamasti cunapachatejj uca Tatitun qhitanita ñankha ajayojj Saúl reyiru t'akhesiycän ucqhajj Davidajj arpa toct'arapirïna. Ucampiw Saúl reyejj cutjtasa waliquëjjaraquirïna uca ñankha ajayusti jupatjja jithektjjaraquirïnwa.

1Samuel17:3 Filisteo jakenacasti mä kollu patancapjjänwa
1Samuel17:4 Uqhamaraqui acatjamatwa filisteonac taypitjja mä guerrero jakejj mistunïna

1Samuel22:14 Ucat Ahimelec sacerdotejj reyirojj saraquïnwa: —¿Juma jach'a munañan reyin take oficialanacamatsti cawquïriraqui
1Samuel22:15 ¿Jichhaquiti nayajj Diosaru Davidjjatsti jisct'aststi? Janiw cunas uca toketjja utjquiti. Uca laycu jach'a munañan reyejja jan cunsa aca sirvirip contrajj lurpati
1Samuel22:16 Ucampisa reyejj sascaquïnwa: —¡Ahimelec
1Samuel22:17 Ucatsti janc'aquiw reyejj jupan guardiaparojj ordenaraquïna: —¡Tatitun sacerdotenacaparojj jiwarayapjjam! Jupanacasa Davidampïpjjaraquiquiwa. Jupan jaltascatap yatcasinsa
1Samuel22:18 Ucatwa reyejj edomita Doeg sat jakeruw ordenaraquïna: —¡Juma jiwarayam! —sasa. Uqhamasti Doeg sat jakejj sacerdotenacar catuntasinjja
1Samuel22:19 Ucatsti janc'aquiw Nob sisqui uca marcaru mantapjjäna. Uca marcasti sacerdotenacan marcapänwa. Ucansti espadampiw chachanacsa
1Samuel22:20 Ucampisa Ahimelec sacerdoten wawanacapatjja mayni Abiatar sat sutini yokapawa jaltjjäna
1Samuel22:21 Ucansti yatiyaraquïnwa
1Samuel22:22 Davidasti saraquïnwa: —Nayajj yatïyätwa qhä urojja
1Samuel22:23 Ucampisa nayampi chica acar kheparam
1Samuel23:1 Mä urusti filisteo jakenacajj Keila marcaruw nuwantapjjäna
1Samuel23:2 jupajj sarasin Tatituruw uca toket jisct'asïna

1Samuel23:4 Uqhamasti Davidajj wasitatwa Tatiturojj jisct'asiscaquïna
1Samuel23:5 Uqhamasti Davidampi
1Samuel23:6 Ucañcamasti Ahimelec sacerdoten Abiatar yokapajja jaltjjaraquitaynawa Davidampi Keila marcana jiquisiñataqui
1Samuel23:7 Mä toketsti Saúl reyirojj yatiyapjjaraquïnwa

1Samuel23:11 ¿Saúl reyisti jutapunpachäniti nayar thakeri
